name: Kevin Mullin
subject: We must fight Trump’s extremism through advocacy, the courts, and the ballot box. Help TODAY!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN MULLIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’m ready for the fight ahead, and I hope you are too.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kevinmullinforcongress/big-news-i-was-just-appointed-to-the-house-energy-commerce-committee-9132443?e=292fde286a)
---
| | | | [](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=1a8373d13f&e=292fde286a)
---
|
Peter,
**It’s hard to believe it was only two weeks ago that we watched in dismay as Donald Trump’s billionaires’ club had front row seats to his inauguration. At that moment, we knew we would have a long, tough fight ahead.**
**I’m ready for the fight, and I hope you are too.**
---
| [CLICK HERE TO JOIN THE FIGHT](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=96f1158cf9&e=292fde286a)
---
| Donald Trump ran on being tough on crime, putting America first, and lowering the costs of groceries and household goods. But he’s wasted no time waging an all-out-war on hard-working Americans, threatening the safety of our communities, and swarming our news feeds with chaos and confusion.
Unsurprisingly, his actions are being cheered on, even directed, by unelected billionaires like Elon Musk. Our president and his allies know exactly what they’re doing. They’re flooding the zone so voters, just like you, become overwhelmed and disengaged. But together, we can fight back.
---
| [DONATE TODAY!](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=88378648a1&e=292fde286a)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | Our democracy is on the line. From firing Department of Justice officials investigating his own crimes, freeing violent January 6th rioters, attempting to gut the federal workforce, freezing federal financial assistance, and threatening a trade war against our allies - our president has made a clear declaration of intent. He is only interested in fighting for himself.
In this moment, millions of Americans are living in fear of what our president may do next. But democracies are meant to serve the people, not scare them. I ran for Congress so that I can fight for those who are in need of help, and that's exactly what I will continue to do.
I’m honored to have been appointed Co-chair of the Congressional Task Force on Strengthening Democracy in the 119th Congress. While Donald Trump attempts to trample over American democracy, our task force will be there to hold the line. With your support, we can build the resources we need to fight Donald Trump in the courts, in the streets, and in the voting booth.
Our grassroots movement needs your help. Please consider clicking the link below so we can mobilize the resistance we need to fight executive overreach and empower democrats across the country to organize, run for office, and win.
Together, we can reset the balance of power and win back a Democratic House majority in 2026, stopping Donald Trump in his tracks. But that work starts today.
Thank you,
Rep. Kevin MullinCongressman, CA-15
---
| | | | | [DONATE TODAY!](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=d2457c5a98&e=292fde286a)
---

name: NDRC HQ
subject: Protecting the census and our democracy from Trump and Project 2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
The best thing you can do right now is rush a $30 donation to the NDRC to help power our democracy-saving work.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101564318/526345757/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY3YjU1MjJhLTU0ZTMtZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P2qPkstc-yh4dgjucdCZ2ZOC2LYOmYo5OqdNXTo22mo=&emci=72b6b5cc-45e3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=67b5522a-54e3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, the Trump administration is attacking our government from the inside out to enact their MAGA agenda. **One of the latest targets: the U.S. Census Bureau.** Since late last week, the bureau has experienced significant setbacks that hurt its ability to operate effectively as a nonpartisan statistical agency. And that hurts our ability to have a fair count in the census that leads to fair maps. First, Census Bureau Director Robert Santos, the renowned data expert who has led the Census Bureau for years, abruptly announced his resignation, which paves the path for Trump to appoint a right-wing, partisan replacement. Next, the bureau’s website started going dark for periods of time. _The New York Times_ reported that “more than 3,000 pages from the Census Bureau, the vast majority of which are articles filed under research and methodology,” were affected. Other missing pages include data stewardship policies and documentation for several data sets and surveys.” **It’s an ambush in broad daylight, and these attacks only strengthen and demonstrate the power of the Trump administration to undermine and politicize the agency.** Trump and his allies are counting on us being too distracted by all of their other attacks on our democracy to notice what they’re doing here. It's absolutely critical that we show them that we're paying attention and that our nationwide grassroots movement is powerful. **The NDRC is doing everything possible to defeat these radical attacks on the census and our democracy.[We’re asking you to rush a $30 donation to the NDRC to help power our democracy-saving work.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101564319/526345758/-1665762292?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TodayCensusRR_email_20250204-NDRC-Tier1-TodayCensusRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250204-NDRC-Tier1-TodayCensusRR_&utm_campaign=TodayCensusRR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY3YjU1MjJhLTU0ZTMtZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P2qPkstc-yh4dgjucdCZ2ZOC2LYOmYo5OqdNXTo22mo=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

These attacks are all ripped straight out of the Project 2025 playbook, which calls for installing hyper-partisan officials to decide who gets counted and who doesn't.
Here's why that could be devastating: **The question of who gets counted plays a critical role in how state legislative and congressional maps get drawn, and how the federal budget is allocated.** That's why honest, statistically-minded officials have always been in charge of the rules.
What Trump's Project 2025 is trying to do is reshape our country by dramatically altering the census — whether it be for redistricting, or simply allocating funds from the government.
**This movement successfully protected the census during Trump’s first term — and we know that with you by our side, we can protect our democracy once again.**
**[So please, rush a $30 donation to the NDRC today to power our democracy-saving work nationwide.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101564326/526345765/-1665762292?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TodayCensusRR_email_20250204-NDRC-Tier1-TodayCensusRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250204-NDRC-Tier1-TodayCensusRR_&utm_campaign=TodayCensusRR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY3YjU1MjJhLTU0ZTMtZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTdlOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=P2qPkstc-yh4dgjucdCZ2ZOC2LYOmYo5OqdNXTo22mo=)**

— The NDRC Team

clean_body: The best thing you can do right now is rush a $30 donation to the NDRC to help power our democracy-saving work. | Peter, the Trump administration is attacking our government from the inside out to enact their MAGA agenda. One of the latest targets: the U.S. Census Bureau. Since late last week, the bureau has experienced significant setbacks that hurt its ability to operate effectively as a nonpartisan statistical agency. And that hurts our ability to have a fair count in the census that leads to fair maps. First, Census Bureau Director Robert Santos, the renowned data expert who has led the Census Bureau for years, abruptly announced his resignation, which paves the path for Trump to appoint a right-wing, partisan replacement. Next, the bureau’s website started going dark for periods of time. The New York Times reported that “more than 3,000 pages from the Census Bureau, the vast majority of which are articles filed under research and methodology,” were affected. Other missing pages include data stewardship policies and documentation for several data sets and surveys.” It’s an ambush in broad daylight, and these attacks only strengthen and demonstrate the power of the Trump administration to undermine and politicize the agency. Trump and his allies are counting on us being too distracted by all of their other attacks on our democracy to notice what they’re doing here. It's absolutely critical that we show them that we're paying attention and that our nationwide grassroots movement is powerful. The NDRC is doing everything possible to defeat these radical attacks on the census and our democracy.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = These attacks are all ripped straight out of the Project 2025 playbook, which calls for installing hyper-partisan officials to decide who gets counted and who doesn't. Here's why that could be devastating: The question of who gets counted plays a critical role in how state legislative and congressional maps get drawn, and how the federal budget is allocated. That's why honest, statistically-minded officials have always been in charge of the rules. What Trump's Project 2025 is trying to do is reshape our country by dramatically altering the census — whether it be for redistricting, or simply allocating funds from the government. This movement successfully protected the census during Trump’s first term — and we know that with you by our side, we can protect our democracy once again. = We really can’t overstate how important this is — and how much we need your help right now. — The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

| | Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees – the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers – who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left......the deep-state. And, before President Trump even takes office, Everett Kelly and the other proponents of “unionized government” are making the rounds in the media attacking President Trump, attacking Elon Musk, attacking Vivek Ramaswamy, and conspiring with the outgoing Biden administration to extend collective bargaining agreements (an attempt to tie President trump’s hands on this issue for the next two years). **[**That is why the results of this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS will be tabulated and delivered to the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3bde227a80184d8fb63505d2a6e83a3a&_e=OuUWX9O0cWqoSGa2VJhzsoqLUeTXcVcgXR8h2M9RlHsLwP1me_8SymrJh1jegxMTMuZhvjdorXAsz1EHJlyPlxpqxSQ6caKL_Q6rj8OXq9MgPqGJI9EWZE-gOVFRlbDTRBJJkadBewmQI77lIiQWoi8oJlkob7wf3IHbrwsSc9YPnLrk-yWt81QNFZ87JD_2k4HV0_Gp1RBIk76Mqc2P2bSp_XDZriv3schodAdiwvbsob-hZDfp__iZPE4BtsHA2teEGwnlZI2uEVdqRmcPnL_xkgUWuDzHTFpB8MYsA7AMPiEj3xz2PO0jZ7DziQvP_PlhaPYmWtqEON8Pb-YPXyNTbFbb2h46PrWuCAnmCLiMJ8TEGZlEn8v2CsBVCvBgLnjAhCeMEMtTsVg-E4F7hmUUU9OVn5manTuxJ1074HM%3D)** Your participation is of the utmost importance.
---
* _Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%._
* _Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies?_
* _Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year?_
* _Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average?_
* _What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee?_

---
These are the questions on part one of the **[**NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3bde227a80184d8fb63505d2a6e83a3a&_e=OuUWX9O0cWqoSGa2VJhzsoqLUeTXcVcgXR8h2M9RlHsLwP1me_8SymrJh1jegxMTMuZhvjdorXAsz1EHJlyPlxpqxSQ6caKL_Q6rj8OXq9MgPqGJI9EWZE-gOVFRlbDTRBJJkadBewmQI77lIiQWoi8oJlkob7wf3IHbrwsSc9YPnLrk-yWt81QNFZ87JD_2k4HV0_Gp1RBIk76Mqc2P2bSp_XDZriv3schodAdiwvbsob-hZDfp__iZPE4BtsHA2teEGwnlZI2uEVdqRmcPnA4kvw1_ABgdhEWx87Uuf_7NwZ4TvmoLtjfl9Z1rtqtp5AElF59kaEwD_fGgnCUe9Kwwxbsfgvxi_DAVMMiCO6sYR6coVF9dhcMFw5GrHgBMJmFNHffkXpZYd0CNK79fICgRxKKcZaMBWlbiC0BNMSY%3D)** And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servant”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration.
---
* _Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government?_
* _Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch?_
* _Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service?_
* _Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats?_

---
You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... _Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. _And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky’s “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. Today, I’m asking you to join the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. **[**Your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS is the key to reaffirming this mandate by demonstrating the consensus that exists to remove the obstructionist deep-state.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3bde227a80184d8fb63505d2a6e83a3a&_e=OuUWX9O0cWqoSGa2VJhzsoqLUeTXcVcgXR8h2M9RlHsLwP1me_8SymrJh1jegxMTMuZhvjdorXAsz1EHJlyPlxpqxSQ6caKL_Q6rj8OXq9MgPqGJI9EWZE-gOVFRlbDTRBJJkadBewmQI77lIiQWoi8oJlkob7wf3IHbrwsSc9YPnLrk-yWt81QNFZ87JD_2k4HV0_Gp1RBIk76Mqc2P2bSp_XDZriv3schodAdiwvbsob-hZDfp__iZPE4BtsHA2teEGwnlZI2uEVdqRmcPnLuEN2fdC6dcgZUsB1PRK5LruZviIDnDP_nXcn8TlfX3MzQaGNJI2O82oYDfbQvoRJtSBIKeQXkdVNzSMG2KcbA1X6rXjv0IPaTt5l_93jBnOmjQ3zxIa0vfjDIFlcoJ_nydvOsBjI_GXhMXzg5er-A%3D)** Please complete it as soon as possible. There’s no time to lose.The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it _never_ will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk, Vivek Ramaswamy, and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. **[That’s why I’m asking you to complete your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS without delay.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=3bde227a80184d8fb63505d2a6e83a3a&_e=OuUWX9O0cWqoSGa2VJhzsoqLUeTXcVcgXR8h2M9RlHsLwP1me_8SymrJh1jegxMTMuZhvjdorXAsz1EHJlyPlxpqxSQ6caKL_Q6rj8OXq9MgPqGJI9EWZE-gOVFRlbDTRBJJkadBewmQI77lIiQWoi8oJlkob7wf3IHbrwsSc9YPnLrk-yWt81QNFZ87JD_2k4HV0_Gp1RBIk76Mqc2P2bSp_XDZriv3schodAdiwvbsob-hZDfp__iZPE4BtsHA2teEGwnlZI2uEVdqRmcPnP3VwR7gL3TLd0uKSA9DDU1_w7BzRUCPmO6eGjcD6jWb4Cc3Pm0APxTXVcLKJ4XH6TcdhzgsdUaCgcu03rZS5pBXwtIYkQsY8ewcAVh5uSGpPCwGKNl0fOytzipZGpxovQPeJcklZGjkQhCpb2a76NQ%3D)** And that’s why **I’m also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35** when you do. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.**That said, if you can send a larger contribution – $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000, or more – it will supercharge this campaign.** I want you to know that the Freedom Center will maximize every dollar you contribute. We’ve had “woke” corporations and financial institutions conspire to “de-bank” and “de-platform” us before:
---
* They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on).
* We had to find a new bank after the local bank we’ve been at for years suddenly closed our accounts.
* The hotel we’ve held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly declined to renew our contract.

---
You see, because of our effectiveness in fighting for conservative principles, they hate us. Like President Trump, we’ve faced countless lies, leaks, and lawfare attempts from the Left. But I refuse to back down.Especially against the wasteful, constitution-subverting unions that make up the federal deep-state. So please hurry. With your support today, I’m confident we can win this fight.
---
Sincerely,

clean_body: Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees – the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers – who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left...| | | ...the deep-state | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I’d be willing to bet you’ve never heard of Everett Kelly before.He’s not a member of Congress. He’s not a governor.He doesn’t hold elected office of any kind.And that’s the problem. | | | Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees – the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers – who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left......the deep-state. And, before President Trump even takes office, Everett Kelly and the other proponents of “unionized government” are making the rounds in the media attacking President Trump, attacking Elon Musk, attacking Vivek Ramaswamy, and conspiring with the outgoing Biden administration to extend collective bargaining agreements (an attempt to tie President trump’s hands on this issue for the next two years). Your participation is of the utmost importance. Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%. Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies? Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year? Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average? What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee? These are the questions on part one of the And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servant”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration. Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government? Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch? Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service? Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats? You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky’s “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. Today, I’m asking you to join the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. Please complete it as soon as possible. There’s no time to lose.The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it never will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk, Vivek Ramaswamy, and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. And that’s why I’m also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 when you do. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.That said, if you can send a larger contribution – $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000, or more – it will supercharge this campaign. I want you to know that the Freedom Center will maximize every dollar you contribute. We’ve had “woke” corporations and financial institutions conspire to “de-bank” and “de-platform” us before: They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on). We had to find a new bank after the local bank we’ve been at for years suddenly closed our accounts. The hotel we’ve held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly declined to renew our contract. You see, because of our effectiveness in fighting for conservative principles, they hate us. Like President Trump, we’ve faced countless lies, leaks, and lawfare attempts from the Left. But I refuse to back down.Especially against the wasteful, constitution-subverting unions that make up the federal deep-state. So please hurry. With your support today, I’m confident we can win this fight. Sincerely, | | David Horowitz P.S. At the start of my email, I mentioned Everett Kelly and the 800,000 members of the American Federation of Government Employees union. According to their website: “ On average, AFGE members pay between $18 - $22 per pay period for union dues.” | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | P.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | | ---|---

name: Working Families Party
subject: How to stop Russ Vought
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, We have an opportunity to stop the man behind Project 2025 and Trump’s federal spending freeze1 — but we need your help today. **Russ Vought, an author of Project 2025 and an extremist Christian nationalist in the pocket of billionaires, has been nominated by Trump to lead the federal Office of Management and Budget.** The vote to confirm him is scheduled for this week, so we need to send a loud and clear message to our Senators right away that a vote for Russ Vought would be a vote against their constituents. The _most effective way_ to reach your Senators right now is to call their office — so we’ve set up an easy tool to help you do that! **Text OMB to 30403 to be connected to your Senators’ office and receive some tips on how to tell them to vote NO on Russ Vought.** Not able to make a call? **[Send an email to your Senators in just a few clicks.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJXZSBEmBl6LD5rUPgG458qy5Yn2b7km8cdhpy1xTY8n7xjzGDTqCzi-EXeNKi1ilwuS-nfYjVTKvDzG6F5HujiKJLoZZixC-RZHffcKFM8ET_-dqsuv10fqArmufkdKgFdDyU7P0Pi_C90YZVklYCxCtFruwMkD6VtqFUGvkZlFGssfhfhJab9d6N9o8CRIRHs4aIKqsZ0zGhfmXOJlfgy39TEGYN3YNrz2jBqxW7L8AjcNQyuX0ze0Fn6Nqa47Szy7DAzSnL32P3gkv92gW0I/4dr/lGVmHmtWScGTUXmXwqZtlQ/h0/h001.EUIEylxW5wyO96dlgk-YJgbxSKuY0N1mbK3lFf43nLo)** **[Tell your Senators: NO on Vought](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJXZSBEmBl6LD5rUPgG458qy5Yn2b7km8cdhpy1xTY8n7xjzGDTqCzi-EXeNKi1ilwuS-nfYjVTKvDzG6F5HujiKJLoZZixC-RZHffcKFM8ET_-dqsuv10fqArmufkdKgHaTBwpdSBG_pif--LglFvyHnbVMjFPIadIWIniMVvZ0Gd1MwNSjLO44hubcNZJ2Ro1u4xdpPnwoqBQIZUfJ4FPPGSucWQawCGI9_XBO411B0JSZ-uaImzMH2txc2T-dojCreiZl63znGCUn5eI4Yn9/4dr/lGVmHmtWScGTUXmXwqZtlQ/h1/h001.fDluQ2GrnngTdW0Kzsp1eJfRpgWGbRpCozK4Cpj-gfs)** Russ Vought as OMB Director would be a disaster — for the people who rely on crucial government programs, as well as for our democracy itself. Just last week, with _no_ official power, Vought led the effort to freeze federal spending, throwing programs from Medicaid to free school lunches to support for homeless veterans into chaos.2 With the power of the OMB, he would enact even more of the anti-worker, anti-family policies in his Project 2025 plan. He also has a dangerous disregard for the separation of powers that keeps our government in check. Vought has made it clear that he feels the OMB can “turn on and off any spending” by the federal government, ignoring the legal requirement to dispense the funds that Congress has appropriated.3 In 2024, he even published an article stating, “We are living in a post-Constitutional time.” 4 We need to stop Vought’s nomination to lead such an important federal office. Can we count on you to help today? **Get connected to your Senators’ offices by texting OMB to 30403 today.** **[Or click here to send an email demanding that your representatives vote NO on Russ Vought.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJXZSBEmBl6LD5rUPgG458qy5Yn2b7km8cdhpy1xTY8n7xjzGDTqCzi-EXeNKi1ilwuS-nfYjVTKvDzG6F5HujiKJLoZZixC-RZHffcKFM8ET_-dqsuv10fqArmufkdKgHpDPvewN7C8QuZ6PIRmrB0ErRiWl0n8sFrA7BRJDF_OSfzH78RUwSorQU1Innu62mD0_rSKryGz1NrIp8MKROGELdK2tSpNXb6KtBRpIC-LpZQml_g1DXvfw1WHXxVm2hCxrHkkoKNd8xsWM-4vPbq/4dr/lGVmHmtWScGTUXmXwqZtlQ/h2/h001.tc0XCZf34H3E-bRdTjOW0aYjBk9r05_aKrx1Qmjy658)** **[Tell your Senators: NO on Vought](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRJXZSBEmBl6LD5rUPgG458qy5Yn2b7km8cdhpy1xTY8n7xjzGDTqCzi-EXeNKi1ilwuS-nfYjVTKvDzG6F5HujiKJLoZZixC-RZHffcKFM8ET_-dqsuv10fqArmufkdKgFjSA4cM61OzxUdIR4UTnVcdxjbwHs8tIqweCC9q63HVsWvkSuW3K2gTKZLfDgWKWNiLXPLNZIfTIek_zcE_QhvJFAo9LNMPGptMTyotOqoC4aajOgcL9CfJRSYGa98zzV-nuEjkkPK6JdxQlVMIW-o/4dr/lGVmHmtWScGTUXmXwqZtlQ/h3/h001.IXhAtfBO6OaPNbjWXdIe1oPB1VE6nSHpk-tvOfmZIUA)** In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. clean_body: | | | Peter, We have an opportunity to stop the man behind Project 2025 and Trump’s federal spending freeze1 — but we need your help today. Russ Vought, an author of Project 2025 and an extremist Christian nationalist in the pocket of billionaires, has been nominated by Trump to lead the federal Office of Management and Budget. The vote to confirm him is scheduled for this week, so we need to send a loud and clear message to our Senators right away that a vote for Russ Vought would be a vote against their constituents. The most effective way to reach your Senators right now is to call their office — so we’ve set up an easy tool to help you do that! Text OMB to 30403 to be connected to your Senators’ office and receive some tips on how to tell them to vote NO on Russ Vought. Not able to make a call? Russ Vought as OMB Director would be a disaster — for the people who rely on crucial government programs, as well as for our democracy itself. Just last week, with no official power, Vought led the effort to freeze federal spending, throwing programs from Medicaid to free school lunches to support for homeless veterans into chaos.2 With the power of the OMB, he would enact even more of the anti-worker, anti-family policies in his Project 2025 plan. He also has a dangerous disregard for the separation of powers that keeps our government in check. Vought has made it clear that he feels the OMB can “turn on and off any spending” by the federal government, ignoring the legal requirement to dispense the funds that Congress has appropriated.3 In 2024, he even published an article stating, “We are living in a post-Constitutional time.” 4 We need to stop Vought’s nomination to lead such an important federal office. Can we count on you to help today? Get connected to your Senators’ offices by texting OMB to 30403 today. In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , The Washington Post, 1/29/25 2\. , NBC News, 1/28/25 3\. , Politico, 1/29/25 4\. , The American Mind, 9/29/22 Thoughts? Feedback? name: Josh Harder
subject: Elon Musk’s power grab
body:
I’m fighting back.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101564666/526350601/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzJmZmM1NWYtNTVlMy1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=S4mwMBtuTeoN8zC2muD1ZokY3fxjAo9dgYDhDDL_rAw=) | Peter, I’m writing to talk about something very serious. This weekend Elon Musk took unprecedented and unconstitutional steps to interfere with our federal agencies. Over the past few days Musk has undermined the federal workforce and now has unauthorized access to sensitive taxpayer and personal data. This includes the private information of everyone currently receiving Social Security and Medicare benefits. His actions were so extreme the highest ranking official at the Treasury Department has resigned. **This is not just troubling — it’s a crisis. An unelected billionaire does not have the Constitutional power to undermine our federal government and it’s vital that we fight back.** I’m taking two important actions right now to combat this overreach. The first is immediately protecting public funds and tightening restrictions on who can access sensitive government data. The second is we need to safeguard the federal payment systems that provide benefits for millions of Americans. I am supporting legislation to stop unlawful access to the Department of Treasury’s Bureau of the Fiscal Service, which processes payments for Social Security and Medicare. **This isn’t about politics, this is about an unconstitutional power grab and to be frank, Democrats need to step up and fight back. We can’t allow anyone — especially Elon Musk — to put Americans’ personal information and security at risk.** [_**I’m starting a petition to show how widespread the public outcry is. Please join me in showing we WILL NOT STAND for this unconstitutional power grab.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101564667/526350602/1732929824?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzJmZmM1NWYtNTVlMy1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=S4mwMBtuTeoN8zC2muD1ZokY3fxjAo9dgYDhDDL_rAw=&emci=f1974958-41e3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=c2ffc55f-55e3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=6455652) Thank you for raising your voice, \- Josh
---
* * *

name: Bonta HQ
subject: Trump and Musk’s hostile takeover
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250204-1&t=1&akid=1623%2E1088799%2EK5pxw_)
You're receiving this message because you have supported Democrats in the past. **Rob Bonta is fighting for justice and progress for all as California's Attorney General.** If you want to stop receiving emails from us, [click here](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1623%2E1088799%2EK5pxw_).
---
The richest man on the planet, who is a private citizen and not an elected official, is wreaking havoc and executing a rapid, hostile takeover of the federal government with President Donald Trump’s blessing.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250204?refcode=em20250204-1623&amount=5&refcode2=1623_1088799_K5pxw_&akid=1623%2E1088799%2EK5pxw_)
This week, billionaire Elon Musk and his team of 19 to 24-year-old aides:
* Acquired full access to the Treasury Department’s payment systems despite their lack of proper security clearance;
* Threatened to shut down the U.S. Agency for International Development (USAID) while locking the agency’s employees out of their office and computers;
* Offered all federal employees a “buyout” that promises pay through September 30 for workers who resign their current government roles by February 6 and pursue “more productive” work in the private sector.

This isn’t normal, but our Attorney General is on top of it. **Yesterday, Rob joined a coalition of 12 attorneys general to warn federal workers about Trump and Musk’s questionable “deferred resignation” program.**
He pointed out that this supposed buyout is a clear attack aimed at dismantling our federal workforce and sowing chaos for Americans who rely on a functioning government. **Rob urges federal employees to heed warnings from their unions to be very cautious of any buyout offers.**
Know that as we navigate these uncertain times and attempted attacks from the far-right MAGA administration, Rob is doing everything he can to fight back where necessary and stand up for California’s working families, including federal employees.
**[With so much on the Attorney General’s plate, will you fuel our people-powered campaign with a contribution of $5 or more to keep Rob focused on the work instead of fundraising?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250204?refcode=em20250204-1623&amount=5&refcode2=1623_1088799_K5pxw_&akid=1623%2E1088799%2EK5pxw_)**

Thanks for all you do to support Rob as he fights for all of us,
Bonta HQ

name: Tim Walz
subject: Elon Musk is a terrible president.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
A billionaire tech mogul shouldn’t be running our government, but that’s exactly what’s happening. President Trump handed Musk the keys to the federal bureaucracy, and now he wants to slash essential programs, gut protections for working families, and make life even harder for everyday Americans—all while making sure the ultra-wealthy keep getting richer.

Team,

I promise I won’t send you an email every time Donald Trump does something reckless or ludicrous. (Let’s be honest, that would be too many to handle.)

But after last week’s federal funding freeze, I had to reach out.

name: Devin for Progress
subject: Two Great Events: Let's make some noise! 🥳
body:
I'm attending two great events Wednesday. Come plug into community and say hi!

| | | | | |
---
[](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=ad3e229610&e=10cc7d1928)
| | | | |
---
| Hi Peter,I’m attending two important events tomorrow (2/5) with an organization I highly recommend, Indivisible. Both events are great opportunities to plug into community and make some noise if you are in the Puget Sound area.
Please, come say hi if you attend!
At Noon with Snohomish Indivisible[**https://www.mobilize.us/snohomishcountyindi.../event/752961/**](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=0656638640&e=10cc7d1928)
And at 6:30pm with Seattle Indivisible[**https://www.mobilize.us/mobilize/event/750010/**](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=d51aa9a7f7&e=10cc7d1928)
Finding community is job #1 in fighting back and we’re seeing a surge of people joining together across America to stop Trump’s attack on our Democracy.
Hope to see you there! \- Devin
P.S. [**Click here to see our list of 15 “Hope Hero” organizations and find your place in this movement**!](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=561bff5257&e=10cc7d1928)

---
|
_There’s an adage a historian once called ‘a law of history,’ true of every society across the ages. The adage is: ‘Only when it is dark enough, can you see the stars.’_ \- Kamala Harris

name: DNC HQ
subject: We are not powerless:
body:
---
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?refcode=em_20250204_2699_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2699_22930333_O51knq&akid=2699%2E22930333%2EO51knq) We know your inbox is probably crowded, so we’ll keep this brief, Derek (we promise, just 60 seconds). Here’s where things stand: A new Trump presidency has begun. Trump and his extreme, billionaire allies in Congress and his Cabinet are hard at work passing destructive executive orders and legislation. Their plans threaten the very foundations of our democracy. But we are not powerless. Millions of people voted against Trump and his allies. There are millions of us — across the country — who won’t stand idly by and let Trump and a Republican-controlled Congress do whatever they want. We can — _and will_ — fight back against Trump and his allies’ Project 2025 agenda. But to do that, we’ll need a strong, organized Democratic Party leading the way. But this work requires a massive amount of resources. **That’s why we need your help today, Derek.** The Democratic National Committee is the organization best positioned to move resources to the places they’re needed most in 2025, 2026, and beyond as we work to elect the Democrats who will be a check on Trump’s power. [**If holding Trump accountable and electing Democrats at every level matters to you, we’re asking you to chip in $3 today to help:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250204_2699_fr&refcode2=2699_22930333_O51knq&akid=2699%2E22930333%2EO51knq) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250204_2699_fr&refcode2=2699_22930333_O51knq&akid=2699%2E22930333%2EO51knq)**

The Democrats

If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you for everything, The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

body:
President Trump has surrendered control of our government to the richest man in the world, Elon Musk.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101565044/526367172/-840760079?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-02-04_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTViNjI3MS01YWUzLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o8n6ybghwOIEPgIgAQgy5Yd4WKHTIr32O7FPRdv2nR4=)

| Peter,

We’re facing a direct attack on our democracy. President Trump has surrendered control of our government to the richest man in the world, Elon Musk.

**Let me be absolutely clear: an unelected billionaire, much less the richest man in the world, should NOT have the power to manipulate the system for his personal gain.**

The president has now allowed Elon Musk _**UNILATERAL**_ access to Treasury payments for Social Security, Medicare, and so much more – all to line his own pockets. This is an unprecedented constitutional crisis, and Congress can’t sit idly by as our democratic institutions and public funds are decimated by a couple of billionaires.

I’m using every lever I can access to stop this. Now, I’m calling on the few Republicans left who care about the rule of law, democracy, and Congress’s oversight authority to join Democrats in opposing this constitutional overreach.

[_**Peter, if you’re with me, I hope you’ll consider donating whatever you can to my campaign as we work to mobilize and fight back. name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Please, let me introduce myself.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND
body:
As a successful College Football coach, I want you to understand why I entered into politics
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=6cace277aa434100b4d6dfbcbcb02d0a&_e=KJNNe2tPil6mzRvRNIP6ytPDeV3byFHMdiExFKoOBo2l7Pl65U4pqx6xda21xc6y-VyOJNN4dAf43h5-MI6uQZ2OiuxTSxBViXpUCR8jLCqAiv-wxMje-1FHY23xfSVVLuwhiLp-3EYLQTBt8cXYTGObVcJF6uXQootjkP-ApDyYYN7G57ivDezG3toV-oAvrqb5Zrx20mJOk5yxC97cJ-y31jkYDuQrtUyYgI5-_t9RfcOMOsRMbKxV20Hxie8zicHgetFLxHXOjw1k53x4V5tboYJWLdxPYChpwixw0-6_CX2yHTNpohSRrDWGpg1p1x0BjtU-uhuPGNulvMPhTw%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

It's me, Tommy Tuberville.

Throughout my life, I've been called many names. Whether it's Coach, Dad, Husband, or Senator, I've always led by example for the people who depend on me.

**This email is a little longer.** [**I 'm humbly asking you to read it through and consider donating to my re-election campaign for the United States Senate when you're finished.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=6cace277aa434100b4d6dfbcbcb02d0a&_e=KJNNe2tPil6mzRvRNIP6ytPDeV3byFHMdiExFKoOBo2l7Pl65U4pqx6xda21xc6y-VyOJNN4dAf43h5-MI6uQZ2OiuxTSxBViXpUCR8jLCqAiv-wxMje-1FHY23xfSVVLuwhiLp-3EYLQTBt8cXYTGObVcJF6uXQootjkP-ApDyYYN7G57ivDezG3toV-oAvlYYuWSS8h7ZtEzX3BSPfz9jQSnhbu5HAhN1qmla4bVIFtsD25dLTXbfGii-I6HzyyynDGZZppnva3yyqjzCfpYCIzRca1YLkUUcxRRsyLklj-m_NJYF5DcKzjGiS7-i5NDS7xGoXpRv95KU5Z-orJw%3D%3D)

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=6cace277aa434100b4d6dfbcbcb02d0a&_e=KJNNe2tPil6mzRvRNIP6ytPDeV3byFHMdiExFKoOBo2l7Pl65U4pqx6xda21xc6y-VyOJNN4dAf43h5-MI6uQZ2OiuxTSxBViXpUCR8jLCqAiv-wxMje-1FHY23xfSVVLuwhiLp-3EYLQTBt8cXYTGObVcJF6uXQootjkP-ApDyYYN7G57ivDezG3toV-oAvMGz_BzwTjj0lDqRI86XWRQoAzx-UPFLN7zFg3u6zW0ohRwhggb1Fprd2u_dAdkra4VBkljQgI51p6HPNi7vJhGgSrIe7jHTKl9LDGwLhu9p-KQM2c95qreITb9FsREIqBTkEU0ycMzregCgbkEIfug%3D%3D)
I was born in Camden, Arkansas as the third of three children to my parents, Olive and Charles Tuberville. They raised me to always work hard and stand on principle, which I've brought with me in every step of my life.

I met my wife, Suzanne, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans in 1989. We married just three years later and have two amazing children together, Tucker and Troy. They continue to make me proud every single day.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=6cace277aa434100b4d6dfbcbcb02d0a&_e=KJNNe2tPil6mzRvRNIP6ytPDeV3byFHMdiExFKoOBo2l7Pl65U4pqx6xda21xc6y-VyOJNN4dAf43h5-MI6uQZ2OiuxTSxBViXpUCR8jLCqAiv-wxMje-1FHY23xfSVVLuwhiLp-3EYLQTBt8cXYTGObVcJF6uXQootjkP-ApDyYYN7G57ivDezG3toV-oAvLtnoq8Z6TbbvhTt00dLh_cG4Mu1zIkusWWHDJZTCPDlCSrJcD4BLTmSckhZeY3e-67uaaTID6YWIFIhAWIRXlfu3ZtgGKlfsRixSIV9vwFt1Hf3n22_75NyEqi44d4gDejTXhkKqwovEqNXwmVkiOg%3D%3D)
After graduating from SAU, I took my first coaching job at Hermitage High School before graduating to the college level as an assistant coach at Arkansas State University.

Just two years later, I started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, where I went on to become their defensive coordinator. By the time I left the U, we had created one of the most storied programs in college football history. We won three AP national championships, and I coached future Hall-of-Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=6cace277aa434100b4d6dfbcbcb02d0a&_e=KJNNe2tPil6mzRvRNIP6ytPDeV3byFHMdiExFKoOBo2l7Pl65U4pqx6xda21xc6y-VyOJNN4dAf43h5-MI6uQZ2OiuxTSxBViXpUCR8jLCqAiv-wxMje-1FHY23xfSVVLuwhiLp-3EYLQTBt8cXYTGObVcJF6uXQootjkP-ApDyYYN7G57ivDezG3toV-oAvOFQ-ZnFZhEL36dlDnGyD0FPmDpDbry7_KB9qY7Bz5jN9N8ydNpBpdijtLWtWj4pXYVLxdY7KeHCeg1rTsge6vD72asAXNymUDy-rJt1F9uWuMaXMBRQVyKhx76GO8pXKa5FXZ-CV1XZG8-sVO_11EQ%3D%3D)
I spent a short stint as the head coach for Ole Miss before becoming the head coach for the Auburn Tigers in 1998. I solidified my career there, making eight consecutive bowl appearances, winning five SEC Western Division Titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004 when I was named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year, among other awards.

I continued coaching at Texas Tech University and the University of Cincinnati until I retired from coaching in 2016 as one of the top 50 most-winning college football coaches of all time. But I wasn't done winning just yet.

**In 2020, I went from Coach Tuberville to Senator Tuberville. After talking to my fellow Alabamians, I was enlightened by President Trump's concerns about the direction of our country, and I decided to do something about it. I ran for the United States Senate and won.**

Throughout my first term in office, I've been fighting non-stop on President Trump's behalf. Whether it was fighting back against the countless witch-hunts or challenging the Biden-Harris Administration's Radical and harmful policies, I always worked hard and stood on principle, just like my folks taught me at a young age.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=6cace277aa434100b4d6dfbcbcb02d0a&_e=KJNNe2tPil6mzRvRNIP6ytPDeV3byFHMdiExFKoOBo2l7Pl65U4pqx6xda21xc6y-VyOJNN4dAf43h5-MI6uQZ2OiuxTSxBViXpUCR8jLCqAiv-wxMje-1FHY23xfSVVLuwhiLp-3EYLQTBt8cXYTGObVcJF6uXQootjkP-ApDyYYN7G57ivDezG3toV-oAvOLm2obi4YrW2oa1OXwinneqY82lVUI8kQoLg8NtOaVYeWck0Xe_BNzZF_hvn4_zzvoOm6TGtoDpjuzrltpO6qLEAd3CyV7WJfwB0NcC7YZwDLce-QB8mmCi0vu7kOkvorCF2s9K5fa8YAbOgfi-YVQ%3D%3D)
**Now, I 'm running for re-election in the 2026 Midterm Elections.**

The Radical Left has circled me as one of their top targets to defeat in 2026. They're going to spend MILLIONS of dollars trying to beat me. But if coaching in the SEC has taught me one thing, it's this: there will always be a rival trying to bring you down, but with hard work and a strong team, you can go 13-0.

**I 'm looking to go 2-0 in my lifetime as a Senate candidate, and I need your help.**

[**Peter, can you chip in just $10 before midnight to give my campaign the resources we need to defeat the Radical Left and retain President Trump 's Senate Majority?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=6cace277aa434100b4d6dfbcbcb02d0a&_e=KJNNe2tPil6mzRvRNIP6ytPDeV3byFHMdiExFKoOBo2l7Pl65U4pqx6xda21xc6y-VyOJNN4dAf43h5-MI6uQZ2OiuxTSxBViXpUCR8jLCqAiv-wxMje-1FHY23xfSVVLuwhiLp-3EYLQTBt8cXYTGObVcJF6uXQootjkP-ApDyYYN7G57ivDezG3toV-oAvQGZG1yuJZ73-HRNgym-8cvIJcB07y6CRsQcdQMtMPFnXuPF81aXZZ7UlPFnccKPsU0fFiDC60fIEfC1L1tZfKwb7AlOGPTzGzLYPebhGonU5UkQ2Ce60Kj8XeRoS-FAV5B-Zqtu2am4iHdXWE-wpLA%3D%3D)

I won't take up more of your time.

[**Thank you for reading this all the way through, and please consider donating any amount to help!**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=6cace277aa434100b4d6dfbcbcb02d0a&_e=KJNNe2tPil6mzRvRNIP6ytPDeV3byFHMdiExFKoOBo2l7Pl65U4pqx6xda21xc6y-VyOJNN4dAf43h5-MI6uQZ2OiuxTSxBViXpUCR8jLCqAiv-wxMje-1FHY23xfSVVLuwhiLp-3EYLQTBt8cXYTGObVcJF6uXQootjkP-ApDyYYN7G57ivDezG3toV-oAvLxOJ3WWCX1sDssjptXgA_XvLa_U4_NYVCWSuzgEv1HeROyF_Hxze8bcHOWuRC4AMIZgLX9sZA9oumU6NmjkrgEZ81cR3jjV-rPcuLWnNUSaMT0birF4jLfx45ynBlMfU1FZLsY1duqCEa1LMMNtB1Q%3D%3D)

Best,
Coach Tuberville

| [](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=6cace277aa434100b4d6dfbcbcb02d0a&_e=KJNNe2tPil6mzRvRNIP6ytPDeV3byFHMdiExFKoOBo2l7Pl65U4pqx6xda21xc6y-VyOJNN4dAf43h5-MI6uQZ2OiuxTSxBViXpUCR8jLCqAiv-wxMje-1FHY23xfSVVLuwhiLp-3EYLQTBt8cXYTGObVcJF6uXQootjkP-ApDyYYN7G57ivDezG3toV-oAvEekQyhOCxECafFMndqZXlYLiPuZcFqes4hV8ncaj7HFSJ0GqlFxOsyV7t6Ka9dhJbmqXHg7G8gdhRPGjU2wYGXEdfUFEpiLg8tGxCkvjNgasw1J2K4bsctAblweHz3yJJ1JlhsT1c-BK8SYZLML19Q%3D%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

clean_body: As a successful College Football coach, I want you to understand why I entered into politics | Peter, It's me, Tommy Tuberville. Throughout my life, I've been called many names. Whether it's Coach, Dad, Husband, or Senator, I've always led by example for the people who depend on me. This email is a little longer. I was born in Camden, Arkansas as the third of three children to my parents, Olive and Charles Tuberville. They raised me to always work hard and stand on principle, which I've brought with me in every step of my life. I met my wife, Suzanne, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans in 1989. We married just three years later and have two amazing children together, Tucker and Troy. They continue to make me proud every single day. After graduating from SAU, I took my first coaching job at Hermitage High School before graduating to the college level as an assistant coach at Arkansas State University. Just two years later, I started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, where I went on to become their defensive coordinator. By the time I left the U, we had created one of the most storied programs in college football history. We won three AP national championships, and I coached future Hall-of-Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. I spent a short stint as the head coach for Ole Miss before becoming the head coach for the Auburn Tigers in 1998. I solidified my career there, making eight consecutive bowl appearances, winning five SEC Western Division Titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004 when I was named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year, among other awards. I continued coaching at Texas Tech University and the University of Cincinnati until I retired from coaching in 2016 as one of the top 50 most-winning college football coaches of all time. But I wasn't done winning just yet. In 2020, I went from Coach Tuberville to Senator Tuberville. After talking to my fellow Alabamians, I was enlightened by President Trump's concerns about the direction of our country, and I decided to do something about it. I ran for the United States Senate and won. Throughout my first term in office, I've been fighting non-stop on President Trump's behalf. Whether it was fighting back against the countless witch-hunts or challenging the Biden-Harris Administration's Radical and harmful policies, I always worked hard and stood on principle, just like my folks taught me at a young age. Now, I 'm running for re-election in the 2026 Midterm Elections. The Radical Left has circled me as one of their top targets to defeat in 2026. They're going to spend MILLIONS of dollars trying to beat me. But if coaching in the SEC has taught me one thing, it's this: there will always be a rival trying to bring you down, but with hard work and a strong team, you can go 13-0. I 'm looking to go 2-0 in my lifetime as a Senate candidate, and I need your help. I won't take up more of your time. Best, Coach Tuberville | Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? With margins so tight in the House we have room to work, Team. We can stop these bills and more like them but we need to unite and fight now, before they get momentum and the House starts checking vote-suppressing bills off their to-do list
RUSH $25 or more right now as the new Congress starts to help defend our right to vote and stop opponents of voting rights in their tracks >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=020425_3&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020425_3&amount=25]
Truthout: Republicans Plan to Revive Legislative Attacks on Voting Rights [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=020425_3&amount=25]
This is the consequence of opponents of voting rights controlling both houses of Congress and the White House, folks:
A key House lawmaker made clear in an interview that the vote suppressors plan to push for a pair of their voting-related bills when they take control of both chambers of Congress and the White House this month. They plan to bring forward both the American Confidence in Elections (ACE) Act and the Safeguard American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act.
“ As we look to the new year with unified Republican government, we have a real opportunity to move these pieces of legislation not only out of committee, but across the House floor and into law, ” he said.
The ACE ACT " would nationalize harmful and unnecessary restrictions on voting rights, " while the SAVE Act -- which narrowly passed the House in 2024 and was stopped in the Senate -- requires proof of U.S. citizenship to vote in federal elections, which is something you already need, since non-citizen voting is illegal, and adds onerous verification requirements intended to drive off eligible voters.
Team, we have to keep working to stop these bills and more in this Congress. The margins are so thin and every bit helps as we hold our representatives accountable for their votes. Pitch in $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=020425_3&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Fire Elon Musk.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

An unelected billionaire now has seemingly unchecked power,
Peter.

Elon Musk, the richest person on the planet, is creating total chaos and
threatening to remake our federal government as we know it.

Over the last week, Musk and his team of 19 to 24-year-old stooges have
gained unfettered access to Americans’ sensitive data and Treasury
Department payment systems, threatened to abolish the U.S. Agency for
International Development (USAID) while locking agency employees out of
their offices and computers, and pressured all federal workers to quit
their jobs within the next two days in order to receive a buyout.

They’re doing all of this without proper security clearance and under the
guise of DOGE, an agency that hasn’t even been created yet. This is a
right-wing corporate coup and an attempt to sabotage the basic functions
of the federal government in order to privatize it for millionaires’ and
billionaires’ profits.

Justice Democrats like Reps. Greg Casar and Rashida Tlaib are leading the
call and raising the alarm around this crisis, but we need to pressure the
rest of the Democratic Party to do the same before it’s too late.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250204-block-trump-nominees/?source=em20250204-36396&akid=36396%2E1203867%2EWxZAoI ]A screenshot of a post on X from Congressman Greg Casar reading: Fire
Elon Musk. Use every legislative, judicial, and public pressure tactic at
our disposal until we get it done.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250204-block-trump-nominees/?source=em20250204-36396&akid=36396%2E1203867%2EWxZAoI ]A screenshot of a post on X from Congresswoman Rashida Tlaib reading:
Every Democratic Senator should be doing everything in their power to
block Trump's cabinet nominees. We cannot go on like business as usual
while they illegally seize control of federal agencies an torch the
government.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250204-block-trump-nominees/?source=em20250204-36396&akid=36396%2E1203867%2EWxZAoI ]The Democratic Party must fight back NOW by using every tool at its
disposal. Will you urge Senate Democrats to vote NO on ALL Trump nominees
until he and Musk are held accountable to the laws and Constitution?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/em-20250204-block-trump-nominees/?source=em20250204-36396&akid=36396%2E1203867%2EWxZAoI ]Add Your Name

It’s time for Senate Democrats to put up or shut up, and start treating
this corporate coup with the urgency and boldness it deserves.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250204-36396-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36396_1203867_WxZAoI&akid=36396%2E1203867%2EWxZAoI

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36396%2E1203867%2EWxZAoI

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

[ ]A screenshot of a post on X from Congressman Greg Casar reading: Fire Elon Musk. Use every legislative, judicial, and public pressure tactic at our disposal until we get it done. [ ]A screenshot of a post on X from Congresswoman Rashida Tlaib reading: Every Democratic Senator should be doing everything in their power to block Trump's cabinet nominees. We cannot go on like business as usual while they illegally seize control of federal agencies an torch the government. [ ]The Democratic Party must fight back NOW by using every tool at its disposal. Will you urge Senate Democrats to vote NO on ALL Trump nominees until he and Musk are held accountable to the laws and Constitution? [ ]Add Your Name It’s time for Senate Democrats to put up or shut up, and start treating this corporate coup with the urgency and boldness it deserves. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Mark Warner
subject: Russell Vought is a danger to our federal workforce.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101566566/526387470/2047032710?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Vought_250204_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2U2NzY5My02MWUzLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aYyaFEF122zNS1qWEcsBfMzu7DpEG9rLANte2g_SQJ4=) Derek, **Russell Vought is a danger to our federal workforce.**

Let’s look at the evidence: Vought is one of the key architects of Project 2025, and he has a terrifying track record of demonizing federal workers. Project 2025 lays out a plan to dismantle the federal workforce, and this dismantling is already well underway. We’re seeing vindictive orders eliminating telework, huge numbers of workers being put on administrative leave or even fired outright, and a reckless, legally dubious offer encouraging virtually **all** federal employees to resign in exchange for a severance payment... money which, based on President Trump’s history of stiffing the contractors at his construction business, federal workers might not ever see.

He’s doing everything he can to fill the federal workforce with right-wing loyalists who will do his bidding, and we can thank Vought for helping him hatch this plan.

[_**I will always stand up and fight for federal workers. Will you donate today to fuel my work in Congress to take on the Trump administration?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101566567/526387471/2047032710?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Vought_250204_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2U2NzY5My02MWUzLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aYyaFEF122zNS1qWEcsBfMzu7DpEG9rLANte2g_SQJ4=)

I could go on and on about Vought.

About how he said the President can refuse to spend the money Congress tells him to spend. About how he has a reputation for withholding congressionally-approved funding. About how he genuinely called for government workers to be “traumatized.”

The point is, Vought’s nomination hasn’t even been voted on, and _he’s already upending the lives of hundreds of thousands of federal employees._

[_**We can’t allow Vought to have more power than he already does. clean_body: | | | = Derek, Russell Vought is a danger to our federal workforce. Let’s look at the evidence: Vought is one of the key architects of Project 2025, and he has a terrifying track record of demonizing federal workers. Project 2025 lays out a plan to dismantle the federal workforce, and this dismantling is already well underway. We’re seeing vindictive orders eliminating telework, huge numbers of workers being put on administrative leave or even fired outright, and a reckless, legally dubious offer encouraging virtually all federal employees to resign in exchange for a severance payment... money which, based on President Trump’s history of stiffing the contractors at his construction business, federal workers might not ever see. He’s doing everything he can to fill the federal workforce with right-wing loyalists who will do his bidding, and we can thank Vought for helping him hatch this plan. = I could go on and on about Vought. About how he said the President can refuse to spend the money Congress tells him to spend. About how he has a reputation for withholding congressionally-approved funding. About how he genuinely called for government workers to be “traumatized.” The point is, Vought’s nomination hasn’t even been voted on, and he’s already upending the lives of hundreds of thousands of federal employees. = Thank you, Mark Warner **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

body:
President Trump has a powerful message on the deportation of the millions of illegal immigrants who entered the U.S. under Joe Biden's reign:

**_["We have no choice."](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/6p_fGJzQEzjqLabaUgzN-Q~~/AAVLBhA~/KIazaU8dcLUfNy8mb4IPqUqPQIcWDdz5TO9DlutysN9RQT3gAysABrSN3bDt4UXlkRwyZfB8p9z6nTpSN16THz381D1ycNnJvEGirnlqC2WblWxYiXyYLMzyK18n16ibwdAIjNOZSv8hktQrIiP0PL1zP9ucD4qga1QClsk42xVIouOOlzfZnP9RRC60_GhxJTSRDC9kmXRQAWZG1LiCXL4ar0hNG4DC-pafBCHQun1JZGAxSrNHHcc4LScw4_25ZeiQrbXAe09TdxfzukbGOcy_17y75Uf6ccKBzFMaETeJjWTPywFmuBVVvJeQ4ESEd49aYq5gG7j3IlILslzWMfC358yilT9KXQz11ib0LRaphnw7aAF3VNxxhCfn7BDhXBY4AK3SZf2AsVVcgOkAqg~~)_**

|
---
If you're like most other Americans, your IRA, 401(k), or Savings Account could be in the most danger it's ever been in! We're living in unprecedented times where economic uncertainty and market volatility’s creating new headlines... Tremendous government debt has shattered all records, surpassing $36 TRILLION, and is accelerating at a pace never before seen in our great country's 248+ years of existence... While the economy shows some resilience, there’s precarious challenges we could face at any moment. And perhaps the biggest threat of all... Global economic rivals challenging U.S. financial dominance, and the dollar's status as the world's reserve currency.

If every U.S. citizen were to try to help and pay that off, every single one of us would owe more than **$106,141**. Even our children! [**But this isn’t just a headline; it’s a wake-up call.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf1hru6j8f4v6em9jrn5pos58v8cgrslmaru9pko_rp22sh2s8i6epj0stim4pj6c3h2bs) This all adds up to a situation that could surpass the 2008 crisis. The retirement accounts of regular working class Americans like you and I could be in serious trouble. And if we experience another major market correction, and your retirement savings is entirely invested in the stock market, could you stand to lose any of that money? If you're concerned, and you're not the type to sit around and wait for something to happen, there is something you can do.

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: A tough question
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhovgqsveg7qq3gaekl0uik8h9bvi1i454g188ug_rp22sh2s8i6epj0stimcoj6c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjofta726t0jbjh4gifpq2ju0ds8d59vvt3h5uq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0stimcoj6c9h2bs)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, ‘01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0bm1b6fvnir68rrhe06ml0ckeu28na70e09qgio_rp22sh2s8i6epj0stimcoj6c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp36cjjm8o74c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z92ghqu1oe30lmaamij06jiblds7vub1e6l3kra8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0stimcoj6c9h2bs)_

name: Patriot Alerts
subject: Karoline Leavitt Leaves the Media Speechless
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANTI-WOKE FUND
body:
Karoline Leavitt just left the media in awe. They can’t stand how well she defends President Trump.

| | | | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z6nkmbuc34vm0jblk2f28mup710d3em7ge7ghjb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0stimcoj1cth2bs)
---
| | When they try to spin lies about President Trump, she effortlessly casts them aside with the poise & grace we expect out of our Press Secretary.
When asked about President Trump’s harsh language for his adversaries, she responded in a way they never saw coming.
Here’s what she had to say:
**_“I think one of the things that the American people love most about this president is that he often says what they are thinking but sometimes lacks the courage to say themselves. _**
**_And I think yesterday at this podium, you heard President Trump express great frustration, perhaps even anger, with the previous administration’s policies, many of which have led to the crises that our country is currently facing and that this president is focused on fixing.”_**
The far-left media can’t stand that President Trump is angry about what happened to our country under Joe Biden.
They can’t stand that he passionately defends America.
They hate that he PUTS AMERICA FIRST!
But at this critical moment, President Trump’s most ambitious goals are facing attacks from all sides.
In deep-red Florida, Republicans in the legislature are joining hands with woke Democrats to make Florida a de-facto amnesty state.
And in Congress, Republicans are already going on the record to oppose some of President Trump’s most critical cabinet appointees.
**_Facing the Democrats & the media is hard enough, but facing members of our own party is whole different ballgame._**
With Tulsi Gabbard, RFK, and Kash Patel facing Senate confirmation this week, we’re in an all-hands-on-deck situation.
Every Republican needs to stand tall and defend President Trump.
Because if we fail right now, Democrats will use this playbook to thwart President Trump at every turn.
This is the single most important thing you can do today, and we’re coming to you with one humble ask.
