clean_body: Karoline Leavitt just left the media in awe. They can’t stand how well she defends President Trump. | | | | | | When they try to spin lies about President Trump, she effortlessly casts them aside with the poise & grace we expect out of our Press Secretary. When asked about President Trump’s harsh language for his adversaries, she responded in a way they never saw coming. Here’s what she had to say: “I think one of the things that the American people love most about this president is that he often says what they are thinking but sometimes lacks the courage to say themselves. And I think yesterday at this podium, you heard President Trump express great frustration, perhaps even anger, with the previous administration’s policies, many of which have led to the crises that our country is currently facing and that this president is focused on fixing.” The far-left media can’t stand that President Trump is angry about what happened to our country under Joe Biden. They can’t stand that he passionately defends America. They hate that he PUTS AMERICA FIRST! But at this critical moment, President Trump’s most ambitious goals are facing attacks from all sides. In deep-red Florida, Republicans in the legislature are joining hands with woke Democrats to make Florida a de-facto amnesty state. And in Congress, Republicans are already going on the record to oppose some of President Trump’s most critical cabinet appointees. Facing the Democrats & the media is hard enough, but facing members of our own party is whole different ballgame. With Tulsi Gabbard, RFK, and Kash Patel facing Senate confirmation this week, we’re in an all-hands-on-deck situation. Every Republican needs to stand tall and defend President Trump. Because if we fail right now, Democrats will use this playbook to thwart President Trump at every turn. This is the single most important thing you can do today, and we’re coming to you with one humble ask. Please. name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Religious freedom advocates at IRF Summit outline hopes for Trump's term
body:
Panelists at the International Religious Freedom Summit discuss religious freedom hopes for President Donald Trump’s second term on Feb. 4, 2025. From left to right: Moderator Brett Scharffs, director of the International Center for Law and Religion Studies at Brigham Young University. Panelists: David Beasley, former executive director of the United Nations’ World Food Programme (2017-2023); Annie Boyajian, co-president of Freedom House; Scott Flipse, director of policy and media relations for the Congressional-Executive Commission on China. / Credit: Photo courtesy of the International Religious Freedom Summit Washington D.C., Feb 4, 2025 / 16:25 pm (CNA). | [](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
[](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
# **[Religious freedom advocates at IRF Summit outline hopes for Trump's term](http://trk.libertyledger._qm-O0uMhzp0l9kBQ)**
---
Panelists at the International Religious Freedom Summit discuss religious freedom hopes for President Donald Trump’s second term on Feb. 4, 2025. From left to right: Moderator Brett Scharffs, director of the International Center for Law and Religion Studies at Brigham Young University. Panelists: David Beasley, former executive director of the United Nations’ World Food Programme (2017-2023); Annie Boyajian, co-president of Freedom House; Scott Flipse, director of policy and media relations for the Congressional-Executive Commission on China. / Credit: Photo courtesy of the International Religious Freedom Summit Washington D.C., Feb 4, 2025 / 16:25 pm (CNA).

Well that's one way to go straight to jail.

# **[Senate confirms Pam Bondi as attorney general](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
The U.S. Senate voted on Tuesday to confirm Pam Bondi as U.S. Attorney General in President Donald Trump's administration. Republicans were able to overcome the dissenting votes from Democrats to confirm Bondi 54 to 46. 'Pam will refocus the DOJ to its intended purpose of fighting Crime, and Making America Safe Again.' Democratic Sen. Dick Durbin of Illinois continued to oppose Bondi and Trump's pick for FBI director, Kash Patel. "I urge my colleagues to think twice about Pam Bondi and Kash Patel," said Durbin. "This is not what we should expect or want from the FBI and the Department of Justice."Bondi had been

Negotiating with China over its unfair trading practices is like bleeding water from a stone.

The country’s State Administration for Market Regulation said that it would initiate an investigation into the technology giant because of alleged violations of China’s anti-monopoly law, according to a Google translation of the official statement. name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: A tough question
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2stgtj8uuh5tad2uhbujqkprqi2nmuqbljc2l00_rp22sh2s8i6epj0stim6o76clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zu7hk9nfk5dqnll7g2v8meto2078vjbrvnjna5uo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0stim6o76clh2bs)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, ‘01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp0etgg19ojut042evuivgqreolpoeu5m6crcouo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj4sth64p3246h22sh2s8i6epj0stim6o76clh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zenng7umfm4i6b17rpkj67ie56p8l7ohfsl8us00_rp22sh2s8i6epj0stim6o76clh2bs)_

name: Joni Ernst [iPhone]
subject: Your response could be the difference I need.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joni for Iowa
body:
I need your response...

| |
---
| | | Since the day I was announced as the DOGE Chair, I've been reaching out to every TOP patriot I can find to ask for their thoughts on how our country can run more efficiently.

I'm beyond appreciative of the input I've received, but truthfully, Friend, I was really hoping for a response from you.

We need three more responses from your area to complete our DOGE Priorities Survey.

_**[That's why I'm reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Can I count on you?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zk20ic07s2e2eb2g78j58sltnj29u0bb8gs7k5u0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0stim6o72cth2bs "That’s why I’m reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Can I count on you?")**_

Thanks in advance,

Joni Ernst
_Sent from my iPhone_

---

name: Joni Ernst [iPhone]
subject: Your response could be the difference I need.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joni for Iowa
body:
I need your response...

| |
---
| | | Since the day I was announced as the DOGE Chair, I've been reaching out to every TOP patriot I can find to ask for their thoughts on how our country can run more efficiently.

I'm beyond appreciative of the input I've received, but truthfully, Friend, I was really hoping for a response from you.

We need three more responses from your area to complete our DOGE Priorities Survey.

_**[That's why I'm reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Can I count on you?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu9mjm0f53aqhek0ro82ei88cmvdq60bv1bafkd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0stim6o76c3h2bs "That’s why I’m reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Can I count on you?")**_

Thanks in advance,

Joni Ernst
_Sent from my iPhone_

Can you really predict a heart attack? 💔

According to America’s #1 heart nutrition expert, Dr. Sam Walters... this **7-second “feet test”** can reveal if your heart is dying.

Here’s how to do it:
---
1. Just sit on a chair.
2. Touch your right foot.

---
If **[THIS happens...](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20155/6374453/3ca348b0ea1afae15b53e32f4e6c4defa1dd70ff/b945d2f24536088278c7724d2fa0fa67129e6807)** then your heart is desperately starving for oxygen (but most people only realize when it’s too late).

name: Hillsdale College Via Your America News
subject: Your 2025 Hillsdale College Calendar
body:
I’m reaching out to you today because I’d like to send you your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar.

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4ieqnes63gump91ihsdbqvoji0g4v8n10s4j0sg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sthm4oj4cph2bs)

| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvu167n5bi7ftma3u9qvt2vun3vahaujbksongto_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sthm4oj4cph2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by February 28.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zckm41tlrmkmp2pqrf87dlu2ibo9v8s3d75l3ndo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sthm4oj4cph2bs)**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01

Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: Patriot Alerts
subject: Karoline Leavitt Leaves the Media Speechless
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANTI-WOKE FUND
body:
Karoline Leavitt just left the media in awe. They can’t stand how well she defends President Trump.

| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlplc4odo7s088neo7kg7rqdq43l5lv4deoag1d0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sthm2o34cjh2bs)
---
| | When they try to spin lies about President Trump, she effortlessly casts them aside with the poise & grace we expect out of our Press Secretary.
When asked about President Trump’s harsh language for his adversaries, she responded in a way they never saw coming.
Here’s what she had to say:
**_“I think one of the things that the American people love most about this president is that he often says what they are thinking but sometimes lacks the courage to say themselves. _**
**_And I think yesterday at this podium, you heard President Trump express great frustration, perhaps even anger, with the previous administration’s policies, many of which have led to the crises that our country is currently facing and that this president is focused on fixing.”_**
The far-left media can’t stand that President Trump is angry about what happened to our country under Joe Biden.
They can’t stand that he passionately defends America.
They hate that he PUTS AMERICA FIRST!
But at this critical moment, President Trump’s most ambitious goals are facing attacks from all sides.
In deep-red Florida, Republicans in the legislature are joining hands with woke Democrats to make Florida a de-facto amnesty state.
And in Congress, Republicans are already going on the record to oppose some of President Trump’s most critical cabinet appointees.
**_Facing the Democrats & the media is hard enough, but facing members of our own party is whole different ballgame._**
With Tulsi Gabbard, RFK, and Kash Patel facing Senate confirmation this week, we’re in an all-hands-on-deck situation.
Every Republican needs to stand tall and defend President Trump.
Because if we fail right now, Democrats will use this playbook to thwart President Trump at every turn.
This is the single most important thing you can do today, and we’re coming to you with one humble ask.
**__****[Will you PLEASE - right here, right now - go on the record and tell EVERY Republican to STAND WITH TRUMP NOW!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2i5i1a6ntmuiudbuas92jpobgq8ohrvcpljjvjo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0sthm2o34cjh2bs)**

# **Protect & ****Diversify YOUR Retirement Savings...**
---
|
---
If you're like most other Americans, your IRA, 401(k), or Savings Account could be in the most danger it's ever been in! We're living in unprecedented times where economic uncertainty and market volatility’s creating new headlines... Tremendous government debt has shattered all records, surpassing $36 TRILLION, and is accelerating at a pace never before seen in our great country's 248+ years of existence... While the economy shows some resilience, there’s precarious challenges we could face at any moment. And perhaps the biggest threat of all... Global economic rivals challenging U.S. financial dominance, and the dollar's status as the world's reserve currency.
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2EEv36LU0LwnelBb_16eMg~~/AARclBA~/WYZmI9Acv7joTwZq3g6rnrA8FfIFHS6nlAGmsVLFZODWSquEZZuRj3LTGJrOPnK1VTYbCCL0FNJ9sEYhwiXY-ILt6ePkaCn7EC9jubajfDCsIjyolLjuIyAdnTJCRAfbM7cMpu_Iuyl193q8eXJTKc-uRPIaUpmHl4Kn3VpGdA0wdSiMDsjFSmS58-zFp2SYtxVyQGyFXVy2RZhusQZdkHLrhfO1MVKCFjZqU8WO26NccWcmr4L9Vf4qNLSTkh1FHqk-VJsyzlaqXUHCpvYbMe22MKzIe_nLT1XMUxk271mflq2kU_HTr_YHKODbByHYCl1gIRHdmFdCokTE80Cg2_lLADiTCro4T6d1hJHiMttJrjGXQpitOaHgaBNFpetT)
---
| | Yes, you read that right. The U.S. national debt is over $36 TRILLION. To help you put that into perspective... If every U.S. citizen were to try to help and pay that off, every single one of us would owe more than **$106,141**. Even our children! [**But this isn’t just a headline; it’s a wake-up call.**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/2EEv36LU0LwnelBb_16eMg~~/AARclBA~/WYZmI9Acv7joTwZq3g6rnrA8FfIFHS6nlAGmsVLFZODWSquEZZuRj3LTGJrOPnK1VTYbCCL0FNJ9sEYhwiXY-ILt6ePkaCn7EC9jubajfDCsIjyolLjuIyAdnTJCRAfbM7cMpu_Iuyl193q8eXJTKc-uRPIaUpmHl4Kn3VpGdA0wdSiMDsjFSmS58-zFp2SYtxVyQGyFXVy2RZhusQZdkHLrhfO1MVKCFjZqU8WO26NccWcmr4L9Vf4qNLSTkh1FHqk-VJsyzlaqXUHCpvYbMe22MKzIe_nLT1XMUxk271mflq2kU_HTr_YHKODbByHYCl1gIRHdmFdCokTE80Cg2_lLADiTCro4T6d1hJHiMttJrjGXQpitOaHgaBNFpetT) This all adds up to a situation that could surpass the 2008 crisis. The retirement accounts of regular working class Americans like you and I could be in serious trouble. And if we experience another major market correction, and your retirement savings is entirely invested in the stock market, could you stand to lose any of that money? If you're concerned, and you're not the type to sit around and wait for something to happen, there is something you can do.

subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity” on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=965e02339b8e4992b4eab3a357d48386&_e=D2x9Tj9h3qb_jHiKNEbfVKAGEsX4kya3qiG3X3rZKJztAPSkb5Z7GG5n97nNHGSeLpsW1dB0RlnxOopDNxWNG12hfJ3KO1YHtVK9yAF5UgpRLI_8Pv9g_ALWM8xq06FXa523m7MLxLc9_vffsb8XDbv075Zc-wSD4GmtB1dBkYsRXroY49zT9CCXHsXz8bcYKfavNXmvAsK9GFkHmQRS2Lbcz4QdaO-hdJNYMyD8XbdwAFAnWt_mLb3F-vdVqAFn0o1j6by2u6H5gcjw1641EvtzDmcKgS-v6uo1D-nwHII_hWoeBqfeArU7rjzmPdu7pGe6z70hcIvFaKI152mLHFvlJXow9n2QBG7fhi-Piaxptd1b4a2eeEYPdi9DsWjYhgGPZYhDMhIEK4JZjcpChFpybFC9WsePXya2LTi1CfqEJrJEwxQMH7LKf46mDi38)

| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=965e02339b8e4992b4eab3a357d48386&_e=D2x9Tj9h3qb_jHiKNEbfVKAGEsX4kya3qiG3X3rZKJztAPSkb5Z7GG5n97nNHGSeLpsW1dB0RlnxOopDNxWNG12hfJ3KO1YHtVK9yAF5UgpRLI_8Pv9g_ALWM8xq06FXa523m7MLxLc9_vffsb8XDbv075Zc-wSD4GmtB1dBkYsRXroY49zT9CCXHsXz8bcYKfavNXmvAsK9GFkHmQRS2Lbcz4QdaO-hdJNYMyD8XbdwAFAnWt_mLb3F-vdVqAFn0o1j6by2u6H5gcjw1641EvtzDmcKgS-v6uo1D-nwHILdLw0_JKR4XV9Ycf91v7yuQA-TEzla6CmlyDLuYKCB1lXwOVKEPzR7pM9HqPThDK28FMvmYDABoIASpQ1emszuRbDeKY-jVmlcF7VYR6Cr9yQhKwQ0NJsk-nTgnSrFIQFN4T2Dv_0JFOmKMzEEVM0E)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=965e02339b8e4992b4eab3a357d48386&_e=D2x9Tj9h3qb_jHiKNEbfVKAGEsX4kya3qiG3X3rZKJztAPSkb5Z7GG5n97nNHGSeLpsW1dB0RlnxOopDNxWNG12hfJ3KO1YHtVK9yAF5UgpRLI_8Pv9g_ALWM8xq06FXa523m7MLxLc9_vffsb8XDbv075Zc-wSD4GmtB1dBkYsRXroY49zT9CCXHsXz8bcYKfavNXmvAsK9GFkHmQRS2Lbcz4QdaO-hdJNYMyD8XbdwAFAnWt_mLb3F-vdVqAFn0o1j6by2u6H5gcjw1641EvtzDmcKgS-v6uo1D-nwHIICaoEC-sOwUW-f7eIRKrnqMw1l5_cRStu995F7IqW5kGJcBXLYAbzSScvAFYCskzjQZMBa77QMsvZMeOx7ZY02y5SBSzfOuW2cDHC-lnl5EeyxkKR3rLwy6h7WdTsEuT-edfP2v45gWtzlPF4zrAgT)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: A tough question
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/Xcx2uJBT1p8hKmOFZ-9F5DwVY2c82MTEiFwew7DeeilzJw0oruTlvs_D3Q5LqTw5F2NFTUzinKjfUAx2Zre4kOvh7yRNaMZUCS9waZOLYtxeKoCMTLPm3sIHCXtLIWXauwLxWfG5MGnkJIoxEDptiIxujwV5F3zXnVnHKE0L2RXdDn9d1ZAngjQlUcTe-55U_KZEVujrNjhwowx9VRU_isJtPCpVJgAXCZPpvpmh5KqaFkeqaprgGMNrP2DRGwKXxZs9_YICBXhgguTBWmDVvzaZWx4dEyYtS_BJhFBvpOhsyG3XrFodLAI3MRZo6vekxBEHHnDvCRAbtuU2-FQXJnzTnKh7NbkKF3QWFPDIx9h3ZLm0PQ9r_41tA75IN8f9Bl4ityUJ6tHJlqe14tmPJCxftm7xO7xphbmgWSRHudS7HIuIHObH3Ov_cZwj_wpeCitqfu8laYcImfJutBuvzg/FhpO1k0mjzbuVdTwcV8Kbfr0-MmxVzQw/5)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/xQzkVauKJcGyPI__qW4YyHsj9sQ4L1LUrBf_RimRSkYViBmoLuelSfohfatyRCNaT1w3AV6WZ2RFF_W9kRT4gLlx1CpOuj3vWnHaU29xWqP81b5t6t9_SX9xik2ICsYL1rNcJw-RFYQl3T_zbhR3NXwOM7s5OLIFCBr5HGzr7nTF5B4ju6Du6d5ozjG2xLnldUvzfnYbXj23iReXzHOAHzvMw_Z9kru2MPkfzeeR5Y623zZu7O71jkcjided1muLYEHxAsWLQ1KWBo_3vtKlyZuQRCNCb1JPS1DiGuQknoy4eAbwUB8ycSoMosQhFqrdTDrMc2CQtYFKx4cNBpLXx90oYfUvMHrhRoa8gm8DY74Q0pIxkLWwH-Fs0ebcN2y9MUj5dzbU00zw5BtG4HGxxl9TmxWQAX3adR0MVf23v_0eHxi5jdWy8lKt1ZYCbdwy5NSvmQULgslPwDk7kg5zWQ/HTHrZScUXInM_RvQsPePx_z-63cOda2z/5)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, ‘01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

clean_body: There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day. Here it is...What is true about the world? Tough, right? It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!). This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world. That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, " The Great Principles of Chemistry." Why chemistry? For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you. More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life. Like all our courses, " The Great Principles of Chemistry" contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners. And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible. Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course? For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below: The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator. For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with " The Great Principles of Chemistry." Let's promote what's true about our world together. Warm Regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College | | Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
Karoline Leavitt just left the media in awe. They can’t stand how well she defends President Trump.

| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/JCEHoLTJPX-gn4amG2JV3wO79xJaWvVqCKF81_hon2Rw5e-Clia5Xm78dH8aQaght6xfKfrgUr87tc_E9cXK-Ght6fKqb1yxBgzkplzjXFArMK2Hv9DGTg-jdok4Zw3odpy-4UkDh3qi4f_hLMhrqlbr_o01n1GoQM35JjpJbcX3P53E5L04RB7_0E_2yDQ28XSFE-PfIp1JmiJXEgmmt0Au6vpVoq9Ho3vzi8IsxfRbtRDm9265ZH9LexY93ZrnBlUNRYeRafN-anjxlH4NvYRsnpWc-ZJOW6BDXXVctTh1WEhugUM0UafHdPdujA8-keb3UWaSwSDZJmbFtzE6XfR_M1Kw6LySBZ5kajRGU7cbXB-oyL87WIEWY-A1mp0VlHaak70ufNDj0MJbIIGrl2vlGo2zl4gTKbyKzPVSEseOwS5pOYFaNNoFY9rsB24PgMQywOmGbGkWwAKyovV9L6CW1cVCFHeVeYbg2xmSLzF1dA54eI1juyFu6iY/dSvV_7D8T_wGs2F2o4YqdxuvWTW-3RBC/5)
---
| | When they try to spin lies about President Trump, she effortlessly casts them aside with the poise & grace we expect out of our Press Secretary.
When asked about President Trump’s harsh language for his adversaries, she responded in a way they never saw coming.
Here’s what she had to say:
**_“I think one of the things that the American people love most about this president is that he often says what they are thinking but sometimes lacks the courage to say themselves. _**
**_And I think yesterday at this podium, you heard President Trump express great frustration, perhaps even anger, with the previous administration’s policies, many of which have led to the crises that our country is currently facing and that this president is focused on fixing.”_**
The far-left media can’t stand that President Trump is angry about what happened to our country under Joe Biden.
They can’t stand that he passionately defends America.
They hate that he PUTS AMERICA FIRST!
But at this critical moment, President Trump’s most ambitious goals are facing attacks from all sides.
In deep-red Florida, Republicans in the legislature are joining hands with woke Democrats to make Florida a de-facto amnesty state.
And in Congress, Republicans are already going on the record to oppose some of President Trump’s most critical cabinet appointees.
**_Facing the Democrats & the media is hard enough, but facing members of our own party is whole different ballgame._**
With Tulsi Gabbard, RFK, and Kash Patel facing Senate confirmation this week, we’re in an all-hands-on-deck situation.
Every Republican needs to stand tall and defend President Trump.
Because if we fail right now, Democrats will use this playbook to thwart President Trump at every turn.
This is the single most important thing you can do today, and we’re coming to you with one humble ask.
**__****[Will you PLEASE - right here, right now - go on the record and tell EVERY Republican to STAND WITH TRUMP NOW!](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/aqh-9pMA5htejuQbuWQxTnL3xuNvLlM5-UR9QSXM5YhdYfy7LWXv94GQZq2uNAwk2CNU6yFK7yWJyG64eojmgthdlT7XMOH46suX_uBlFmD7ZQSQIKgc8tfcZvS_iwSZjZAE_AV5vqTwY5CbA70XkhegHdPj6tvUnyKC7APKUoZquKxZ40sJWWNtgGmto2qm0TU3avyRljrHXMEAgwlxT0TB7B3XzYmAUFecohHcW5ixWqiyAWC73VK0IgDvLWUHCd26cdxYoLGLvUEB_3TGnwAPRcTq6N7k0GCb--4fft69QKrkTqY2flcQqoslr7ohZK3W5mSiMfhMDp7kLKMaSw1hU3vSUP8dCzQXtUt3fpoQd7u6tpe8gw001lrO1NxHydv9wiJ3ky8JeYi28nFlB0ulwzVUC_SAbToT3-xaeQa2wcCCptex6rSYaExVhfJN99uXZiULQTdSHwW09zafZcUMp5oW9lJKd86DVnF2Rw6xJKpBLcXkob6gGJY/aEZ6opYRb8HXTY1KT-Qauf7RGKy-kkg_/5)**

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1971, the [Apollo 14](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j71u9CAQAJ8GOixY_txQfI27-9qUFg6LvRE2luEc3dtHlz79aEbz8ZgfkQod6_-4Y-i5ziDBCglC2jlFKq_Z8BQyIqDmGJTXo7cWnOJbsGA8WKu1tqAXp7L2mJP3KBN4FyOn8LZJkFYpbdQ4oFIjOLeobFP2aWFGYqJer-Gr0tE3zOVVb7yGz7rzErbez8b0PwYTg-kszzYcscVhrTeD6aaElcEUz1pKFcqInVqjeoheRb6i2OPzegP8Cun8plKoOc-MXPdI5TfR_1q-A_wEAAD__0HvV6E) Lunar Module, carrying astronauts Alan B. Shepard and Edgar D. Mitchell, successfully landed on the Moon, marking NASA’s third manned lunar landing. In today’s edition, a therapist with 30 years of experience provides couples with effective communication strategies, highlighting six phrases to avoid that may leave a partner feeling unloved. [See the phrases below and how to steer clear of them](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL0OnDAQhJ_GdIts4x9SuEhDd2lTIoPXx0YGI9t35N4-4vo0U8wnfRrN78f88JToeP7yO7oW8yy51MAlcD0HT-kzqy64iChx6NAJO4xWa2lEtzk0q5ZGDVyjMd4Mq7U8qqis9Wo04UdH7rZxybUQgxJjj0KM0phFRB2iDQtTHAO1XPo_mY62YUyf_MbSr3nvkttaOysbfjI5MTld19Wvx7LekMnpVjM5cXmHYnKiN8KCeICHNb_OhBXahsWfVBvEXGDg8EFfvnVFaPkvrXBuxVes4AtCpedxU9_AQ8HkG-WjbnQCVaADWsmvJWGAyzcstd_anrriwnlRSlSNZYo_d0_pu7_978-3k_8CAAD__zQleLg). We're sponsored today by [Upwellness](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3OozAQAJ_GdCB7_QMpXERClq7ItVcig9eJT8uPsEmUtz-R-9q0u7Oj0f65DTefKC33335GW-I6AAddc6i5HoJP9B5UFWxEBJQVWtHKrtUajKgedjJR8GiAK8QLxxEANBcg5UUFr7tLlexp48C1EFKJrkEhOjBmFFGH2IaRKY4hlXVv_q5pKQ-M9F6fuDfTOldkH6VsmckrA8fAbf6OuTm2FxItmPMJMXDHVB9Udk_piXudNw4nLt3VuV89kz1orZRmYPIxpsBkj7NPtM8MzHTkss4uIQXJZH9Q-UiGn4rZp-V_PgPzuWKyD9srEaVsWqb4_Rx-Ynf7ZVG-ffVp4V8AAAD__37weAk). Be sure to check them out in today's edition.
|
---
## Trump Proposes U.S. Control of Gaza
President Donald Trump hosted Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu at the White House on Tuesday, proposing that the [U.S. take long-term control of the Gaza Strip](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2u4yAQxfGnsTssBoPtFBTbuMu2W1oYhngiPiwgsfL2q9z-1j_p6Oj_777dDQVKj78mom4-b4ILxbhgXG3OUPhssnfaIwoce9Qwj8uslJigP7RXfrTWAhgBfgJ-MxakcpIL4xe_Q0_6u8YFVwCjhGVAgEVM0w5eOT-7vZMcHbVchmem1A704ZPfWAabYx_00dpZu_FPJ9ZOrNd1DWm3Ca_69U6sZw7UyNYvHtSQHflVsROry8kEx1p5xZNRLQYDsbNQRBYpUW1Y2I7paSIllrCZ9DHHi0XERunBik0GblzKW1-0Oy8Kgeo0d5I_oqHw8679Vuutxf8AAAD__0tQb2k) to clear debris and promote economic development. _“I don’t think people should be going back to Gaza. I think that Gaza has been very unlucky for them. They’ve lived like hell,”_ Trump said, suggesting Palestinians should relocate elsewhere. He envisioned redeveloping Gaza into a thriving area, referring to it as the "Riviera of the Middle East." [Watch him discuss it here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z8FqxCAUheGn0d0Er0bNLFwUyiwK022Xweg1ucWMQ8YkpE9f0n2358AH_9e9v3vK9Bg__YyuptJLIfVFyIvQffSUj77l0SVEiYqjA6s6q7U0wCdnUgs4mGvQnY0hgPfiak1Ig9bJCJE4uVMTUmgA1ULXIEAnjRkg6ZhsHFgrMFItS_Nd6FEnTPkoGy5NKDPPbqr1-WLqjckbk7d935ujrHUd8PzPxdcwMXXbmHrvVzFa-gD6Gfni4nOnnOllLGvFOHvKf2T9L3Fz8jcAAP__kCpSzQ). Netanyahu expressed openness to the plan, calling it a potential [historic shift and praising Trump](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGS2yAQxvGnQd16YJEsq6BIo-7SptSszWI2QeABzhq9feZydfpv_vPN79fH9kGSJD9_0s6uh7Khxgk0gp42T5LObRy8C8zIdmBnZnubpwmvZogOJzvbBT3rhczID1oWi-gXE4Kd7zMN4r5qGvVkjB3N7cLG3PB6vZsw-TD7uxo1e-mlXn4XyT1ySGd5c708yj4kF3t_NWV_KFwVrsdxXLrs3EqQVonT10rhmuTN91SeG-deT4Vr5k75pPgJD0qpQa-f-wuelalz6xCqcPbw3YBIDfjNFSJ5iN8YEKUBPbqU3EAyvKh1QDiY_zSF61Cdfx2SkrTrrEb93En-nRn6_wjfDv8GAAD__-1Jd0g) as "the greatest friend Israel has ever had in the White House."
## 20,000 Federal Workers Take Trump Buyout
More than [20,000 U.S. federal employees](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL0O2yAUhZ8GbzeC6x-cgSFVZVWV0qVDx4iY60CDwQIcl7ev3L3rOdLR-b5f98ddO-_C64deSZUlPpBjDxyB9w-jna-PrjFqIUJqG1JCtqPsexxEY9VgJEcUgxivGiWnUYp5Ga-dpCdxedWNU-caR94L0XZivJAQIw7DUyy9WaR5so6TcSWmy-_oQrG0-Bo_lC5zXBuvbClbZu2N4cRwOo7jsuZwdgwnCrBnhtMaA1WGUyyWEsOpWILDukJg454Jsq4Z1pgIitUBkAPnHBYylLSHI6Y3pQxWfwiKflOA517jXjLoYKBYqkB_NpoLaMibexO4cMYwx9WFFxhdzxc6we0m6jZ__8baKc7OsPbrl9MrHfknpa1JymyH897lQbKOv1bt_D_M8j_tH4V_AwAA___OKIaH)--roughly 1% of the workforce--have accepted the Trump administration's voluntary resignation program, which offers pay and benefits through Sept. 30, according to reports. The "deferred resignation" program was offered to about 2 million full-time federal employees. The White House originally targeted 5% to 10% participation, which it beliefs could have [saved taxpayers up to $100 billion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L9utDAQBPCnMZ1P9mL-fIWLr6G7tCmROe8ezhmM7OUIbx-RPs00I_00ms_7eHchhvX54Ra0TGkEBY1UIFUzehfiOZrKW0IErCu0uqv7rmmg1dVse0WIRPSvxs57VxuiqZ96Y8j4Cbq-CvbSFKhG69ro_oZa99C2k6bGU-cnYRT6wCnfvlJYeUaKZ3pjvj3SUkU7M29F1P8FDAKG9dxS4asSMFywgEHBFUbAsBe54lEEDI5lRFdYglJKSUKP2UV5pPzCXCS7F0rO-7LJaT_TzjIRYZZH4FkuKaPE7w0fjF7AUGXrtyPEGErbCaOeiwvxdx3_9dbbwk8AAAD__9WQbF8). A last-minute surge in resignations is expected in the 24 to 48 hours before Thursday's deadline, meaning the final number could be significantly higher. Meanwhile, 11 Democratic attorneys general have [warned that the program is "misleading"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAQRp8GOiIYG_8UFLehy223tLAZ4llhE-FxVn77VdJv_X06Rzpf9-keKNP--B82dJzKBBqs0qC0nWKgfE2tjC4hAjYSnembobcWOiNXN4YFlsHM4whtgpBGs-gu9YPBTo8DWEnuTdOgrTFNa4YbGjNA180m2Zj6OItWYyQu9fZdaOcVU77KC-ttKZvMbmV-HqL5J8AL8LziSjm_NwG-4uPMgansAvxSzspqDswZDwHeGrA9tIrruT1ViBvtdHD93NV8XuVkVVLCKsDL6uLzh3Kmo-tFqx9boI9E8l9BXg5-AwAA___oW2MY) and may not guarantee promised benefits, urging workers to consult their unions before accepting.
## Ice Storm Hits Midwest as California Faces Floods
A [major ice storm is hitting](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAURb_G3rDgAcYMDF28pWtHi4TnQAsmgqdY-fsq3bveKx0dna_LdvEpp-P-6Qs62usGHDTjwLjegk_5takxuB0RUI7ohJGL0RpmMUaHi7Sz9wZna2xQNlhQ3gS7cClCsDgm96Zx4FoIqcQyoRALzPNV7DrsJlwHxTEkqm36rumgiHt-1Se26VbLmF0kevRBfgywDrCe5zm9fKz1_Q6wHnj2AdZ0Q9aptsLI_2BnPhXmiZUUTuzE_BHYURtF9J1YxIadUUS214a39yS00KCk1VOkksfmwuNMOac-m0Hxe_Ep_-nQf3meDn4DAAD__-RgaBg) the Midwest and Northeast today, bringing sleet, freezing rain, and strong winds from Minnesota to Maine. Ice accumulations up to half an inch could make roads dangerous and cause power outages, with snow and gusts up to 50 mph expected as the storm moves east into the mid-Atlantic and Northeast by Thursday. name: History Facts
subject: The skinniest house in America
body:
In 1830, brickmaker John Hollensbury lived in a handsome two-story home in what’s now the Old Town district of Alexandria, Virginia. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68dna44wmn1wbwzalfmjhr09fjla7d99ndlm3m9ws7qomhl99beny1v1u3iihxjlu0xqxz2icdpvaa54txda5axdfinimq091nn570lho04f7l8mfcsm2zfo0jovodsy3m85v1yhi4qzgvjbv&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr7lgz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

# [The skinniest house in the U.S. is a historic "spite house."](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr7lgz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr7lgz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr7lgz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| I n 1830, brickmaker John Hollensbury lived in a handsome two-story home in what’s now the Old Town district of Alexandria, Virginia. He had [one small problem](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr7lgz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), however. There was an alley about 7.5 feet wide running down one side; horse-drawn carriages would try to squeeze through and end up scraping against his wall, and loiterers would mill about in the area. Hollensbury’s drastic solution? Fill in the alley with a very, very small house to spite the riffraff outside.
---
This is how the [Alexandria Spite House](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr7lgz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) was born — not to create something, but to take something away. But regardless of Hollensbury’s motivations, he built a cute, functional, two-story home, albeit one that’s wedged in so tight that the neighbors’ exterior brick walls serve as its interior walls. It stretches around 25 feet back into the alley, and has a 325-square-foot interior spread out over two stories. The first floor has a sitting area and a small kitchen. Upstairs, there’s a small bedroom and bathroom with a clawfoot tub.
The diminutive home’s creature comforts are ample enough that people have used it as a long-term primary residence. One couple even [lived there](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr7lgz&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) for the better part of 25 years. The most recent owner purchased it in 1990 for $130,000; as of 2008, he used it as a _pied à terre_... ## Two 5-foot-wide “spite houses” were built in New York City.
In New York City in 1882, construction of Lexington Avenue had split some lots into itty-bitty pieces. One corner lot at 82nd Street, owned by eccentric developer Joseph Richardson, was just 5 feet wide and 100 feet long. When the owners of the adjacent lot decided to build apartment homes there, they offered Richardson $1,000 for the lot. He countered with $5,000, and the other party decided to not buy the parcel — after all, they thought, what could Richardson even build there that could block their residents’ views? Unfortunately for them, Richardson called their bluff and built two 50-foot-long, 5-foot-wide houses right along the eastern wall, and even moved into one himself. Richardson died in 1887, and the buildings — the two spite houses and the apartment building next to them — were demolished in 1915.

clean_body: In 1830, brickmaker John Hollensbury lived in a handsome two-story home in what’s now the Old Town district of Alexandria, Virginia. | I n 1830, brickmaker John Hollensbury lived in a handsome two-story home in what’s now the Old Town district of Alexandria, Virginia. He had , however. There was an alley about 7.5 feet wide running down one side; horse-drawn carriages would try to squeeze through and end up scraping against his wall, and loiterers would mill about in the area. Hollensbury’s drastic solution? Fill in the alley with a very, very small house to spite the riffraff outside. This is how the was born — not to create something, but to take something away. But regardless of Hollensbury’s motivations, he built a cute, functional, two-story home, albeit one that’s wedged in so tight that the neighbors’ exterior brick walls serve as its interior walls. It stretches around 25 feet back into the alley, and has a 325-square-foot interior spread out over two stories. The first floor has a sitting area and a small kitchen. Upstairs, there’s a small bedroom and bathroom with a clawfoot tub. The diminutive home’s creature comforts are ample enough that people have used it as a long-term primary residence. One couple even for the better part of 25 years. The most recent owner purchased it in 1990 for $130,000; as of 2008, he used it as a pied à terre... | By clicking "Continue learning" you agree to History Facts' and . Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Historic homes built in alleys in Alexandria, Virginia 4 | | Assessed value of the Alexandria Spite House as of 2024 $661,841 | Assessed value of the Alexandria Spite House as of 2024 $661,841 | | Width (in inches) of the Keret House in Warsaw, Poland 48 | | Average square footage of houses in Virginia 1,896 | Average square footage of houses in Virginia 1,896 | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- Two 5-foot-wide “spite houses” were built in New York City. In New York City in 1882, construction of Lexington Avenue had split some lots into itty-bitty pieces. One corner lot at 82nd Street, owned by eccentric developer Joseph Richardson, was just 5 feet wide and 100 feet long. When the owners of the adjacent lot decided to build apartment homes there, they offered Richardson $1,000 for the lot. He countered with $5,000, and the other party decided to not buy the parcel — after all, they thought, what could Richardson even build there that could block their residents’ views? Unfortunately for them, Richardson called their bluff and built two 50-foot-long, 5-foot-wide houses right along the eastern wall, and even moved into one himself. Richardson died in 1887, and the buildings — the two spite houses and the apartment building next to them — were demolished in 1915. body:

An open Senate seat in Michigan is a HUGE opportunity for us to build our majority, but we must make sure that a conservative replaces him. Someone who will work with President Trump and Senate Republicans to enact an America First Agenda.

******************************************************[Support our 2026 Michigan Republican Nominee>>](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9WIo/?__vbtrk=MjczNzkwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjczNzkwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)******************************************************

We need you if we want to win in 2026.

Senate Republicans

name: No Dem Left Behind Executive Director, Hassan Martini
subject: What Happened to America First?
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wbtga-uq5vda-kyd76rh6/)
---
# **What Happened to America First?**
---
| | | | |
---
**_“Out of suffering have emerged the strongest souls; the most massive characters are seared with scars.”_** **_― Kahlil Gibran_**
---
|
---
Dear friend, Like you, I listened in horror as Donald Trump and Israeli war criminal Benjamin Netanyahu spoke proudly and boldly about their intention to commit ethnic cleansing in Palestine. As we speak, Israel has violated the terms of the ceasefire and is bombing the West Bank in an attempt to force Palestinians out of their homes. What Netanyahu doesn't understand, and what Trump knows nothing about, is the determination of the Palestinian people. Despite the endless suffering they have endured over the past year and a half, they are returning to their demolished homes and rebuilding. The Palestinian resolve is unmatched. They took in Trump’s news conference with laughter because they were unfazed by his illogical and criminal remarks. I am glad to see so many Democrats, and even some Republicans, speaking up—I only wish they had spoken up sooner. Now let’s dive into what Trump’s comments mean for us here in America. First, before we talk about rebuilding Gaza into the “Riviera of the Middle East,” what about rebuilding parts of North Carolina, Georgia, Tennessee, and most recently California, which have been devastated by natural disasters caused by climate change? What happened to “America First”? We still have lead pipes harming our children in Flint, Michigan, and other parts of the country. Any mention of that? Republicans, Democrats, and Independents alike care deeply about rebuilding America, yet Trump and his allies seem entirely uninterested. Second, Trump has long been vocal about his stance on “no more wars.” How does he plan on occupying Palestine without using American troops? Last time I checked, the President must ask Congress for permission to deploy troops. Both parties have neglected that part of the Constitution, and I spoke out when Democrats did it. I will definitely speak up now that Trump is doing it. Third, where is this money going to come from? Israel depends on American aid to the tune of tens of billions annually, as do Egypt and Jordan. Trump said there’s a lot of money in the region. Who was he referring to as picking up the tab for an American colony in the Middle East? And why would they do that? Nothing Trump said made any sense—but that’s what happens when you elect a sadistic, egomaniacal con artist. You get press conferences like the one we saw yesterday. We’ve known for a long time that this has been Netanyahu’s plan all along, **and Biden let him get away with genocide.** Frankly, we financed the whole thing. As Americans, we have a lot of self-reflection to do, starting with cleaning up our flawed electoral system. Nearly all of Congress is bribed by AIPAC, and everyone knows it. This is wrong, and it must change. This behavior is also hurting the Israeli people. Millions of Jewish Americans have spoken up about how harmful this is, and they are bullied and called traitors by the powerful, yet evil, AIPAC lobby. I want to share a few personal stories about my interactions with AIPAC over the years. When I first launched No Dem Left Behind, I was making fundraising calls and reached someone who immediately asked, “Are you team AIPAC or J Street?” I was taken aback, as the purpose of my call was to raise awareness and funds for House candidates running for Congress in rural America. Naively, I had no idea what Israel had to do with the subject. I told him, “Neither—I’m not really focused on foreign policy. My mission is to raise awareness and funds for these incredible candidates that have been overlooked by the party establishment.” He didn’t like that answer and hung up on me. Another interaction with AIPAC came at the DNC in Chicago this past summer. I was invited to a brunch by one of our vendors, and that’s when **I noticed something bizarre.** The room was filled with people mingling, making small talk, and networking. In the corner, however, were two men sitting alone with scowls on their faces, just watching everyone. Something was off about them, so I asked my friend, who invited me, who they were. She said, “Oh, stay away—those are AIPAC observers.” I was confused but left it alone. Even among peers and colleagues, they stood out. They weren’t there to network—they were there to intimidate and spy. This recent encounter still sends a shiver down my spine. I’m currently working on a media project I’ll share soon, but we’re still finalizing it. At a conference in D.C., I was introduced to someone closely aligned with AIPAC. They offered me **_two million dollars on the spot._** Do you have any idea how hard it is for me to raise two million dollars? Of course, I politely declined and walked away. But this is the world we live in. The power and resources AIPAC wields are staggering. One final story: Last fall, we had a brilliant fellow from Yale working with us at No Dem Left Behind. Something always seemed off whenever I asked him to do assignments related to the Palestine-Israel topic. One day, I told him, “If you disagree with me, I’m okay with that. Let me hear your perspective.” His response was, “No, I don’t.” Then he explained the problem: AIPAC had hired trucks to drive around campus blasting students’ faces and labeling them as antisemitic if they spoke up against the genocide. They did the same thing at Harvard, Princeton, Columbia, Berkeley, and basically all the Ivy League schools. This is AIPAC. This is who they are. This is what we’re up against. We know how they operate—through fear, coercion, and unchecked power. This is what we’re fighting against: a lobby that is not only harming Palestinians but also stifling free speech, targeting young voices, and corrupting the principles of democracy itself. And it’s time we stood up to them. In Solidarity, Hassan Martini
---

But this is the world we live in. The power and resources AIPAC wields are staggering. One final story: Last fall, we had a brilliant fellow from Yale working with us at No Dem Left Behind. Something always seemed off whenever I asked him to do assignments related to the Palestine-Israel topic. One day, I told him, “If you disagree with me, I’m okay with that. Let me hear your perspective.” His response was, “No, I don’t.” Then he explained the problem: AIPAC had hired trucks to drive around campus blasting students’ faces and labeling them as antisemitic if they spoke up against the genocide. They did the same thing at Harvard, Princeton, Columbia, Berkeley, and basically all the Ivy League schools. This is AIPAC. This is who they are. This is what we’re up against. We know how they operate—through fear, coercion, and unchecked power. This is what we’re fighting against: a lobby that is not only harming Palestinians but also stifling free speech, targeting young voices, and corrupting the principles of democracy itself. And it’s time we stood up to them. In Solidarity, Hassan Martini | | Thank you for your support in this pivotal time. | | | | | No Dem Left Behind PAC P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003 | You are subscribed to this email as dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to modify your or .

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: National Guard Arrests, Spudder Park, and Rocket Parts for Sale
body:
Texas National Guard troops have been authorized to make immigration arrests under a new agreement between Gov. Greg Abbott and the Trump administration. This further cements the state-federal partnership that has formed in recent weeks to secure the border and enforce federal immigration laws.

# Wednesday, February 5, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1844, the Texas Congress established a commission to oversee the construction of the [Central National Road](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j72OszAQAJ_G7kD2gsEULr6GLl97JVr_hdUZOzJWSN7-lOuvm2pG83XbbkiJ8v0_HsG0VywbCFCdgE6ozSOl9zZyb6zwi-TByHnQs9KT1Hw3FuVsRQxugHFaVLQjigm0jQrdpFBxMh-ZAKEkgALZo9MiDE4uoJ1fZGSjCJ5aqX3bQwsvPGN6l2eovSsHT2Zv7XGy4R-DlcF6XVffzh1LTpRDX-qdwbpj9raUbwZryK1SOBms7oOYuoyNSsbU1YKeV-MfF6VE5zSzUdwPpPQban-ePw38BAAA__9clVze), intended to connect Dallas County to Red River County. Subsequent westward expansion and the proliferation of railroad routes relegated the planned road to obsolescence, and it was never built. You can't buy stock in SpaceX, but you might be able to snag a piece of the recently exploded Starship rocket on eBay. Check out [the story](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAURL8Gd1hwbQwUFK9xl9duaRHA4UokICCx8_erpN9upJFmjs7PZbtYTPi4_bf3YPq55w0YCMqAMrF5i-m9zYM3V-Y1H4LhclJSqIWrIZpFXP3kpZw0SFDag9TeSlB23gVIxwc0nzEGTHAAAXy0TrEwOa5BOa_5TmYWPPZcxx5DD6dte3rnV6ijy_chmdh7aWT6R2AlsB7HMbpY8-PTEljdM_VnDQRWWzu69EmtWBdO2rqtLWKh4SwpN8wPWjC40Oj3hQLjjMGixxLLUI0vB6aEbZFkZre7xfQF6H8aeRn4DQAA__-luGOv) below in today's _Et Cetera_ section. ## National Guard Can Make Immigration Arrests
Texas National Guard troops have been [authorized to make immigration arrests](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuu6yAQRb_G7ohgGGwoKG6TLrc9pTUG7IyEH8Lk9fdHcX_KpS0tba2f23AjzrzO_2lJvr6nbQAJRkgQ0gyROH8GbKMfZXSqTV712vbGdsq2d28dKIu2o17rUZoRXa8AXQJEPZF1LfuvTII0CsCAulCwMumgHNgQnZoalCly3cql3lNNbzqm_NmeqVzCtrTZ32vdj0b_a-DawJX2Nb2O7_SFUjnk1MCVl4XnQpW3VZwOsZ5AWcwPKlHU8lh2YTpAxNBHVAaiss7IEUZlQiSrnUtt8XF_cc58dH2Dcl6I8_mj_hnm6eE3AAD__0ziY3o) under a new agreement between Gov. Greg Abbott and the Trump administration. This further cements the state-federal partnership that has formed in recent weeks to secure the border and enforce federal immigration laws. National Guard personnel must [maintain communication with Border Patrol officials](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL-SqyAUxp9GOxw4gmJBcZt0ue2WzhGOyCxKBtmQvP1O7Lf95vs3v6_7fMcQw-H_406mvNY0AwfFODCuZochvmfZOrNwN4mWjBh7PSo9CN1uxmqpJAxuGvWqcFF6WZwFqQfRK47ctcF8yjhwJQAUiA6t5tRbMYG2bhJrIzm5UFLuykaFXniu8Z2elDub9jaarZTH2fT_Grg1cKu1dgfVsxJ9fwwN3Hwmz3BJpbArzg4sIR0Ymf_B7FjY9-DzpTHMmc7CrktqarNxjxpiDOcwNpL7HUO8ZsufHJ4GfgMAAP__MdFg7Q) while making arrests. Previously, they have been restricted to erecting barriers and providing logistical support to federal border officials. In a Monday interview, Abbott said he immediately agreed to the [Trump administration's proposal](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2u4yAQxfGngY4IxsbBBcU27rLtltYYxgYJmwjP5uPtr5L-1kf6Hen_7zbfMJd8bH9xJ8-vtc6gwSoNSts5Yi7vuZfRLzqORpI3185drRuMk8mPbkUMsMQwLkD9AMNItgvWOkvRBiuz_2AatDUAFswFg9PUBTOCC3E0q-g1xcy1XTgR0wvPtbzrg9ol1F0Wn5jvp-j-CJgETJwo5VI-m4Ap1Z0Oep4CppORST2RQxIwWQO2643aGm0Kl6Uyq6-tDuRcDyxq-48tqj1vDQ9W2Bqd_IFk8_H-zKXkc7iKXm875u-f5F_jPDz8BAAA__-vDWg_) to enlist up to 3,000 Texas National Guard members in enforcing immigration law. The partnership will "boost manpower for border security," he said, arguing that Border Patrol agents are short-handed. Although National Guard troops are under the authority of their respective state governors unless federalized by the president, the deal is [likely to face legal challenges](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGSgyAQhp8GOxxYMWJBcY1drr3SWQWVCUgGNjF5-xszc-U123yz3-7__1zHK_rg9_UbozP0WtIIAlougIt2tOjDe1SVNZOwvayckV2ju1ZfpK42I5TWulmsWqZZKNVMs2gB-k5plJMFVXlzygSIVgK0IGuctXDNLHvQs-3lwpRw1lPKNW2O3AvLEt7p6XI9p1gFsxHdC2u-GAwMhuM46ltBOiGDYXdHYTCENGNgMJynGAwCztEwGD4-viP5tGPg6wOz5ZR4xJvjPka_5g_jmLMrVPhjty5zXLNz0e3ED08bp_yId442-t0X-tuYpkTEC77PD6ps7P3wIfhy6ZgSa0QfPgno30qfBn4DAAD__59Aeso) because the military is prohibited from engaging in law enforcement activities.
## Space Commission Awards First Grants
The newly established Texas Space Commission has [awarded $21.5 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ8Gd0SwBJsUFH_jLn97pUVgHa-E2ciQXPz2J0fXXjuj79Novq7TNVCmcv8fVvTtPfMECqxUIJWdUqC8T-cu-ZtKF92h14Nxg3W9dt3iUx8daG0VJLyZiIOxxkEwc29UGmzoyB8yBcpqAAv6FKJTaKK-gIvpomdxVpio8XZqCzZ8hzrnnV-4nSKvXfZLa48qzD8Bo4BxYU6ZCh6lgPFwCxgVCBg_rKyPEFFGXleqlbjIHJ4lLlglaGnlSjkfKRV530JpVTaWN-baZOYY8i9PJT1r23YBY7f59Pg-sNoP4qzua6D82db-POvl4ScAAP__XSpsug) to four projects in its first-ever grants from the $150 million Space Exploration and Aeronautics Research Fund. The bulk of the funding--nearly $20 million--went to an El Paso economic development organization to [build a U.S. Space Force facility](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGu3CAQRb8Gd7OCsb2LC4ptXER6KdKktHgw2EgYLGDX9t9H3qRNfY5m7r2_v6Yv7YOP80-9kqqHSxNy7IEj8H6y2odz6hqrvrkdRENKPFr56OVdyGZRouN3J1otsTXt8C3loNsBHfXaCkNEjVfXMY68F4g9ips2klNrxIDS2EE41nGyvqZ8qwtVOnRx4UxvyjeT1iaopdatsPbJcGQ47vt-W0u8GMORIrwKw7GSWWIKaT4ZjmXThoCOLaSsq0_xEg8TXsW_Cf5Sk9bVl-JThALO51JhzjrWAnOCmv5ZLmVD4CNQgE2XBDuVCp-M4IKflwqlvuz1VGd4PsXZjb9-NFnZbfch-HJ_sI7Pq_bhU6b-d923wj8BAAD__214gMc). The remaining amounts were awarded to El Paso County and two West Texas local government associations to study the feasibility of establishing a spaceflight corridor and launch site in the region. By the Jan. 21 deadline, the commission had received applications from 140 entities requesting a total of $3.46 billion. Commission Chair Gwen Griffin called the awarding of the first grants "[a milestone day](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kEFrtDAQQH9NvK1MRqPJIYfvK3gobCltoccwmlED2Y2Y1O7--9K99_54D97n2Z0pxHBdXujCttzm5BBQnQBPoJynEO-urbwdwRtZsZV9o3ulO6mr1fZdY4zWba86BN-D1xMbGkdlWpAjyirYXxkgKImoUNY0aeBmkgb15I2cRQvsQ0l7XVYufKM8x3s6eK-ndKmiXUvZsmj-CRwEDnmjiesHVi_pEDh8bTGRFzjMIbLA4ZmuDtuyuo_3J_c_0e7dmbmE6-JO7nXnnN0bR6bM9ebnard--w4xhtz1ooXlQiE-yuXPFYfFnwAAAP__fUhhCQ)." The commission is set to [consider additional grant requests](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPhCAQBeBfgx0bGESloLjGbq-90oww7pKgGCDr-u8v7tVXz7wvL-_nPt0xxLA9vnElW99LmkCA5gK40JPHEM-pbbydhTeyISt7NfR66OTQPK1pjdezbmelOpo7NLpT82Bcr6Sm3pkm2AsTILQE0CBv6AZBykkDg_NGLqwV5ENN-VafVOmNZYlnelG-ubQ20T5r3QtTXwxGBqM7lLkODMaNjsJgLDs64vTeY8pYQ9oYjCC55muIMaSN477n9CLP55N_fP4XcWldQynXy5IyL4R54Y-MW-V4YPYX3mTr9-OCStezVjxWDPFTrP671MvCbwAAAP__i65snw) during meetings on Feb. 10 and Feb. 28.
## Majority of Texans Back Casinos
A [recent poll](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGurCAURb8GO83hqCgFxWvo5rW3NAgHJcHRADOOf3_j9Lfb1V5Z6-cxPUyI4bn8Nxup8vH7hIB9DVhDPzkT4jV1lVMzOMkrUnxox6EfBR-rVaHDDlsvUHJEEtyKuRdeSM7NLAcLVVD3GSD0HLFH3hg7ArWWSxytk9yzDsiFsqemrFToY7KP1_6m1Nh9q6JaSzkya_8x1Az1eZ7Na23IvRjqJ525pjc9S2aoc9lToHvdRIba05xeJl0MNSB0X6nyqSMt9WK2-VZujvWoknLHGWIMWQysg2UzIX7h5c8ab4W_AQAA__8G-V_u) conducted by the University of Houston found that 73% of Texans favor allowing destination resort casinos in the state. The [support for casinos](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDEPmzAQhX-N2YzOBwZ78NCFLV07osM-g1UTIuyG5N9XidSx0xue9Ol979dtvlHK6b7-pJ1dfcVjRkAtASXoOVDK77lvglsgWNWwU2NnRm0GZZrNxQhm5GEBYwOazgMaNaLvtKVoGEyT3AcGCFohalQteQPceWXR-GBVFD1wSPU427px5ReVmN_Hk8_WH3uT3Vbro4juh8BJ4HRdV_t7O_58SoETnTX5zAKnO19F4JQPT1ng9AX9S7nSvnwMZaaryK9d5jWVTDU9WRYuJR13gRMaLS3aBchraQfTyR7HUVIMKAktMoBWMUJzuvC4Us6pDKPoYd0p5e_g-t8Hnw7_BgAA___S5nAd) crosses party lines, with backing from 72% of Republicans and 74% of Democrats. Online sports betting is also favored among both groups, with 59% support from Republicans and 64% from Democrats. Either proposal would require amending the state constitution through a two-thirds vote of the Texas House and Senate and a majority vote in a popular election. The poll results were published after the Dallas Mavericks' head-scratching trade of their star player to the Los Angeles Lakers. [Some fans have suggested](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uwyAUQOGngS3W5cLFMDB08ZauHS3CT4yK68hQ13n7Kt27nuGTzsd1vvpSy9f93a_J9TNvMwLSBfACNEdf6nNWPLobRCt4cmKUZiSjheGLA6XkjWLIlLIOCpEIcwYRyErSYHlxLwwQSCASisEHA0kGYdGEaEVmClIsfduHvqSeTt9yfW5H2oewrby6pfdHY_KN4cRwOl-V4RSWvbT5c_d9O0plOLXu-3djOAljtFAGpZLaGkCSxHcXHz-l1tL0yBTcV1_qH9___T0c_gYAAP__JSFUvg) the trade was a move by the majority owner--Las Vegas Sands Corp., which has tried for years to get casinos legalized in Texas--to [sabotage](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuO4yAYhZ8Gd1jwY2woKLZxl223tH5zSdDiYAGxk7cfeYrppv3ORUfn3225YUzxef-LmzftHfICDCRlQJlcHMb0WYbOmZU5zTtv-CTUJNXIVfcwggFqYTl3o9BsmOTK9AgQFOAwBh26aK4yBkxyAAm8R6uYF5ZrUNZpHsjAvIstl749fPNvrCF98uFLb_PWJfNoba9E_CEwE5jP8-zPgHiJBGYsLdrkCcx1z6VVAvNzRQLzhocv0f6_iMOUsNIfRF2su0-0vLZcKsU1vxrd8uFpy_RyHv6OVxDURIdRIxtFoEI6RQc-IUUWVooe1GS5XDnyrhi3nzGlWMeJDOy-YUzf89uvfx4GvgIAAP__ktN2DQ)[ the franchise](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuO4yAYhZ8Gd1jwY2woKLZxl223tH5zSdDiYAGxk7cfeYrppv3ORUfn3225YUzxef-LmzftHfICDCRlQJlcHMb0WYbOmZU5zTtv-CTUJNXIVfcwggFqYTl3o9BsmOTK9AgQFOAwBh26aK4yBkxyAAm8R6uYF5ZrUNZpHsjAvIstl749fPNvrCF98uFLb_PWJfNoba9E_CEwE5jP8-zPgHiJBGYsLdrkCcx1z6VVAvNzRQLzhocv0f6_iMOUsNIfRF2su0-0vLZcKsU1vxrd8uFpy_RyHv6OVxDURIdRIxtFoEI6RQc-IUUWVooe1GS5XDnyrhi3nzGlWMeJDOy-YUzf89uvfx4GvgIAAP__ktN2DQ) in the hopes of eventually moving the team to Las Vegas. A company representative dismissed the rumor.

Babe Ruth, Lou Gehrig, and Jerome "Dizzy" Dean all played there. This further cements the state-federal partnership that has formed in recent weeks to secure the border and enforce federal immigration laws. | | | | | | Wednesday, February 5, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1844, the Texas Congress established a commission to oversee the construction of the , intended to connect Dallas County to Red River County. Subsequent westward expansion and the proliferation of railroad routes relegated the planned road to obsolescence, and it was never built. You can't buy stock in SpaceX, but you might be able to snag a piece of the recently exploded Starship rocket on eBay. Check out below in today's Et Cetera section. Greg Abbott and the Trump administration. This further cements the state-federal partnership that has formed in recent weeks to secure the border and enforce federal immigration laws. National Guard personnel must while making arrests. Previously, they have been restricted to erecting barriers and providing logistical support to federal border officials. In a Monday interview, Abbott said he immediately agreed to the to enlist up to 3,000 Texas National Guard members in enforcing immigration law. The partnership will "boost manpower for border security," he said, arguing that Border Patrol agents are short-handed. Although National Guard troops are under the authority of their respective state governors unless federalized by the president, the deal is because the military is prohibited from engaging in law enforcement activities. Space Commission Awards First Grants The newly established Texas Space Commission has to four projects in its first-ever grants from the $150 million Space Exploration and Aeronautics Research Fund. The bulk of the funding--nearly $20 million--went to an El Paso economic development organization to . The remaining amounts were awarded to El Paso County and two West Texas local government associations to study the feasibility of establishing a spaceflight corridor and launch site in the region. By the Jan. 21 deadline, the commission had received applications from 140 entities requesting a total of $3.46 billion. Commission Chair Gwen Griffin called the awarding of the first grants "." The commission is set to during meetings on Feb. 10 and Feb. 28. Majority of Texans Back Casinos A conducted by the University of Houston found that 73% of Texans favor allowing destination resort casinos in the state. The crosses party lines, with backing from 72% of Republicans and 74% of Democrats. Online sports betting is also favored among both groups, with 59% support from Republicans and 64% from Democrats. Either proposal would require amending the state constitution through a two-thirds vote of the Texas House and Senate and a majority vote in a popular election. The poll results were published after the Dallas Mavericks' head-scratching trade of their star player to the Los Angeles Lakers. the trade was a move by the majority owner--Las Vegas Sands Corp., which has tried for years to get casinos legalized in Texas--to in the hopes of eventually moving the team to Las Vegas. body:
I need your response...

| |
---
| | | Since the day I was announced as the DOGE Chair, I've been reaching out to every TOP patriot I can find to ask for their thoughts on how our country can run more efficiently.

I'm beyond appreciative of the input I've received, but truthfully, Friend, I was really hoping for a response from you.

We need three more responses from your area to complete our DOGE Priorities Survey.

_**[That's why I'm reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Can I count on you?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/xcxN0cQSv0qmiaI8dyMUbZRRR9ZQ_DAEAlyxrFqlD8YWK4YlYvdPQQaZSbr6K3mhzM-f89uxku_OWNlhNY9WSPUwT8lZVTgJ7DfXfKr70o1MZeYbExatckdteCoK3TX4aCK9qDmsldaRMrgO0gEOeGtJ-HQdlliYeSOrD2RUQCy4LWRp9fH0UTNstfDnEVxRr-4134TcdjnwEHTRaR8KYbihfAjhkXabP-KQThN5ID6aK8adb3nc3j-nl9MVNKATlSVmTO1OER_GXU4y4B0HHPPSWY73iIIl7cREoiCtCnDa4z_HT0dIiCmQCvISdrhbjB4N2VoH2g9Flkp8XvpjkDzghq6fWVk7xXFAPqU_x2M32LWlmyV-2ME4HFSEKq9jYfLi_9y6iYpVsWjt7CUG670Ea50QMZbl19TVR3V2-kqYK7Jl8SV22IQcdE0Cv31KsxS3F4tdPF8EOnFq7LR15fq_LFja5eXHb2EOInYDv4_rkt4pxqjowRm1qIfK-Q/sG5_CUj1TsY5c3GD1zj6fFA3O22m6guW/5 "That’s why I’m reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Can I count on you?")**_

Thanks in advance,

Joni Ernst

name: Joni Ernst [iPhone]
subject: Your response could be the difference I need.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joni for Iowa
body:
I need your response...

| |
---
| | | Since the day I was announced as the DOGE Chair, I've been reaching out to every TOP patriot I can find to ask for their thoughts on how our country can run more efficiently.

I'm beyond appreciative of the input I've received, but truthfully, Friend, I was really hoping for a response from you.

We need three more responses from your area to complete our DOGE Priorities Survey.

_**[That's why I'm reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Can I count on you?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=e9cd8735bb254bde8df67fceac259d2a&_e=OFCDUH1xexXDWWMdkV0Z0jEfXU_7ckb7xAleioTqyV2salTug0pPFjaPadnpbNY59JG9CjuCXiHfiOxvCSzThClRGjszj2a7-O30DEG2ZYpAto1HiiyqlXGbNgvoZthWUGFN7sVzb-q-hU-k6sv2oAEdA2BWQbOd_yMWVQxnBoyG2BxEkkpjom0WWNyPNSunUqN5ym8TSDRGLgZF6OmYrioKwyWqKGMaXI5oJrXY4t8q6kaOl85Sxi_uwWtqStfnQTRTxEDVmgSHX9_WgDBKNd8_KialfVLOkpsVXGrEvPfgi0T5dPhuBD9bB26yuFtizUbKNL0Vc7hi-fZiqacpI0Row00QZ7s13EpTD-AOK4Tqr6TQn40I0Ymvr6lhTMliTMdYX0l52MLH3A0o4S-roAINHMP6C8BCW-V66KplCyJQrS9O9hg4TZTA5ceIxFGk "That’s why I’m reaching out to you one final time today to ask for your urgent feedback to finalize our cost-cutting strategy to get America back on the right track. Thanks in advance,

Joni Ernst

name: Rachel
subject: Today I'm Sharing A Prophetic Dream🌟🌠
body:
Don’t Miss Today’s Episode of The Rachel Hamm Show: A Prophetic Dream & It's Interpretation Revealed! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/rachelhamm/today-im-sharing-a-prophetic-dream?e=5fa0631807)
---
| |
---
|
#
I hope this message finds you well and thriving! I’m reaching out with an exciting invitation to join me for today’s episode of The Rachel Hamm Show, where I’ll be sharing something special—a prophetic dream that I recently experienced. In this episode, I will not only recount the vivid details of the dream but also delve into its interpretation, exploring the profound insights and messages it holds. Whether you’re a long-time follower of the show or tuning in for the first time, I believe this episode will offer you a unique perspective and perhaps even resonate with your own experiences. Here’s what you can expect: \- A detailed recounting of the dream, filled with intriguing symbols and imagery. \- An in-depth interpretation, drawing connections to current events and personal growth. I'm excited to share this dream with you and to hear your thoughts and interpretations. Your engagement and feedback mean the world to me, and I look forward to our continued exploration of these fascinating topics together. Don’t miss out! body:

name: Eric Underwood, Chairman
subject: CALL TO ACTION: Inheritance Tax - LB468💰
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
🚨TODAY - Testify Online or In-person🚨 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/23105210b457/n41kepo7ku-12729578?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ad92406113&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | **Is Nebraska's Inheritance Tax Fair? LB468 Offers a Solution.**
**_INHERITANCE BILL LB468_
(Senator Clements’ Priority Bill)**

**Nebraska's inheritance tax system is outdated and unfair. It's the only tax in Nebraska based on your relationship to the deceased, not the value of the estate. This creates a system where distant relatives and non-family members face drastically higher tax rates, often forcing them to sell inherited property, like family farms, just to pay the tax.

Nebraska is also one of only a handful of states with an inheritance tax at all, putting us at a competitive disadvantage. **

**LB468 offers a common-sense reform.

Currently, taxes range from 1% for immediate family to 15% for non-relatives. LB468 would set a rate of 1% for everyone inheriting property in Nebraska, with a $100,000 exemption.**
**Real-World Example:** **A farmer dies, leaving a $5 million estate. Under the current system, an immediate family member would pay around $49,000 in inheritance tax. A niece or nephew, however, could face a staggering tax bill of over $545,000! LB468 would ensure both pay the same fair 1% rate. With Nebraska farmland averaging millions of dollars, this isn't just a theoretical problem – it's a real threat to family farms and inheritances.**

[](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=7f30a44771&e=25844e23a8) **CALL TO ACTION ** **[Hearing on Wednesday, February 5, 2025](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ee2173143d&e=25844e23a8) ** **Time 1:30pm ** **Room 1524 ** **• Testify in person ** **• Sign sheet at hearing door ** **• Submit online testimony by 8:00 am Wednesday, Feb. 5. **
* **Fairness:** The current system is based on who you know, not the value of what you inherit. LB468 makes the system fair for everyone.
* **Family Farms:** Imagine a farmer passing away, leaving their land to a niece or nephew. Under the current system, the tax burden could force them to sell the farm just to pay the inheritance tax. LB468 protects family farms and legacies.
* **Competitive Advantage:** Neighboring states have eliminated or reduced their inheritance taxes, making Nebraska less attractive for families and businesses. LB468 helps Nebraska compete.
* **Reliable Funding:** County "slush funds" based on inheritance tax revenue are unpredictable. LB468 encourages responsible county budget management.
* **Death Tax:** The inheritance tax is often called a "death tax," because it penalizes people during a difficult time. LB468 reduces this burden.

**Email Revenue Committee Senators:
• [Sen. R. Brad von Gillern, Chairperson](mailto:bvongillern@leg.ne.gov?subject=INHERITANCE%20BILL%20LB468)
• [Sen. Mike Jacobson, Vice Chairperson](mailto:mjacobson@leg.ne.gov?subject=INHERITANCE%20BILL%20LB468)
• [Sen. Eliot Bostar](mailto:ebostar@leg.ne.gov?subject=INHERITANCE%20BILL%20LB468)
• [Sen. George Dungan](mailto:gdungan@leg.ne.gov?subject=INHERITANCE%20BILL%20LB468)
• [Sen. Teresa Ibach](mailto:tibach@leg.ne.gov?subject=INHERITANCE%20BILL%20LB468)
• [Sen. Kathleen Kauth](mailto:kkauth@leg.ne.gov?subject=INHERITANCE%20BILL%20LB468)
• [Sen. Dave Murman](mailto:dmurman@leg.ne.gov?subject=INHERITANCE%20BILL%20LB468)
• [Sen. Tony Sorrentino](mailto:tsorrentino@leg.ne.gov?subject=INHERITANCE%20BILL%20LB468)** **\--Chairman Eric Underwood
Republican Party of Nebraska**

name: MassGOP
subject: MassGOP Condemns Reckless Spending on Migrant Crisis, Calls for Urgent Reform
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001USESdT0RN_MkdciYIdQiId7iwERqWTQXggQt58bs7I8gwlnEqeB93jkLssOHwNbMO5pWQly3_Mmke-_EeDNsUkIkmXtDwtjIMHdLLylNNNNlhbWjR1AVrr__XFLofcbRjHS0eYCllQ29ErKh9GK4pA==&c=J61x10-Mzf3g8AVeVu6SXGTSnpVI8zemw5x6F4fVpB33YtWSWYAEpA==&ch=SLqD39XPDJrEu8RvKWvwTYCaDz7BqnmjGCYeIgsDjsoVqhL4QKUyOQ==)
---
| MassGOP Condemns Reckless Spending on Migrant Crisis, Calls for Urgent Reform
---
---
| Boston, MA -The Massachusetts Republican Party strongly opposes any additional taxpayer funding for the ongoing migrant crisis absent reform, which has spiraled into a taxpayer-funded humanitarian disaster. Massachusetts residents have already been forced to shoulder more than $1 billion to sustain a failing emergency assistance system that has become a breeding ground for crime and a never-ending financial black hole. Without meaningful reforms--many of which have been championed by Republicans--there is no justification for continuing this reckless and dangerous spending.
MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale issued a strong statement on the proposed supplemental budget, saying:
"The Healey-Driscoll Administration and the Democratic supermajority have demonstrated time and again that they are incapable of managing this crisis. Instead of prioritizing public safety and fiscal responsibility, they have chosen political pandering at the expense of both taxpayers and those caught in the broken shelter system. Thanks to a MassGOP FOIA request, the full extent of the horrors occurring within these migrant shelters has been exposed. Given these disturbing revelations, how can Democrats, in good conscience, continue funneling taxpayer dollars into this failed system? If this supplemental budget is passed without critical Republican-led reforms, it will be yet another instance of irresponsible spending with no real solution in sight. The only viable path forward is through reform."
The MassGOP remains committed to fighting for transparency, accountability, and meaningful reform in how Massachusetts handles this crisis. The party urges lawmakers to reject wasteful spending and instead enact policies that protect taxpayers and restore order to the emergency assistance system.

### ###

★ ★ ★
This isn't the update we wanted to send. **We fell short of yesterday 's $100,000 fundraising goal.**
Falling short of a big goal so early in the year could impact our ability to provide the support service members need throughout 2025 and beyond.
**That 's why we're extending our urgent goal deadline -- and our birthday giveaway offer -- until midnight tonight. [Will you rush $29 or more now to help provide critical resources for our heroes in uniform and claim your free USO hat with a gift of $20 or more?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/KAeVs7X2-)**
[RUSH YOUR BELATED BIRTHDAY GIFT NOW!](https://links.e.uso.)
---
The USO's 84th birthday isn't just a day to celebrate our long legacy of supporting America's military -- it's a chance to recommit to our mission, our _promise_ to always be there for service members and their families here at home and wherever they're deployed. **And you are a pivotal part of this mission.**
Please help us make up this gap: **[Donate now $29 or more to help reach our extended birthday goal by midnight tonight and we'll send you a USO hat as a special thank you.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/KAeVs7X2-)**

clean_body: We missed our birthday goal. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ | ★ ★ ★ | | ★ ★ ★ This isn't the update we wanted to send. We fell short of yesterday 's $100,000 fundraising goal. Falling short of a big goal so early in the year could impact our ability to provide the support service members need throughout 2025 and beyond. That 's why we're extending our urgent goal deadline -- and our birthday giveaway offer -- until midnight tonight. The USO's 84th birthday isn't just a day to celebrate our long legacy of supporting America's military -- it's a chance to recommit to our mission, our promise to always be there for service members and their families here at home and wherever they're deployed. And you are a pivotal part of this mission. Please help us make up this gap: Thank you so much for your support. --Team USO United Service Organizations, Inc. | | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/elise-stefanik-mops-the-floor-with?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Trump's nominee for U.S. ambassador to the United Nations, **[Elise Stefanik, refused to be lied to by smug Democrat](https://substack.com/redirect/5ec3dd7f-777e-4698-b57e-27fa4d42f42a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Senator Tim Kaine during her confirmation hearing when he tried to pretend Democrats do not support open borders.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/5ec3dd7f-777e-4698-b57e-27fa4d42f42a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5ec3dd7f-777e-4698-b57e-27fa4d42f42a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Kaine began to press Stefanik about **[a tweet she posted](https://substack.com/redirect/8b191a7e-1454-402f-9620-2016e6c5b89a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** accusing Democrats of wanting wide open borders and mass amnesty so that illegals can vote in U.S. elections.
Stefanik assured senators that she strongly stood for securing the U.S. border and her tweet reflected her intent to do so.
"Are there any Democratic senators that you think are for open borders and mass amnesty for illegal immigrants?" Kaine asked Stefanik.
Stefanik began to point out that democrat think tanks have pushed open border rhetoric, before Kaine interrupted her: "I'm talking about senators, are there any Democrat senators you would level that charge against?" he asked.
"I do think there are Democrat senators who are for open borders," she fired back bluntly. Kaine's gotcha question didn't work on Stefanik because she was willing to stick by her guns.
Watch the tense exchange here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/5ec3dd7f-777e-4698-b57e-27fa4d42f42a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# _Need To Know:_ Trump announces U.S. "take over" of Gaza Strip
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c25a2d5d-a121-4b78-a2e9-54ca4000b5f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
President Donald Trump **[announced that the U.S. will"take over" the Gaza Strip,](https://substack.com/redirect/c25a2d5d-a121-4b78-a2e9-54ca4000b5f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** an embattled territory in Israel that is currently the site of death and carnage, following a visit from Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to the White House, Tuesday.
"The U.S. will take over the Gaza Strip, and we will do a job with it, too," Trump said alongside Netanyahu at a press conference. "We'll own it and be responsible for dismantling all of the dangerous, unexplored bombs and other weapons on the site."
"Level the site and get rid of the destroyed buildings, level it out, create an economic development that will supply unlimited numbers of jobs and housing for the people of the area," he continued. "Do a real job. Do something different. Just can't go back. If you go back, it's going to end up the same way it has for 100 years."
Trump added that he could see the U.S. in a "longterm ownership" of the strip that would bring peace and stability to the region.
* * *
**[Presented By Goldco](https://substack.com/redirect/1dee0664-f508-4a31-a4c5-012eaa049c5b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
