subject: Two weeks of chaos and confusion
body:
Hi Friend, Like you, my past two weeks have been filled with chaos and confusion in the aftermath of the swearing-in of our 47th President.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101576809/526408473/-1283252511?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjRkMzE2OWItY2FlMy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QoUIQmadRnaFvmwiH4RcWbRcTk9ooEwncnKypC6mV4k=&emci=9f6d8abc-25e3-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=b4d3169b-cae3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=12466492)
---
| | Hi Friend,
---
Like you, my past two weeks have been filled with chaos and confusion in the aftermath of the swearing-in of our 47th President.
---
Without any hesitation, Trump is wreaking havoc on our government with unlawful funding freezes that threaten negative impact nationwide for families, children, seniors, veterans, first responders, and countless hard-working Americans.
---
He is gutting our international foreign assistance programs that do life-saving work and promote our interests abroad.
---
He even gave Elon Musk free rein to access Americans’ most sensitive Social Security, tax, and banking information.
---
This is just a sampling of the catastrophic set of failures from the White House and Republican majorities in Congress so far.
---
**But I didn’t go to Congress to merely complain, I ran to work for my constituents to ensure everyone has the opportunity to thrive.**
---
I swiftly pushed back on the illegal efforts to defund Medicaid and stop children who rely on Head Start programs in my district from receiving the federal support they need. I’m demanding answers from the State Department for their decision to undermine national security, foreign aid, and retreat from America’s leadership in the world. And I joined people from across the country in saying no to Trump’s attempts to raise our costs with his tax hike on our groceries.
---
---
I’ll continue working hard, but I need your help. Because I’ve been so loud, I’ll be a target of those celebrating the dysfunction coming out of Washington.
---
**[Can you help me show that we’re in this together to stop Trump by making sure we have the resources we need to fight back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101576810/526408474/570291875?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjRkMzE2OWItY2FlMy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QoUIQmadRnaFvmwiH4RcWbRcTk9ooEwncnKypC6mV4k=)**
---
[**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101576811/526408475/570291875?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU0NTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjRkMzE2OWItY2FlMy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QoUIQmadRnaFvmwiH4RcWbRcTk9ooEwncnKypC6mV4k=)
---
We’re elected to serve for times like these. Let’s stick together as we take on the challenges ahead.
---
-Gabe
---
| | |
---

And I joined people from across the country in saying no to Trump’s attempts to raise our costs with his tax hike on our groceries. I’ll continue working hard, but I need your help. Because I’ve been so loud, I’ll be a target of those celebrating the dysfunction coming out of Washington. = = We’re elected to serve for times like these. Let’s stick together as we take on the challenges ahead. -Gabe | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | Gabe Amo for Congress P.O. Box 40457 Providence, RI 02940 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Climate Power (via Left Action)
subject: If you’re looking to do something to counteract Trump’s executive orders, look inside:
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | | | Team -- Donald Trump made one priority clear on the first day of his second term: He attacked clean energy progress, immediately signing executive orders that roll back protections and benefit his Big Oil backers. **He (once again) signed an executive order to pull our country out of the Paris Climate Agreement** \-- a move that will hamper domestic and international efforts to combat the climate crisis. **And as he promised to the Oil and Gas executives who donated to his campaign, he restarted the review of toxic fossil fuel export facilities**. Trump even tried to create a definition for energy for his government that defines solar and wind out of our country’s energy portfolio. That was just day one of Trump’s presidency. But it’s a signal of what we should expect going forward. We know that there will be more attacks on our clean energy progress in the days, weeks, and years to come -- but we also know that together, with this team, we can fight back and mitigate his harm. [**If you’re looking to do something to counteract Trump’s executive orders, please add your name to condemn his attacks on our climate. With your support, we’ll show his climate-denying administration just how strong our clean energy movement is. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T73273724-471f-4073-82e4-0cee1c0d7c93/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [SIGN YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T960af1d3-5162-496e-a237-40bb67beae26/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Our goals are clear:
* We’ll keep telling the story of climate action and the benefits it’s bringing to communities across the country.
* We'll ensure our elected officials know their reputations and their communities are at stake -- and more importantly, the future is at stake.
* And we’ll go after anyone who threatens good-paying, family-supporting clean energy jobs and our future.

**But to do this work we need people from every corner of the country standing against Trump's dangerous climate agenda. [If you’re with us, add your name to say that you condemn any legislation that reverses critical climate protections and threatens good-paying, clean energy jobs. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a2a76a3-2d66-40ba-9f30-6cc24982834c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thanks so much for being with us in this fight.
Climate Power
---
|

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Team -- Donald Trump made one priority clear on the first day of his second term: He attacked clean energy progress, immediately signing executive orders that roll back protections and benefit his Big Oil backers. He (once again) signed an executive order to pull our country out of the Paris Climate Agreement \-- a move that will hamper domestic and international efforts to combat the climate crisis. And as he promised to the Oil and Gas executives who donated to his campaign, he restarted the review of toxic fossil fuel export facilities. Trump even tried to create a definition for energy for his government that defines solar and wind out of our country’s energy portfolio. That was just day one of Trump’s presidency. But it’s a signal of what we should expect going forward. We know that there will be more attacks on our clean energy progress in the days, weeks, and years to come -- but we also know that together, with this team, we can fight back and mitigate his harm. | | | | | | | Our goals are clear: We’ll keep telling the story of climate action and the benefits it’s bringing to communities across the country. We'll ensure our elected officials know their reputations and their communities are at stake -- and more importantly, the future is at stake. And we’ll go after anyone who threatens good-paying, family-supporting clean energy jobs and our future. But to do this work we need people from every corner of the country standing against Trump's dangerous climate agenda. Thanks so much for being with us in this fight. Climate Power | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on and Follow Us | | | ---|---|--- | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

## USAID Shutting Down Overseas Missions, Nearly All Staff Will Be Placed on Leave: Report – RedState
Elon Musk has referred to the U.S. Agency for International Development (USAID) as a "criminal organization" that must "die." Now, it appears that is exactly what is happening. # **Just me Doing What I do Best—Calling Out The HOT GARBAGE, Especially From Our Nanny Governor**
---
| |
## Democrats Are Losing Their Minds Over Accountability For Where Our Tax Dollars Are Going?
---
Trump just called for investigations into who’s getting kickbacks from the outrageous spending at USAID—and now you see why the Democrats are panicking.This is EXACTLY why we fought so hard. The American people are DONE with corrupt politicians lining their pockets while we struggle to make ends meet.If these so-called “public servants” have been using our hard-earned tax dollars to enrich themselves, then it’s time for a reckoning. We DEMAND accountability. No more games. No more cover-ups.

Dear Friend, We have a lot to update you on, but please know that as we grow, your support becomes increasingly vital to us. I encourage you to make a meaningful contribution today to strengthen our financial standing as we continue to fight in the legislative sessions happening RIGHT now. To give, please click on one of the links below. For stock donations or IRA distributions, contact Dana Craycroft at [dana@statefreedomcaucus.org](mailto:sprinzi@statefreedomcaucus.org "sprinzi@statefreedomcaucus.org") or Sara Prinzi at [sprinzi@statefreedomcaucus.org](mailto:sprinzi@statefreedomcaucus.org "sprinzi@statefreedomcaucus.org").

Now on to the update. Across our states, we're celebrating preliminary passage of universal school choice, a ban on eminent domain abuse, and Save Girls Sports, plus more!Here are some of the highlights:**SOUTH DAKOTA** Last year, the **South Dakota Freedom Caucus** led an epic fight against a crony pipeline deal that the Establishment was trying to pass into law. The bill would seize private property through eminent domain and hand it off to the special interest groups that would profit off the bill. The voters were so angry that they defeated 14 liberal Republicans who supported the bill. Momentum from that was so great that the State House just [passed a bill last week](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTji3-2Bfpk4rqiviUWmSBgwSZIRfu36E-2B0VR1zvbx9SViXGtxBEHR9aLH-2BSYNQn1x7QG1KPUHl-2FqjgzUJuP7DWTbu4-3Dvft9_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerKKMHIrTfBXMuzAtevIHghVTIhlWHDWIDRXF-2BdwvosF9IibN6Cnzp39D0KOqrggTy-2F5-2FCms-2FmyLNAlwTQ4EEmNt7-2FlI9MHGmykd-2Blwr3CndVfcgvcFKjqY8YBkX1BbQX-2FAYMcAg-2B6-2B9nSnmsi823n5tLQX0NwhGaluH1GNa3gPmvgEVHZRVBYV7coDWD44CA1iCD1LznS1JYdvkThSUK-2Br-2FBtqoKB424kO0KYvilGqao-3D) that would prevent eminent domain abuse. Elections, as always, have consequences! **WYOMING** The **Wyoming Freedom Caucus** is in full control of the Wyoming State House and they are following through on their campaign promises. They just [passed universal school choice](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjppHen015Gx6AaFY6rk-2BtVnxg3UDt3VxPFT0IyUftWqrVcnBrnPHGbrW1KwektksSujS4M4QQhZNJ2dq8TYPEOY-3DfpTk_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerKKMHIrTfBXMuzAtevIHghVTIhlWHDWIDRXF-2BdwvosF9IibN6Cnzp39D0KOqrggTy-2F5-2FCms-2FmyLNAlwTQ4EEmNgzy-2BMNyQy2oSQ5-2BDOSdoqpvfJgbtqz8QquptGMCaIAxFs4PrD6TPp4bhdEWE75aQI-2B0TwomPyW9-2BeDrS8z39w1Lvc1l5etmmeUVZonsPLAiHjhNC8gSGWkBHU4AexSPf5ykmSTjnOJ1hQt16PF6vlc-3D) on the same day that President Trump signed an executive order instructing the federal government to expand school choice. The bill is now headed to the State Senate, where its outcome is uncertain, but the WY Freedom Caucus's strong mandate for conservative reforms will force them to negotiate.**ARIZONA** Congressman Andy Biggs, a proud House Freedom Caucus member and former chairman, recently announced his decision to run for governor in 2026.Within hours, the **Arizona Freedom Caucus** proudly endorsed him. Can you imagine Governor Biggs and the AZFC working hand in hand to make Arizona great again? * **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas Senate to vote today on school choice bill,** " Dallas Morning News' **Philip Jankowski** -- "The Texas Senate is [poised to pass a "school choice" bill](https://substack.com/redirect/9824442a-4268-4577-9d44-cb5c4901e483?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Wednesday that would allow parents to use taxpayer dollars for private school education.

Lt. Gov. **Dan Patrick,** who presides over the Senate, has vowed to pass [Senate Bill 2](https://substack.com/redirect/12734b76-0b77-455a-a173-40f48f0bd86b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and send it to the Texas House, where similar school voucher-style bills fell short in previous legislative sessions.

Gov. **Greg Abbott** has made school choice his [No. 1 policy goal](https://substack.com/redirect/32276b2a-732c-4300-9ba1-4c8bae98d0b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for the Legislature.

The debate and votes will be livestreamed by the Texas Senate at [senate.texas.gov/av-live.php](https://substack.com/redirect/85d55628-336b-4aa6-8d4d-7ccad23ec7bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The Senate session begins at noon, and SB 2 is the only bill set for debate Wednesday.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/12caf6ab-79df-4d2f-b74c-765b3decb4ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
SB 2 would create a fund for education savings accounts, a school voucher-style program, with $1 billion from the state budget devoted to the fund. Officials have estimated it would provide enough funding for 90,000 students.

All Texas school-age children would be eligible to apply for an education savings account. Students chosen would get $10,000 to put toward a certified private school. Special education children could receive $11,500. Home-schooled children could get $2,000 to put toward their education.

The bill creates tiered access. If the number of children applying for an education savings account exceeds the $1 billion currently allocated for the fund, $800 million would be prioritized for low-income families or children receiving special education who previously attended public school.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/12caf6ab-79df-4d2f-b74c-765b3decb4ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The bill defines low income as families earning five times the federal poverty level, or about $160,000 a year for a family of four.

The remaining $200 million would be available to children of all income levels and include those who are currently in private school.

Similar proposals have passed the Senate numerous times in previous years. Support for the bill falls largely on partisan lines in the Senate, where Republicans hold a strong majority of 20 out of 31 seats.

Patrick has boasted that SB 2 will face little resistance in the Senate, telling KTVT-TV last week that he would send the bill "like a rocket ship" to the House.

The House is a different story. In previous years, similar bills have been defeated by a coalition of Democrats and rural Republicans who opposed using taxpayer money for private school education.

Many House Republicans who opposed school choice retired or were unseated in bruising 2024 Republican primaries in which Abbott actively campaigned against incumbents. Abbott's political opposition was fueled by $10 million from GOP megadonor **Jeff Yass** , a Pennsylvania billionaire and leading school choice advocate.

Abbott has said he has at least 79 votes to pass the measure - a majority of the 150-member House." [DMN](https://substack.com/redirect/fc72e2cf-9f61-4c3f-8ac1-5f8e4ed38b85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

Support for the bill falls largely on partisan lines in the Senate, where Republicans hold a strong majority of 20 out of 31 seats. Patrick has boasted that SB 2 will face little resistance in the Senate, telling KTVT-TV last week that he would send the bill "like a rocket ship" to the House. The House is a different story. In previous years, similar bills have been defeated by a coalition of Democrats and rural Republicans who opposed using taxpayer money for private school education. Many House Republicans who opposed school choice retired or were unseated in bruising 2024 Republican primaries in which Abbott actively campaigned against incumbents. Abbott's political opposition was fueled by $10 million from GOP megadonor Jeff Yass , a Pennsylvania billionaire and leading school choice advocate. Abbott has said he has at least 79 votes to pass the measure - a majority of the 150-member House." ($) FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. Free subscribers will only receive the top story in their morning email. Lt. Gov. **Dan Patrick,** who presides over the Senate, has vowed to pass [Senate Bill 2](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.y1qQg7vX491TJbzrGLYTuEYT0yv_aZw1IceJac_-o0Y-UGIWKkPTFm9Kz5DRdvb_-aYU7NLaOywMgY5yceksY9DWMi5G6R03DGvEJyxx5SfsnqSm8utBaOjxj7L3V0QonPUv6BCzh6oHjFmI0ky7e59u_AIRgyCCKpPV6_ajOkZ4Jc4M3t0JeogwSbXWtKvIjf5oUdUoi-FpRu2MupmKy2rv3801Z-zDAI-d5mtL7R7ZavaZGLV28wUlT6y_NJ5cqemrf7zWj1kjNmi0mYnotYUC2t3nnyQpHTumITSvQ68X-Vi8MliZCvjL5KYTRr-iJnB-_TK64tz6KgwjogpWeBlKSnUrC1uE826vLH-8bnXLl3Bd4WbzV4X6gMJSQVW7xPPYy3k3AAp-cot8jIu-nwjn2p3GuXwdwwcBxBxG5wF1S_-D87LGdkc2ZsDe05IJ-kSBPWjuHyxeVHeZuHX2OL_J5sKhSnCvX7TlCWuCdyxbzoYcbEIu2wLz_PrH1cnq/4dr/4xL8Hvr1QyWuL9wvK4jgSQ/h24/h001.RAomnRiEJA3tSLxZ3x0UiyFy9Vr5gie79aUnjDyaNas) and send it to the Texas House, where similar school voucher-style bills fell short in previous legislative sessions.

The Senate session begins at noon, and SB 2 is the only bill set for debate Wednesday.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.IpGzAqnc3m6dMmKQdod4OdZdsfX-sjnRfDuEmaXW-5lN-IqpP1xu2_Ygevf9CBs8iGkDwdDuKv-OIdRCcryDDgoqnwbBfsyGSk_4VJrOSCvmgxZEZTEXv72w0U68JXHpny88FhFoE4mM3a9phL8bbEUrfKXadd5zbuQvbOX473l9S2yP7fuKMunflyAzWwAfWVCs10U0e4EhCqUI6BD8E8Fa9HIpg4xTR7LJmRHG4qFSuk4uHxT1SNoMpjnhlYN_NQ3xtw8f70j74snKukEcSAgoBDaov52KaIKB69WeU9--5fmis7aeR3aLzZy-BDgB6pbMwjwjGjLze3eExLugyoXQC3P9wQJQaJCzi97nD9S_SkZp9R7waufnT2qXGuID2hXYIAjwkBIWHwVsTJ--pb-iw2lGNqYkiBYppUDlXP3Se71CzQ39QBWHXq--ETUU/4dr/4xL8Hvr1QyWuL9wvK4jgSQ/h27/h001.S0JTl-fqTGBvBZTtrWFL9fcuIfcKOJuFfk6TlsLT1Vw)
SB 2 would create a fund for education savings accounts, a school voucher-style program, with $1 billion from the state budget devoted to the fund. Officials have estimated it would provide enough funding for 90,000 students.

All Texas school-age children would be eligible to apply for an education savings account. Students chosen would get $10,000 to put toward a certified private school. Special education children could receive $11,500. Home-schooled children could get $2,000 to put toward their education.

The bill creates tiered access. If the number of children applying for an education savings account exceeds the $1 billion currently allocated for the fund, $800 million would be prioritized for low-income families or children receiving special education who previously attended public school.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.IpGzAqnc3m6dMmKQdod4OdZdsfX-sjnRfDuEmaXW-5lN-IqpP1xu2_Ygevf9CBs8iGkDwdDuKv-OIdRCcryDDgoqnwbBfsyGSk_4VJrOSCvmgxZEZTEXv72w0U68JXHpny88FhFoE4mM3a9phL8bbEUrfKXadd5zbuQvbOX473l9S2yP7fuKMunflyAzWwAfWVCs10U0e4EhCqUI6BD8E8Fa9HIpg4xTR7LJmRHG4qFSuk4uHxT1SNoMpjnhlYN_NQ3xtw8f70j74snKukEcSAgoBDaov52KaIKB69WeU9--5fmis7aeR3aLzZy-BDgB6pbMwjwjGjLze3eExLugyoXQC3P9wQJQaJCzi97nD9S_SkZp9R7waufnT2qXGuID5srqbb_hudHiQUdrOJAd7n7km43xEpqFqaWG6pgiMlH5j80Qg7q3FkEw7q8hL3Ih/4dr/4xL8Hvr1QyWuL9wvK4jgSQ/h28/h001.rAGlaNh1yJbGtX7DqwZrNYkBAHuq0nG5xV8UejGkV6s)
The bill defines low income as families earning five times the federal poverty level, or about $160,000 a year for a family of four.

The remaining $200 million would be available to children of all income levels and include those who are currently in private school.

Similar proposals have passed the Senate numerous times in previous years. Support for the bill falls largely on partisan lines in the Senate, where Republicans hold a strong majority of 20 out of 31 seats.

Patrick has boasted that SB 2 will face little resistance in the Senate, telling KTVT-TV last week that he would send the bill “like a rocket ship” to the House.

The House is a different story. In previous years, similar bills have been defeated by a coalition of Democrats and rural Republicans who opposed using taxpayer money for private school education.

Many House Republicans who opposed school choice retired or were unseated in bruising 2024 Republican primaries in which Abbott actively campaigned against incumbents. Abbott’s political opposition was fueled by $10 million from GOP megadonor **Jeff Yass** , a Pennsylvania billionaire and leading school choice advocate.

Abbott has said he has at least 79 votes to pass the measure – a majority of the 150-member House." Read today's FREE subscriber email . Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr . | TOP NEWS “Texas Senate to vote today on school choice bill, ” Dallas Morning News' Philip Jankowski — “The Texas Senate is Wednesday that would allow parents to use taxpayer dollars for private school education. Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick, who presides over the Senate, has vowed to pass and send it to the Texas House, where similar school voucher-style bills fell short in previous legislative sessions. Gov. Greg Abbott has made school choice his for the Legislature. The debate and votes will be livestreamed by the Texas Senate at . The Senate session begins at noon, and SB 2 is the only bill set for debate Wednesday. SB 2 would create a fund for education savings accounts, a school voucher-style program, with $1 billion from the state budget devoted to the fund. Officials have estimated it would provide enough funding for 90,000 students. All Texas school-age children would be eligible to apply for an education savings account. Students chosen would get $10,000 to put toward a certified private school. Special education children could receive $11,500. Home-schooled children could get $2,000 to put toward their education. The bill creates tiered access. If the number of children applying for an education savings account exceeds the $1 billion currently allocated for the fund, $800 million would be prioritized for low-income families or children receiving special education who previously attended public school. The bill defines low income as families earning five times the federal poverty level, or about $160,000 a year for a family of four. The remaining $200 million would be available to children of all income levels and include those who are currently in private school. Similar proposals have passed the Senate numerous times in previous years. Support for the bill falls largely on partisan lines in the Senate, where Republicans hold a strong majority of 20 out of 31 seats. Patrick has boasted that SB 2 will face little resistance in the Senate, telling KTVT-TV last week that he would send the bill “like a rocket ship” to the House. The House is a different story. In previous years, similar bills have been defeated by a coalition of Democrats and rural Republicans who opposed using taxpayer money for private school education. Many House Republicans who opposed school choice retired or were unseated in bruising 2024 Republican primaries in which Abbott actively campaigned against incumbents. Abbott’s political opposition was fueled by $10 million from GOP megadonor Jeff Yass , a Pennsylvania billionaire and leading school choice advocate. Abbott has said he has at least 79 votes to pass the measure – a majority of the 150-member House." name: Wesley Bell
subject: Black history is American history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Progress isn’t just about looking back – it’s about moving forward together. **Happy Black History Month, Peter!**

Black History Month is a time to celebrate the achievements, resilience, and contributions of Black Americans who have shaped this country – _but it’s also a time to reflect on the work that still needs to be done._

The Civil Rights Movement, the fight for racial equity, and the fight for voting rights – Black leaders have been on the frontlines. **Missouri has a proud legacy of Black leaders who have fought for justice.**

From the courtroom to the statehouse to the streets. Leaders like Homer G. Phillips, who championed Black healthcare in St. Louis. Congressman Bill Clay, who helped found the Congressional Black Caucus. And today, grassroots organizers, elected officials, and everyday Missourians are carrying that fight forward.

But let’s be clear: This work isn’t over. Across the country, extremists are trying to roll back our hard-fought progress – erasing Black history from our classrooms, suppressing our voices at the ballot box, and blocking policies that would bring real change to our communities.

More than ever, we must stay engaged. Not just in February, but every single day. That means pushing for real criminal justice reform, protecting our right to vote, expanding economic opportunity, and standing up to those who want to take us backward.

**More than ever before, we can't afford to be complacent.**

Together, we can build a future that honors the legacy of those who came before us and help pave the way for the next generation.

Onward,

Wesley | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101583213/526430340/541679611?refcode=em25_250205_bhm_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250205_bhm_fndd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=b2463be5-d1e3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjI0NjNiZTUtZDFlMy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=n-nehPWNjXorHsep3-MkeK5RkIFiRux1l_oDUoiin-A=)

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: PROTECT WOMEN AND GIRLS IN SPORTS!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND
body:
Congress MUST PROTECT WOMEN'S SPORTS
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=4d8e368b345044528e2411554f030a8d&_e=ZKEZVIWdkt-YXqe8eXbIhDAyYLYWUTag7KeR3Bo54iOTRoHP7ma7VLipmc11hYP5Y6KICWQEB3NJanfdrUBVBoNuYROnjOn5QEp2sXf6wFwzhMSlLEKUQhv-sLegsgBhwlIZtUbLFFZDLsf4uIbjNGpWoqbAM9WM76mumtmtZ6NMsWtg74s479qtt7argXHW-Mdx_X0CuuN8BtXhH87qaEierI8XSNDR-E5xlrC_D9PfTTizYudLupxftgmhjFdq7j8RulN-vFew-WSD2xYl2RGte59kZt8G9BF7yzGtgnqtkx4k_paEt4u1aAw2aPv9SIQ1Il0Q0JkicboWk9oaZg%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

As a career-long College Football coach, I know all too well the importance of fair play in men's and women's sports.

_It 's obvious to anyone with two eyes - a biological male in women's sports compromises both the integrity of competition and the safety of athletes._

**That 's why I introduced the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act in the Senate.

It's time to BAN Trans athletes from competing in women's sports, and it's time for Congress to OFFICIALLY PROTECT our women and girls.**

The Radical Left is SURE to call me transphobic while putting every roadblock imaginable in our way. I need your help.

| [ **PASS THE PROTECTION OF WOMEN AND GIRLS IN SPORTS ACT** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=4d8e368b345044528e2411554f030a8d&_e=ZKEZVIWdkt-YXqe8eXbIhDAyYLYWUTag7KeR3Bo54iOTRoHP7ma7VLipmc11hYP5Y6KICWQEB3NJanfdrUBVBoNuYROnjOn5QEp2sXf6wFwzhMSlLEKUQhv-sLegsgBhwlIZtUbLFFZDLsf4uIbjNGpWoqbAM9WM76mumtmtZ6NMsWtg74s479qtt7argXHW04O2u06mTLcI47SQxvqBYFnd-aTX6Pg7MEyQIGJidIf8Ws1_2vj4tO7T-QqKsBs2R0i9TiLpSbGzGRM8GPCQjmG0eQzbQVx11mkAt2j3ZZOUcRzYtiWEfE54C9rW0Q-SbURvQtV_j_6wCEVM7fwIgA%3D%3D)
---

**I need 50 Patriots to stand with me by midnight so we can show Congress that we have grassroots support behind this bill.** [**Can I count on your support?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=4d8e368b345044528e2411554f030a8d&_e=ZKEZVIWdkt-YXqe8eXbIhDAyYLYWUTag7KeR3Bo54iOTRoHP7ma7VLipmc11hYP5Y6KICWQEB3NJanfdrUBVBoNuYROnjOn5QEp2sXf6wFwzhMSlLEKUQhv-sLegsgBhwlIZtUbLFFZDLsf4uIbjNGpWoqbAM9WM76mumtmtZ6NMsWtg74s479qtt7argXHWR7jj_X4yegasxL3AeuH2X3Fq-cA1BUG9fVVwYneeRhOVXPu--Dwwkrl_0p3CaIJ-6dviCqYp23aPYx7Cq6l6Xbuiwd4WDAbqeR0exKVTS0CkeF2ZOffnyjJtGvL3HYq6o78gCRUNsbmqs-s3cnRhbg%3D%3D)

There's no "I" in "team." It's going to take all of us to get this through the Senate.

[**I 'm humbly asking you to join our team in supporting and protecting women's sports by chipping in $15 before midnight.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=4d8e368b345044528e2411554f030a8d&_e=ZKEZVIWdkt-YXqe8eXbIhDAyYLYWUTag7KeR3Bo54iOTRoHP7ma7VLipmc11hYP5Y6KICWQEB3NJanfdrUBVBoNuYROnjOn5QEp2sXf6wFwzhMSlLEKUQhv-sLegsgBhwlIZtUbLFFZDLsf4uIbjNGpWoqbAM9WM76mumtmtZ6NMsWtg74s479qtt7argXHWk4zGQMuPZcgfvxhbdInPRejdYfeY7ylL2JP9pIz9GvC97U2XqhufPHdmE-8dUrfYy94Z9tnjg_-d3dqzR6F9COg1YCtOn2YJj08hnIBtnNtR6r11zpxRqsmOfLcuE2KT7qFXoXUYvQww13XubV1Y8w%3D%3D)

God Bless,
Coach Tuberville

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=4d8e368b345044528e2411554f030a8d&_e=ZKEZVIWdkt-YXqe8eXbIhDAyYLYWUTag7KeR3Bo54iOTRoHP7ma7VLipmc11hYP5Y6KICWQEB3NJanfdrUBVBoNuYROnjOn5QEp2sXf6wFwzhMSlLEKUQhv-sLegsgBhwlIZtUbLFFZDLsf4uIbjNGpWoqbAM9WM76mumtmtZ6NMsWtg74s479qtt7argXHWTQ8d27tozmmkrkYiQspozyTGOY0UW6jg6jjaDo_ZU6EE9rx1CzfVP0Rvk7r1nI46jT__UqMaMM0yH3HXPstu_c5BcaegwPf0-d4WAs2N_olM2yrDxFoA9RSAIOkIPJBYxJlf805adDUJ_fRrNLVFlA%3D%3D)

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=4d8e368b345044528e2411554f030a8d&_e=ZKEZVIWdkt-YXqe8eXbIhDAyYLYWUTag7KeR3Bo54iOTRoHP7ma7VLipmc11hYP5Y6KICWQEB3NJanfdrUBVBoNuYROnjOn5QEp2sXf6wFwzhMSlLEKUQhv-sLegsgBhwlIZtUbLFFZDLsf4uIbjNGpWoqbAM9WM76mumtmtZ6NMsWtg74s479qtt7argXHWOdxFcbUqP2tsGr_EMX2Irzut7ao19tWbO0xiiBHPOT8ccykv9LNxTwV4lK-ydrUZn2zlBkRGbsH48kYKc7mCDVqxz7dvTTpccuqCN-0ddb7N5Wpw9g1cgU1CIsWpo25wIZ-s047lvfM771gSx8P2YA%3D%3D)

We’re LIVID.

FIRST → Donald Trump and his extremist allies stormed their way into a far-right Trifecta.

THEN → House Republicans began scheming to CUT critical public services like Social Security.

NOW → Mike Johnson just declared that “everything is on the table.”

This is not a drill. If we let Republicans’ attacks go unnoticed and don’t respond ASAP, Trump and his MAGA Trifecta could remain in power for YEARS to come. The time to defeat them is NOW. That’s why generous Democrats have agreed to 500% MATCH every gift to this email – but only until our midnight deadline in just 14 hours. Can we count on you to rush $15 to take a stand against MAGA extremism in the House, SHUT DOWN the far-right’s plot to destroy our economy, and build back our Democratic Majority? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-email-match-2025?amount=15]

-- Grow our economy and create good-paying jobs from coast to coast

name: Jeff Younger
subject: I’m fighting to save my son
body:
“That’s crazy.” “I don’t believe that.” “That can’t be.” | | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now.
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
| | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e25b5c75180545f8ac68e60769a79b51&_e=ym3iOWTdNtsh9zbsUkppoYi6rVp03n2MIyGs5zwiIOJHkv69aG2fDJf2SxiXJGTGc5NfKjAY68IbwygA5m6orxOBqAjQf9uSUQuAWzY8bhiCMfHAxAebjJLUyaOd9TlUj1qwzXUaX97S4S6dvFKaPulzHvEJ75qv6Y-N5TC-QcJSj-LR2gnV8EeEmrP2GtCu7_BpzesjzYnR4ZqrN2Op-bTt7PYgv3G9T8_vnnD2D_kPNUKeced07ohsTHNudE9vkjbvCOOMQHXpg8nf07wcjilOYu-ijumQKjpqtN9yah051z5kw72keSVzYraTSNlCLPj0I-oyqxHuVkGNnUXKEQxzTpSDl7kPWM1LuwJsTcXO-U0HG_AwT3tW0eUerTRfoT2u4JYL6q5EAijMMtRsaA%3D%3D)
---
My Dear Friend, When I tell people my story, I hear the same things over and over again:“That’s crazy.” “I don’t believe that.” “That can’t be.”But if you’ve heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or Fox News, then you know it’s horribly true. My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son **James** in the photo above.I’ve spent the last decade fighting tooth-and-nail to keep school counselors, my ex-wife, and activist judges from “transitioning” **James** against my will. If you didn’t know, “transitioning” is the LGBTQ+ industry’s euphemism for sex change surgery or the chemical castration of a child.And if these radicals get their way, my son will be sterilized, traumatized, and dependent on Big Pharma for the rest of his life.This all started ten years ago when my ex-wife began telling me our two-year-old boy **James **wanted to become a girl.I ignored her and kept dressing my son in boy’s clothes. Because he’s a boy!But then I found out that after dropping him off at school, the school counselor would change him into girl’s clothes WITHOUT TELLING ME.The counselors and teachers also began calling him a different name, “Luna,” at school. Also without telling me!I assumed I’d be able to stop this madness during the custody hearings with my ex-wife. Instead, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.I would only be allowed to see James if I dressed him in girl’s clothes.My friend, I’ve never lied to my sons.And I’m not about to start now. So I was forced to stop visiting him.And then I began the fight of my life to save James from this evil “trans” culture.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers.I even authored a bill to outlaw sex change surgeries for minors in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee.And spent almost every dollar I had to make sure politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair.After I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, my ex-wife fled with **James** to California: a “trans sanctuary” state. I think you know exactly what happened once she got to California.A radical judge sided with my ex-wife and gave the greenlight to proceed with chemically castrating my son.I have never felt so helpless in my life. I am James’s father – yet I can’t protect him from the powerful LGBTQ+ activists who are using my ex-wife and our kangaroo court systems to turn my son into the poster child for their twisted and perverted agenda.I’ve watched the school system, my ex-wife, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.In fact, I can’t even appeal my case because the judge sealed the court records. I’d have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process.Worst of all, I am under a gag order to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Technically, my writing you this to you today is illegal.But I didn’t hesitate for one second to write it. If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time.But I’m not just some activist.I’m a father trying to save his son from the Left’s madness and butchery.This is what happens when you go up against the $6 BILLION “trans lobby” and radical activist judges.They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees...They’re trying to break my spirit...But I refuse to ever stop fighting for my son... for truth... and for what’s right. Because I don’t want this to ever happen to another family.These radical LGBTQ+ doctors, lawyers and judges need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And **James** needs to be **saved** before he’s permanently butchered.That’s why I’m writing to you today.When Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) heard about my case, they immediately offered to stand with me and fight this insanity.PLDF has been on the frontlines defending innocent J6ers targeted by the Biden DOJ.And when they heard about my case, they told me they’d help in any way possible.The fact is, this transgender madness is affecting all of our children and grandchildren. It’s in their schools. In the books in their libraries. Pediatricians are asking five-year-olds if they “feel like they’re in the wrong body” during routine doctor visits.This is madness. And it’s got to stop.If you want to help save my son **James **from castration and make sure this will NEVER happen to ANY child ever again... And if you want to send a message to these radical judges that their day of reckoning has come... [I hope you’ll consider sending a one-time gift to PLDF today to help fund my battle against the California courts and judges who are trying to mutilate my son.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e25b5c75180545f8ac68e60769a79b51&_e=ym3iOWTdNtsh9zbsUkppoYi6rVp03n2MIyGs5zwiIOJHkv69aG2fDJf2SxiXJGTGc5NfKjAY68IbwygA5m6orxOBqAjQf9uSUQuAWzY8bhiCMfHAxAebjJLUyaOd9TlUj1qwzXUaX97S4S6dvFKaPulzHvEJ75qv6Y-N5TC-QcJSj-LR2gnV8EeEmrP2GtCu7_BpzesjzYnR4ZqrN2Op-bTt7PYgv3G9T8_vnnD2D_nU5iKdok_JZYpVZxThW7aj4KmUydlnoy2wfGQDGRhzt0pib4sHOOJumex-qTi3uKE6oSavwN1DAn9biTmq5nzgokntlBcPfynePr0bSBt7eeG_QsJVNh3fSQEXs6cd1sSmGy9jqtZRialTzHCeH5lTAmFC81IKhRTooivVtA5fQQ%3D%3D "https://patriots-legal-defense-fund.revv.co/rcl9ea4bb135305b?amount=50&utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250205_BDG_PLDF_DMSJ2_BDG_REV_RCL-RCL&utm_term=GAP")

clean_body: “That’s crazy.” “I don’t believe that.” “That can’t be.” | | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now. | | | | | | My Dear Friend, When I tell people my story, I hear the same things over and over again:“That’s crazy.” “I don’t believe that.” “That can’t be.”But if you’ve heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or Fox News, then you know it’s horribly true. My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’ve spent the last decade fighting tooth-and-nail to keep school counselors, my ex-wife, and activist judges from “transitioning” James against my will. If you didn’t know, “transitioning” is the LGBTQ+ industry’s euphemism for sex change surgery or the chemical castration of a child.And if these radicals get their way, my son will be sterilized, traumatized, and dependent on Big Pharma for the rest of his life.This all started ten years ago when my ex-wife began telling me our two-year-old boy James wanted to become a girl.I ignored her and kept dressing my son in boy’s clothes. Because he’s a boy!But then I found out that after dropping him off at school, the school counselor would change him into girl’s clothes WITHOUT TELLING ME.The counselors and teachers also began calling him a different name, “Luna,” at school. Also without telling me!I assumed I’d be able to stop this madness during the custody hearings with my ex-wife. Instead, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.I would only be allowed to see James if I dressed him in girl’s clothes.My friend, I’ve never lied to my sons.And I’m not about to start now. So I was forced to stop visiting him.And then I began the fight of my life to save James from this evil “trans” culture.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers.I even authored a bill to outlaw sex change surgeries for minors in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee.And spent almost every dollar I had to make sure politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair.After I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, my ex-wife fled with James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state. I think you know exactly what happened once she got to California.A radical judge sided with my ex-wife and gave the greenlight to proceed with chemically castrating my son.I have never felt so helpless in my life. I am James’s father – yet I can’t protect him from the powerful LGBTQ+ activists who are using my ex-wife and our kangaroo court systems to turn my son into the poster child for their twisted and perverted agenda.I’ve watched the school system, my ex-wife, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.In fact, I can’t even appeal my case because the judge sealed the court records. I’d have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process.Worst of all, I am under a gag order to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Technically, my writing you this to you today is illegal.But I didn’t hesitate for one second to write it. If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time.But I’m not just some activist.I’m a father trying to save his son from the Left’s madness and butchery.This is what happens when you go up against the $6 BILLION “trans lobby” and radical activist judges.They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees...They’re trying to break my spirit...But I refuse to ever stop fighting for my son... for truth... and for what’s right. Because I don’t want this to ever happen to another family.These radical LGBTQ+ doctors, lawyers and judges need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And James needs to be saved before he’s permanently butchered.That’s why I’m writing to you today.When Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) heard about my case, they immediately offered to stand with me and fight this insanity.PLDF has been on the frontlines defending innocent J6ers targeted by the Biden DOJ.And when they heard about my case, they told me they’d help in any way possible.The fact is, this transgender madness is affecting all of our children and grandchildren. It’s in their schools. In the books in their libraries. Pediatricians are asking five-year-olds if they “feel like they’re in the wrong body” during routine doctor visits.This is madness. And it’s got to stop.If you want to help save my son James from castration and make sure this will NEVER happen to ANY child ever again... And if you want to send a message to these radical judges that their day of reckoning has come... "" | | | | | | | I was fired from my job in the tech industry after speaking out about this LGBTQ+ madness. I have been funding my fight from my own savings. But I can’t keep this up forever. And I’m running out of time to save James. "" I’ve met so many good Americans in this battle. It’s what keeps me going when I feel there’s no hope left. God bless you for reading my letter. With gratitude, P.S. After Tucker Carlson interviewed me on his podcast, I was fired from my job and blacklisted. These radical LGBTQ+ activists have the upper hand when it comes to money and power. But I’ll never stop fighting to save my son. By God, never. P.P.S. This is an old photo...I know I don’t look like that anymore.Sadly, I don’t know what my son looks like now.I haven’t seen him in years.Would you help me fight these corrupt judges and politicians? I’d love to send you a new photo once we’ve overturned these bogus rulings and I’m reunited with my boy. Thank you for reading my letter. "" Patriot's Legal Defense Fund601 Baffie Avenue Winter Park, Florida 32789

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

clean_body: Voter Action Project Logo [] WPRI: Movement seeks to remove Electoral College, elect president by popular vote [] It’s simple, folks. Defenders of voting rights like Cory Booker, AOC, Robert Reich, and Stacey Abrams recognize that the Electoral College is harming our democracy and needs to go. It’s the biggest tool the opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people. We have to take away this dangerous mechanism that enabled the January 6th insurrection before it happens again. Vote suppressors have proven there’s no length they won’t go to in order to win. Chip in $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College once and for all >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] Other Amount [] Thanks, Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? We only need to flip **three** House seats to take back the chamber, and we're already recruiting strong Democratic pro-choice women to run all across the country — including in swing districts currently held by Republicans.

We know that our candidates can do it, Peter. EMILYs List women won some of the toughest House races in 2024: **Reps. Janelle Bynum (OR-05)** and **Laura Gillen (NY-04)** flipped red seats, unseating MAGA extremists; **Reps. Emilia Sykes (OH-13)** and **Marie Gluesenkamp Perez (WA-03)** won reelection in Trump districts, holding their ground in some of the toughest races of the cycle; and **Rep. Kristen McDonald Rivet (MI-08)** won her Trump+2 district by _seven points_.

But it's not going to be easy. Trump and his Republican cronies are once again ready to pour millions of dollars into critical House races, funded by billionaire backers like Elon Musk. They want to buy their way into power, roll back our rights, and control our bodies. **We can't let them get away with it.**

We know Republicans will throw everything they've got at us, but with the support of this community, we can prepare the next generation of Democratic pro-choice women to run and WIN in some of the toughest races of 2026.

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. name: Anna Sophia Rowe
subject: Scary photos of scary men…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
...and the bills they insist on prioritizing even though they need to mind their own business. | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101590424/526452211/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250206photos_N_ASR_90DO_16_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2YmNjMDU5LWRjZTMtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6PH0dM8Skd8XrBd69C81B2-u5MJVjhyBeA1D81IkNwA=)
---
Hi Peter,

Republican legislators didn’t waste any time before debuting their anti-choice priorities this session. In fact, 144 (mostly male) Republican members of Congress, including 35 Senators, signed a letter stating that they look forward to reinstating anti-choice policies from Trump’s previous term.

In addition to the letter, powerful legislators in both federal and state government are now authoring and sponsoring bills meant to severely limit women’s access to reproductive healthcare. The scariest part? The legislators leading the charge on these bills are all men.

[**Men should not be making laws about WOMEN’S bodies. We are working to elect pro-choice women who will defend our rights. Join us in this mission by rushing $20.25 or more today!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_250206photos_N_ASR_90DO_16_G_N_L1&amount=20.25) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101590425/526452212/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250206photos_N_ASR_90DO_16_G_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2YmNjMDU5LWRjZTMtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6PH0dM8Skd8XrBd69C81B2-u5MJVjhyBeA1D81IkNwA=)

** ** | | [**$50 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101590426/526452213/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250206photos_N_ASR_90DO_16_G_N_EB50&express_lane=true&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2YmNjMDU5LWRjZTMtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6PH0dM8Skd8XrBd69C81B2-u5MJVjhyBeA1D81IkNwA=)
---
| [**$100 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101590427/526452214/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250206photos_N_ASR_90DO_16_G_N_EB100&express_lane=true&amount=100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2YmNjMDU5LWRjZTMtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6PH0dM8Skd8XrBd69C81B2-u5MJVjhyBeA1D81IkNwA=)
---
** ** | | [**$150 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101590428/526452215/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250206photos_N_ASR_90DO_16_G_N_EB150&express_lane=true&amount=150&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2YmNjMDU5LWRjZTMtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6PH0dM8Skd8XrBd69C81B2-u5MJVjhyBeA1D81IkNwA=)
---
| [**$250 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101590429/526452216/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250206photos_N_ASR_90DO_16_G_N_EB250&express_lane=true&amount=250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2YmNjMDU5LWRjZTMtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6PH0dM8Skd8XrBd69C81B2-u5MJVjhyBeA1D81IkNwA=)
---
** ** | | [**OTHER »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101590430/526452217/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250206photos_N_ASR_90DO_16_G_N_BOther&refcode2=other&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2YmNjMDU5LWRjZTMtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6PH0dM8Skd8XrBd69C81B2-u5MJVjhyBeA1D81IkNwA=)
---
Take a look at some of the latest bills – and the legislators who sponsored them.

**_The “Life at Conception Act”_**
“Every life is a sacred gift from God, deserving of dignity and protection from the moment of conception,” said Congressman Burlison. “The Life at Conception Act uses Congress’ constitutional authority to define personhood, fulfilling our moral and legal obligation to safeguard the lives of the unborn."
**Sponsored by: U.S. Representative Eric Burlison (R-MO)**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101590431/526452218/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250206photos_N_ASR_90DO_16_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2YmNjMDU5LWRjZTMtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6PH0dM8Skd8XrBd69C81B2-u5MJVjhyBeA1D81IkNwA=)
---
**_The “Ending Chemical Abortions Act of 2025”_**
This bill would impose a _federal ban_ on medication abortions (the most common abortion method) and would also impose a prison sentence of up to 25 years on anyone who administers the medication. “I am committed to safeguarding the innocent and voiceless in our society,” Ogles said.
**Sponsored by: U.S. Representative Andy Ogles (R-TN)**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101590432/526452219/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250206photos_N_ASR_90DO_16_G_N_P2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2YmNjMDU5LWRjZTMtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6PH0dM8Skd8XrBd69C81B2-u5MJVjhyBeA1D81IkNwA=)
---
**_The “Born Alive Bill”_**
This bill targets late-term abortions, which are typically only performed during a medical emergency, to save the life of the mother or to relieve a baby with a likely terminal case from prolonged suffering.

Experts say this bill targets an issue that does not exist and, in some cases, could force physicians to deny newborns with complex fetal anomalies palliative care.
**Sponsored by: Senator James Lankford (R-OK)**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101590433/526452220/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250206photos_N_ASR_90DO_16_G_N_P3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2YmNjMDU5LWRjZTMtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6PH0dM8Skd8XrBd69C81B2-u5MJVjhyBeA1D81IkNwA=)
---
**_The “End Taxpayer Funding for Abortion Providers Act”_**
This bill is aimed at defunding Planned Parenthood, which would ultimately slash critical access to a number of healthcare services, including contraception, HIV testing, screening for sexually transmitted infections, and more.
**Sponsored by: Senator Josh Hawley (MO)**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101590434/526452221/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250206photos_N_ASR_90DO_16_G_N_P4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2YmNjMDU5LWRjZTMtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6PH0dM8Skd8XrBd69C81B2-u5MJVjhyBeA1D81IkNwA=)
---
**_Indiana Senate Bill 171_**
This bill has sweeping restrictions about abortion access in Indiana, including: “Requires a woman who is pregnant as a result of rape or incest to provide to her physician an affidavit attesting to the rape or incest before the physician performs the abortion.”
**Sponsored by: Indiana State Senator Michael Young**
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101590435/526452222/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250206photos_N_ASR_90DO_16_G_N_P5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2YmNjMDU5LWRjZTMtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6PH0dM8Skd8XrBd69C81B2-u5MJVjhyBeA1D81IkNwA=)
---
**_The “South Carolina Prenatal Equal Protection Act”_**
This would allow prosecutors to charge a woman who had an abortion with homicide which, in South Carolina, means she could face the death penalty.

**Sponsored by the following South Carolina Representatives:** Rep. Robert J. Harris, Rep. Josiah Magnuson, Rep. William M. Chumley, Rep. James Mikell Burns, Rep. Steven Wayne Long, Rep. John Gregory Kilmartin

We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: men should NOT be making laws about women's bodies – especially when they're making laws to RESTRICT women's bodily autonomy.

But, as we’ve seen from these bills (and so many more we didn’t even list in this email), male legislators are determined to control women’s bodies. Our best defense against these dangerous and scary policies is to have more WOMEN in the rooms where decisions are being made. We must elect more women to our government.

[**We’re working to ensure more pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women are elected to the rooms where decisions about OUR bodies are being made. Join our fight by rushing a donation now. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101590436/526452223/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250206photos_N_ASR_90DO_16_G_N_L2&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2YmNjMDU5LWRjZTMtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6PH0dM8Skd8XrBd69C81B2-u5MJVjhyBeA1D81IkNwA=)

Together,

Anna Sophia Rowe
Her Bold Move
---
| | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for office in the United States. Since our founding in 2020, we have supported hundreds of pro-choice, pro-women women candidates across 42 states and counting. As abortion bans and other dangerous laws about women tend to get passed in states with the lowest representation numbers for women in government (4%, 11%, 12%....) we've made it our mission to break the anti-choice male supermajorities in those state legislatures.

**Support this work with a contribution today!** [DONATE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101590437/526452224/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250206photos_N_ASR_90DO_16_G_N_biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2YmNjMDU5LWRjZTMtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=6PH0dM8Skd8XrBd69C81B2-u5MJVjhyBeA1D81IkNwA=)

name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: Which side are we on?
body:
---
Derek, I’ve just begun my first week as DNC Chair, and in a moment, [**I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to help us build the strongest possible Democratic Party.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250205_2702_fr&refcode2=2715_22930333_lCatB_&akid=2715%2E22930333%2ElCatB_) But first, I hope you’ll give me a minute to tell you more about why I ran for this position, how I view the work ahead of us, and why your support right now is so important. While Donald Trump was being inaugurated, I was marching with labor leaders outside of Ebenezer Baptist Church, the home of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. As we marched, we sang the old Union song, “Which Side Are You On?” For a pro-labor progressive like me — a guy who has carried a union card and organized throughout his life — that song cut straight to my core. And in the last few weeks, I’ve thought of it again and again. Which side are we on? Are we on the side of the ultra-wealthy billionaire, the oil and gas polluter, the union buster? Or are we on the side of the working family, the small business owner, the farmer, the immigrants, the students? **I know which side I’m on. I hope you do, too.** Derek, right now as Democrats, we have to not just fight the extremes of Donald Trump, but make a sharp case to families in both red states and blue states about why they should trust us with their votes. _We have to show them that we are on their side._ [**If you agree, and you’re ready to get to work, I hope you’ll make a $3 contribution now to help us keep building a Democratic Party that will do just that:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250205_2702_fr&refcode2=2715_22930333_lCatB_&akid=2715%2E22930333%2ElCatB_) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250205_2702_fr&refcode2=2715_22930333_lCatB_&akid=2715%2E22930333%2ElCatB_)**

clean_body: Derek, I’ve just begun my first week as DNC Chair, and in a moment, But first, I hope you’ll give me a minute to tell you more about why I ran for this position, how I view the work ahead of us, and why your support right now is so important. While Donald Trump was being inaugurated, I was marching with labor leaders outside of Ebenezer Baptist Church, the home of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. As we marched, we sang the old Union song, “Which Side Are You On?” For a pro-labor progressive like me — a guy who has carried a union card and organized throughout his life — that song cut straight to my core. And in the last few weeks, I’ve thought of it again and again. Which side are we on? Are we on the side of the ultra-wealthy billionaire, the oil and gas polluter, the union buster? Or are we on the side of the working family, the small business owner, the farmer, the immigrants, the students? I know which side I’m on. I hope you do, too. Derek, right now as Democrats, we have to not just fight the extremes of Donald Trump, but make a sharp case to families in both red states and blue states about why they should trust us with their votes. We have to show them that we are on their side. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** Too many people view politics as a sport — we win an election, we put a tick in the box and pat ourselves on the back. But this is personal for me, as it is for so many others. Whether we win or lose has a material impact on peoples' lives. That’s why the work we do now as a Party is so important, and it’s why I’m hoping I can count on your involvement and support. Thank you and more soon, Ken Ken Martin Chair Democratic National Committee If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support.

| **About the Republican Party of Florida**
* * *
The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability.

We will advocate fiscally-sound, common-sense solutions that will promote job and economic growth, provide the best education to our children, and create a path to prosperity for Florida and America.

Members of the Republican Party of Florida will be united by these principles and will work to elect Floridians with integrity who will work to enact such solutions. We will seek to be the most effective state party in the nation and serve as a model for other party organizations.

Under the Biden Administration, woke policies flourished: Men INFILTRATED women’s sports! They VIOLATED the safety and security of women’s spaces! They could not even DEFINE what a woman was! name: Brad Finstad
subject: Minnesota Defying President Trump
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ6-wBGIy40AggjYwt-A0J3r-2U2mP9w1LDWMOrIrdViwBj3mM5Jz6XLM20hw)
---

President Trump was elected because Americans demanded action on illegal immigration among other things, but in Minnesota, our state leaders are refusing to comply.
Under Governor Tim Walz, Minnesota was turned into a sanctuary state for illegal immigrants**.** But that’s just the beginning. Instead of working with federal immigration enforcement, Minnesota officials are actively ignoring the law, and defying what the American people demand.
Instead of being a part of the solution, Tim Walz and Keith Ellison are making it easier for illegal immigrants to flood our state, drain our resources, and threaten our communities.
While President Trump is fighting to put America First, Minnesota’s leaders are working against him and working against YOU.****
**Enough is enough.**** ******[Please sign the petition to DEMAND that Minnesota complies with President Trump’s leadership on illegal immigration and enforces his policies.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ6-wBGIy40AggjYwt-A0J3r-2U2mP9w1LDWMOrIrdViwBj3mM5Jz6XLM20hw)************

* * *

Jimmy Patronis and Randy Fine JUST became our GOP nominees in the Florida Special Elections and we're fighting tooth and nail to win both.

Here's the lay of the land:
**Jimmy Patronis 's opponent, _Gay Valimont_ , already spent _75,000+ DOLLARS_ to destroy him on election day

Randy Fine's opponent, _Joshua Weil_ , already has _500,000+ DOLLARS_ in the bank**
The Democrats KNOW they only need to flip three seats to take the House. They've been waiting to destroy our House Majority for years. And they're chomping at the bit to SABOTAGE Trump's entire presidency.

And it won't be long before Democrats throw every last penny behind their candidates...

There are three upcoming Special Elections, so these two are our first shot at defending our Majority and saving our Republican Trifecta in one fell swoop. body:
The President just protected Women's sports
| | |
---
| | [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n3mbFppyVOZRpqDNI17hzBvkFtyO_gIXiIHfjKn6EFGfKc1Ftj6WANhqn7N7wYnxparefw2PWEnzJBX1kCvDrW-t0Nws384AwqsQrbCq48xBhyrra6YsBd6DwqIpXGnJUkg8afoxKlCtNLWIi4nPKSNZyOXetafCTFfUbALi4viNfyX2yLrO26GoCWKIz-eNVdFziUbmNKfb72C7f8JLxg==&c=_WSmH8R98hgWpkNQF1rj6rvcM9zF2czPHFATFj8HeL6zhjR6_ESBKA==&ch=GjD-V2W4G5NQsubUqZ9rmYEPpB_I1n2F13ZKpFEHylZl8Ad_pE6Ckg==)
---
| Friends,
"You've been waiting a long time for this--so have I." -- President Donald J. Trump
---
| Those were his words to a room FULL of female athletes just now.
---
| | [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n3mbFppyVOZRpqDNI17hzBvkFtyO_gIXiIHfjKn6EFGfKc1Ftj6WALdNJ5VdCsic7FFB-w83KQg7DLRG_J-RUtQbReRkh-Z56QeAcxpRVkk57onQyIYx6urVb0y3S7JdRsWuU80Xav8-ebJxNU5pVmNH9XyT_uQuPe9jpg3wnv3FBUzD8kIJlikyln_m78xMp_FcAnoEytc=&c=_WSmH8R98hgWpkNQF1rj6rvcM9zF2czPHFATFj8HeL6zhjR6_ESBKA==&ch=GjD-V2W4G5NQsubUqZ9rmYEPpB_I1n2F13ZKpFEHylZl8Ad_pE6Ckg==)
---
| And then, he made it clear:
"From now on, women's sports will be only for women."
This was an incredible moment. We did it. We protected our girls and pushed back against leftist insanity.
A few years ago, no one was even talking about this issue. But because of the work we've done together, we just walked out of the White House with our heads held high.
We can accomplish what once seemed impossible. And we're not stopping here.
---
| If you're with us in this fight to take back our country, chip in now to keep this momentum going.
---

Sincerely,

Trump | Those were his words to a room FULL of female athletes just now. | | == | And then, he made it clear: "From now on, women's sports will be only for women." This was an incredible moment. We did it. We protected our girls and pushed back against leftist insanity. A few years ago, no one was even talking about this issue. But because of the work we've done together, we just walked out of the White House with our heads held high. We can accomplish what once seemed impossible. And we're not stopping here. | If you're with us in this fight to take back our country, chip in now to keep this momentum going. | | == | We will fight for the family. We will fight for America. And we will win. Sincerely, | | | Terry Schilling President American Principles Project | | == | Thank you for standing with us in the fight for America's families. Together, we can make a lasting difference. | == == == == | | | | American Principles Project | 2800 S Shirlington Rd Ste 901 | Arlington, VA 22206-3601 US | | |
