name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Turn America back to Godly values
body:
| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1466ec41c9564757ad61c90402c15c19&_e=Vn9DzpaW8eP8Ve18Ffb-A4DhDF5Q3RASUJfn1NeLx_6KkF0onPrMD_8N-rwZpd3wVpB36K5tlP7ks-XpjSUyGRbNEaW1qClVF0hY_OfRWuiWv0tIy0rSSsXr9ECHXVyhtg-6oNPlA-eKUFiscXUsXHey73yYCRGP-4Q0Mg1B_Ss044nZhvpEet0tRzX0SpWEupmbKFsq1s4H5XBhjVxcxflrxh8QT8OMVmoJIBXzXWiOZTlWK3gNjmRpdy2c1INW8kk4hvyZJ4n0p_Dn2faN2NpS9xRfBIAaoA6dCdD192hCRVLWiEhnBlRfEkj5wkxIQfRM545a49nhizicWjRWHvoPvBnZeXD-BLzC0YIqYNTZ_bHNJJ07iAjEKRk7GrsJ)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1466ec41c9564757ad61c90402c15c19&_e=Vn9DzpaW8eP8Ve18Ffb-A4DhDF5Q3RASUJfn1NeLx_6KkF0onPrMD_8N-rwZpd3wVpB36K5tlP7ks-XpjSUyGRbNEaW1qClVF0hY_OfRWuiWv0tIy0rSSsXr9ECHXVyhtg-6oNPlA-eKUFiscXUsXHey73yYCRGP-4Q0Mg1B_Ss044nZhvpEet0tRzX0SpWEupmbKFsq1s4H5XBhjVxcxflrxh8QT8OMVmoJIBXzXWhiUwxCmOc0BBnnz8aGQHb4l_ElHPCoQBFKzNM5zUIER8P8fpCYasnYbdp0CmRc1BUN9PHMJvLWgARk1yBpxiNXo2BywDkwQj7p86roTEPUcIK5epOUc_qxiWzVJ-_luGhPc24YwBjxDd3dPW3g2dnF)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1466ec41c9564757ad61c90402c15c19&_e=Vn9DzpaW8eP8Ve18Ffb-A4DhDF5Q3RASUJfn1NeLx_6KkF0onPrMD_8N-rwZpd3wVpB36K5tlP7ks-XpjSUyGRbNEaW1qClVF0hY_OfRWuiWv0tIy0rSSsXr9ECHXVyhtg-6oNPlA-eKUFiscXUsXHey73yYCRGP-4Q0Mg1B_Ss044nZhvpEet0tRzX0SpWEupmbKFsq1s4H5XBhjVxcxflrxh8QT8OMVmoJIBXzXWiqJYDRNXxEWuraNa12cjXCMqXRKk7SQbTSBmixg-v5NXTb2ZFyceMZk2V5Vj3RwEDYT5S7FNpg2DoGNTtTsUj7pP0qqN1sdEgtG_3Y2HN3EXe9p5XnVBH3XR-tDdq7wijSh2n94CiweRrp7ab69mqg) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1466ec41c9564757ad61c90402c15c19&_e=Vn9DzpaW8eP8Ve18Ffb-A4DhDF5Q3RASUJfn1NeLx_6KkF0onPrMD_8N-rwZpd3wVpB36K5tlP7ks-XpjSUyGRbNEaW1qClVF0hY_OfRWuiWv0tIy0rSSsXr9ECHXVyhtg-6oNPlA-eKUFiscXUsXHey73yYCRGP-4Q0Mg1B_Ss044nZhvpEet0tRzX0SpWEupmbKFsq1s4H5XBhjVxcxflrxh8QT8OMVmoJIBXzXWhF17dPccjNn3RdUkr8_uIcKweJhw10L5DlQCU7y5ki6FcofnObkKM8T3FyXqE7Gm_yO-l8DSIgLBOUROqp6QVWAu9GgsbA254Zgyy_i2VrDFTqZvKoXLGEcBDxcKOX7kp-03LQwZAM6qp2-RQHegqR)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1466ec41c9564757ad61c90402c15c19&_e=Vn9DzpaW8eP8Ve18Ffb-A4DhDF5Q3RASUJfn1NeLx_6KkF0onPrMD_8N-rwZpd3wVpB36K5tlP7ks-XpjSUyGRbNEaW1qClVF0hY_OfRWuiWv0tIy0rSSsXr9ECHXVyhtg-6oNPlA-eKUFiscXUsXHey73yYCRGP-4Q0Mg1B_Ss044nZhvpEet0tRzX0SpWEupmbKFsq1s4H5XBhjVxcxflrxh8QT8OMVmoJIBXzXWhJUseaYe4hbnA0Vioxt4CcJW2rKhbPqr7OoDeiO2EGx0EM5i1OGuOAO2vBrSl59tXbdd-N45XBEbuGSf4Mb-lqncJncn0Tv97hax-tKobCSeiDaU1RGmKJXI80qSsaNfTG9DE6qXZIX-GBcwwzYXmr)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1466ec41c9564757ad61c90402c15c19&_e=Vn9DzpaW8eP8Ve18Ffb-A4DhDF5Q3RASUJfn1NeLx_6KkF0onPrMD_8N-rwZpd3wVpB36K5tlP7ks-XpjSUyGRbNEaW1qClVF0hY_OfRWuiWv0tIy0rSSsXr9ECHXVyhtg-6oNPlA-eKUFiscXUsXHey73yYCRGP-4Q0Mg1B_Ss044nZhvpEet0tRzX0SpWEupmbKFsq1s4H5XBhjVxcxflrxh8QT8OMVmoJIBXzXWg06IMPfpJUTUmH3wQbIL1AhLWn7la0nJy4fMHet0PYTUItva1OT1owlJQ35r3Kgbn4FEAeKQpdbk7gh655_oP2_SO5H8u17ZrMZMbqwQfVvfScOSUxX3QdVTb530D0XLV2ig58kBHg_AexNWLjcK6g)

---
|

| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[**Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=1466ec41c9564757ad61c90402c15c19&_e=Vn9DzpaW8eP8Ve18Ffb-A4DhDF5Q3RASUJfn1NeLx_6KkF0onPrMD_8N-rwZpd3wVpB36K5tlP7ks-XpjSUyGRbNEaW1qClVF0hY_OfRWuiWv0tIy0rSSsXr9ECHXVyhtg-6oNPlA-eKUFiscXUsXHey73yYCRGP-4Q0Mg1B_Ss044nZhvpEet0tRzX0SpWEupmbKFsq1s4H5XBhjVxcxflrxh8QT8OMVmoJIBXzXWi1X-WU4hG1XhqtxVPjqiGTc_Tyvn4bTTU6YKwDnHyboy9XdZlPCWmRKEe2EDekV4u99lARMyeEJYVTyEAxgdOJh_t_Tk7-tGKh0ytUUWXqY8u0tbDyQ_vLQ8dCdZXcCh3keqDXxV0Ke-Kv0Wr46Wz8)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.

Fellow American, I want you to hear it from me first: **I'll be voting** _YES_** on RFK Jr., Tulsi Gabbard, and Kash Patel.**

_**WATCH MY FULL STATEMENT:**_

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=a6db4971d4d04caab186e868bbce0655&_e=nY81fcvwSa5Jl_Ihuyje3Q2KXeECbC9pEzbxNrGb_iiTCOhuWWm_3NvtoWduBmI20k5fhe1P0xVajQ4IRyFX78TqZ-Se1aYLC56RjBFfS4lPThGdLUsrHpZ7LvJWtxtPqj_ZytGZtfb8fer23iCy94E0wdyUIIAZaMHVWpKbPgroF1KxkIjRKM6owajk90n_-gj2YuAPjt1zAqZLHRJif9C6SjaURTmzIzNvmleKLsVmn1LMufZQtRTLEO5Uau8DwhJKJG1l2CTqQbU9z-BNu_o3tCTMY19X2XoC8BkY6gzFqxIFxSUdVTTPlzuxyvn3fXOrxgcYEA6AjJMYr_kQoJNCxcVBUWYSW-fn5Zb9wF30nVFo4Rjrs0ZWcLO-KjM6YltiQFygwejIa3MkbSe_F1K5dVIASXYlqq0oEG8bF9o%3D)

name: Peter Ohtaki
subject: ATC+AI
body:
ATC + AI Peter Ohtaki — February 1, 2025 If you were President, wouldn’t you direct the FAA by Executive Order to use AI to prevent plane crashes like what happened last week? AI-driven Air Traffic Co | | | [](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67a3a755e4ce2d589e28dbd8&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.mainstreamrevolution.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D679f02a55d64f04311d52f26%26ss_email_id%3D67a3a755e4ce2d589e28dbd8%26ss_campaign_name%3DATC%252BAI%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-02-05T18%253A01%253A24Z&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_679f02a55d64f04311d52f26&l=en-US&s=JsBR7p0bLcVa47bI-uRSHW_qleI%3D)
---
|
## ATC + AI
---
Peter Ohtaki — February 1, 2025
---
If you were President, wouldn’t you direct the FAA by Executive Order to use AI to prevent plane crashes like what happened last week?
1. AI-driven Air Traffic Collision Warning system
2. AI re-routing air corridors for more separation
3. AI to warn and help pilots diagnose mechanical failure in seconds rather than minutes

Like Operation Warp Speed or Apollo, a program. to update our antiquated Air Traffic Control (ATC) system. Luckily, you just announced [Stargate](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67a3a755e4ce2d589e28dbd8&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.reuters.com%2Ftechnology%2Fartificial-intelligence%2Ftrump-announce-private-sector-ai-infrastructure-investment-cbs-reports-2025-01-21%2F&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_679f02a55d64f04311d52f26&l=en-US&s=7K3Xl8WJDFdrrlDWaFLUVmvAKJ0%3D), the $500 B AI-infrastucture fund with VC Masayoshi Son, Larry Ellison, and Sam Altman (ChatGPT) so there’s your funding.
---
|
---
| FlightAware DCA 1-31-25
---
#### **AI-driven Air Traffic Collision Warning system**
Using AI to continuously monitor our air space for potential air traffic collision to give pilots a couple minutes warning. It would monitor aircraft transponder heading, speed, altitude and radar info as you can see in [FlightAware](https://engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=67a3a755e4ce2d589e28dbd8&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.flightaware.com%2F&w=6619ff0a31aa07375378c596&c=b_679f02a55d64f04311d52f26&l=en-US&s=lRmT-Mc2YEwY2mow4WkWIvREfOM%3D), to predict and warn both aircraft of collision.
#### **AI re-routing air corridors for more separation**
The helicopter air corridor over the Potomac is only a few hundred feet under a DCA runway glidepath. I was appointed to the Select Committee on South Bay Arrivals near SFO in 2016-17, and the BDEGA landing corridor is about 4,000 feet above my house. Separation is safety.
#### **AI to diagnose mechanical failures for pilots**
The Philadelphia Medevac jet appears to have had a massive mechanical failure. What if we used AI to analyze all the flight data recorder info collected by the NTSB to identify symptoms of fatal mechanical failure? What if AI could warn pilots of a mechanical failure in flight in seconds and provide corrective action?
---

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Three Ways to Stop Elon Musk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
We must come together and fight.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101602487/526482971/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmUyYmExYi1lY2UzLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sJ2PeoKDQDJM2kfn6y03dpia1S_neNPm8Idvm1wEobU=)
Team,
Elon Musk is currently waging a hostile takeover of our government. From hijacking vital financial systems to unilaterally shutting down entire federal agencies, Elon is causing unparralled damage to our country.
It's crucial that we unite to stop this unelected billionaire from dismantling our federal government from the inside out. Here are three immediate actions you can take to help push back against Musk's dangerous agenda:
**1) Donate to Candidates Running in 2026**
In order to take back the majority in 2026, we must defend every Democratic seat and work to flip key districts. That's why I've founded the **Justice League PAC** —to help hold the Trump/Musk administration accountable and support candidates in tough districts who are fighting to restore democracy.
[Please consider making a donation to the Justice League PAC today. The fight for 2026 has already begun, and your support will make a difference in securing a brighter future for our country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101602488/526482972/1811114784?refcode2=e6e2ba1b-ece3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&refcode=em250205&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmUyYmExYi1lY2UzLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sJ2PeoKDQDJM2kfn6y03dpia1S_neNPm8Idvm1wEobU=)

[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101602489/526482973/1811114784?refcode2=e6e2ba1b-ece3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&refcode=em250205&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmUyYmExYi1lY2UzLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sJ2PeoKDQDJM2kfn6y03dpia1S_neNPm8Idvm1wEobU=)

**2) Connect with Grassroots Groups Leading Actions Nationwide**
Direct actions, such as peaceful protests, are some of the most effective ways to amplify our voices and demand accountability. Two incredible grassroots organizations leading the charge are [Indivisble](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101602490/526482974/-1918407891?refcode=em250205&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmUyYmExYi1lY2UzLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sJ2PeoKDQDJM2kfn6y03dpia1S_neNPm8Idvm1wEobU=&emci=68f9208b-d3e3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e6e2ba1b-ece3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=16877361) & [MoveOn](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101602491/526482975/-1615429246?refcode=em250205&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmUyYmExYi1lY2UzLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sJ2PeoKDQDJM2kfn6y03dpia1S_neNPm8Idvm1wEobU=&emci=68f9208b-d3e3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e6e2ba1b-ece3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=16877361). Join them to be part of nationwide actions aimed at halting Musk's destructive path.
**3)[Organize Your Community & Contact Republican Members of Congress](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101602492/526482976/-718298578?refcode=em250205&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmUyYmExYi1lY2UzLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sJ2PeoKDQDJM2kfn6y03dpia1S_neNPm8Idvm1wEobU=&emci=68f9208b-d3e3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=e6e2ba1b-ece3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=16877361)**
Republicans hold a razor-thin majority in both the House and Senate—just two seats in the House of Representatives. It only takes a few Republican lawmakers to step up and find their conscience in order to help hold the Trump/Musk administration accountable.
Thank you for your commitment to defending our democracy.
Onward,
Robert

Folks, in the shuffle of the _dozens_ of executive orders signed by Donald Trump during his first weeks as president was the following: **_A pause on all funding from the _Bipartisan Infrastructure Law_._** This order is a deep blow to all Americans. The infrastructure law funds projects across New Mexico to improve water security, wildfire safety, road construction, wildlife crossings, and so much more. **With the stroke of a pen, Donald Trump paused these projects — harming families, eliminating jobs, and hurting our economy.** **[I’m fighting back, and I hope you’ll have my back. Trump is eliminating funding for the _Bipartisan Infrastructure Law_ because he’s upset that it was signed by President Biden.
He would rather cut millions of dollars in vital funding than see our country succeed under bipartisan leadership. It’s the _behavior of a sore loser_.
I will work to get that funding back — for oil and gas well clean-up, for road safety in Gallup and McKinley County, and for the Eastern New Mexico Rural Water Project.
**[I’m resisting Trump’s efforts to cut projects out of political spite, but I can’t do it alone. Please, show your support for this work by chipping in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101602662/526483662/675419354?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250205_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzM3MGU4Zi1lY2UzLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GeiIss5HufwBNup-Bz_MhPQAafv5UclbhDF0HtPB4jo=)**

clean_body: Folks, in the shuffle of the dozens of executive orders signed by Donald Trump during his first weeks as president was the following: A pause on all funding from the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law. This order is a deep blow to all Americans. The infrastructure law funds projects across New Mexico to improve water security, wildfire safety, road construction, wildlife crossings, and so much more. With the stroke of a pen, Donald Trump paused these projects — harming families, eliminating jobs, and hurting our economy. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Trump is eliminating funding for the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law because he’s upset that it was signed by President Biden. He would rather cut millions of dollars in vital funding than see our country succeed under bipartisan leadership. It’s the behavior of a sore loser. I will work to get that funding back — for oil and gas well clean-up, for road safety in Gallup and McKinley County, and for the Eastern New Mexico Rural Water Project. = = When we use our collective voices, we can fight the attempts of the Trump Administration to roll back our progress. Thank you, Martin | Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: Can I ask you a question?
body:
|
#
Let me ask you a question: _**How do you think we solve the education crisis in the country? **_ If you're like me, you probably imagine boosting teacher pay, improving test scores, expanding universal preschool, or making our schools safer. You know what would be absolutely catastrophic for our kids? Completely eliminating the Department of Education like the White House is proposing: | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101603762/526486492/1833826092?refcode=em.2.5.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjMwN2FkNC1lZGUzLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5L2lY8XRIlHQj4Ouvtf1VZ04qPyB-yiODmVBhzM5O8A=&emci=e59e0838-d8e3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=a2307ad4-ede3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=27257697) **Trump Advisers Weigh Plan to Dismantle
Education Department**
---
If you didn’t know, I’ve spent my career fighting for Michigan's children – from leading Head Start programs to serving at the Michigan Department of Education and The Skillman Foundation to make childcare more affordable and improve outcomes for kids.
I’ve seen firsthand the challenges our education system faces, and let me be clear: abolishing the Department of Education will _only_ hurt our kids.
It would slash critical funding, dismantle essential childcare programs like Head Start, and put teachers’ jobs **– and the future of our students –** at serious risk.
**Our schools are already underfunded, our teachers are overworked, and parents are stretched thin dealing with the rising cost of childcare. Abolishing the Department of Education is the last thing we need.**
As a mom of six, I know what it means to juggle the demands of family, work, and the need for quality education and care. I've lived it, and I've always fought for policies that put families first. You have my word that I won't back down from this fight in Congress.
[**I’d appreciate you joining me now by signing my petition standing against dismantling the Department of Education. clean_body: | Let me ask you a question: How do you think we solve the education crisis in the country? If you're like me, you probably imagine boosting teacher pay, improving test scores, expanding universal preschool, or making our schools safer. You know what would be absolutely catastrophic for our kids? Completely eliminating the Department of Education like the White House is proposing: | Trump Advisers Weigh Plan to Dismantle Education Department If you didn’t know, I’ve spent my career fighting for Michigan's children – from leading Head Start programs to serving at the Michigan Department of Education and The Skillman Foundation to make childcare more affordable and improve outcomes for kids. I’ve seen firsthand the challenges our education system faces, and let me be clear: abolishing the Department of Education will only hurt our kids. It would slash critical funding, dismantle essential childcare programs like Head Start, and put teachers’ jobs – and the future of our students – at serious risk. Our schools are already underfunded, our teachers are overworked, and parents are stretched thin dealing with the rising cost of childcare. Abolishing the Department of Education is the last thing we need. As a mom of six, I know what it means to juggle the demands of family, work, and the need for quality education and care. I've lived it, and I've always fought for policies that put families first. You have my word that I won't back down from this fight in Congress. | Thank you, Kristen | = | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

name: Ro Khanna
subject: URGENT: Tell Congress to defend the Department of Education
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

According to NBC reports [https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/donald-trump/white-house-preparing-executive-order-abolish-department-education-rcna190205] , President Trump is planning an executive order to eliminate the Department of Education.

We can save it. Sign my petition to demand Congress defend the Department of Education. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/department-of-education-petition?contactdata=5GQpkatWjNtHXkYJmRY0R2HN1xMnHnIQlx2FleG7gULwbpzV/EbHUpBIJESFmed8J9n5UyVJbiD/a/wjBFlZCBXSCkPiua5R4Kw7OFB2yr0I/yzjVXvQHocms5p+h4StabYQxxtMU1gEp0xvSBoVjw==]

Trump doesn’t have the authority to dismantle the Department of Education. It’s illegal, and it’s an assault on every child, parent, and teacher who depends on free quality public education just like I did.

https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1886931409937555726 [https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1886931409937555726]

As the son of a substitute teacher, I learned the value of education and hard work and benefited from quality public schools.

Sign the petition: Congress must protect the Department of Education. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/department-of-education-petition?contactdata=5GQpkatWjNtHXkYJmRY0R2HN1xMnHnIQlx2FleG7gULwbpzV/EbHUpBIJESFmed8J9n5UyVJbiD/a/wjBFlZCBXSCkPiua5R4Kw7OFB2yr0I/yzjVXvQHocms5p+h4StabYQxxtMU1gEp0xvSBoVjw==]

ADD YOUR NAME [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/department-of-education-petition?contactdata=5GQpkatWjNtHXkYJmRY0R2HN1xMnHnIQlx2FleG7gULwbpzV/EbHUpBIJESFmed8J9n5UyVJbiD/a/wjBFlZCBXSCkPiua5R4Kw7OFB2yr0I/yzjVXvQHocms5p+h4StabYQxxtMU1gEp0xvSBoVjw==]

Thank you for your activism and all that you do.

In solidarity,
Ro

Wait! One more thing–

Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. Peter – Last night, I led 2 dozen members of Congress to the Treasury Department to DEMAND answers on what Elon Musk is doing with our constituents’ sensitive information.
We were denied entry. What did Elon have to say about it?

“👋”

Peter, this isn’t a f***ing joke. **An unelected billionaire has seized control of a checkbook for the entire federal government and the sensitive information of hundreds of millions of Americans... _including you_ , Peter.**

There’s no telling what he’s doing with your information behind closed doors. So we’re not laughing – we’re fighting the hell back.

Unchecked power like this from someone that NOBODY elected is an exact warning sign of fascism. I will not allow it to continue, but I need your help to keep fighting. **And if you wanna beat an unelected billionaire, you need a _lot_ of grassroots help.**

name: Ron Wyden
subject: An authoritarian takeover
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101606234/526492827/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGU3N2M0OC1mMmUzLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mI2FtuZtiH9V6Av_8uawVVMNtcVjAjjAHn5Km2d7X_8=&emci=8679279b-dfe3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=30e77c48-f2e3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Over the weekend, Elon Musk and Donald Trump seized control of the highly-sensitive payment system at the Treasury Department. This means they have access to Social Security and Medicare payments, the money owed to government workers, and much more. This is an authoritarian takeover of our government. Needless to say, I am terrified at the prospect of an unelected, Nazi-saluting billionaire having access to the most sensitive inner workings of our federal government. **Just hours ago, I was in front of the Treasury Department to send the message loud and clear to Elon Musk: get your hands off our money, and get the hell out.** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101606235/526492828/-2044921950?refcode=2025-02-05-musk&recurring=yes&amount=14&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=30e77c48-f2e3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGU3N2M0OC1mMmUzLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mI2FtuZtiH9V6Av_8uawVVMNtcVjAjjAHn5Km2d7X_8=) Normally when a bank gets robbed, the thieves have to forcefully break in. **But imagine if the bank manager – of their own free will – happily handed the thieves the keys to the vault.** That's the best way to describe what is happening right now. Elon Musk wants to rip away Americans' hard-earned benefits and raid the government's coffers to help himself. And the Trump administration just let him walk in and take our most sensitive and private information. This is illegal. It's an issue of national security and economic stability. And it needs to stop _now._ Musk's access must immediately be revoked, and the American people need fast answers from Secretary Bessent on why he let this happen and what damage has already been done. clean_body: | | | | Over the weekend, Elon Musk and Donald Trump seized control of the highly-sensitive payment system at the Treasury Department. This means they have access to Social Security and Medicare payments, the money owed to government workers, and much more. This is an authoritarian takeover of our government. Needless to say, I am terrified at the prospect of an unelected, Nazi-saluting billionaire having access to the most sensitive inner workings of our federal government. Just hours ago, I was in front of the Treasury Department to send the message loud and clear to Elon Musk: get your hands off our money, and get the hell out. = Normally when a bank gets robbed, the thieves have to forcefully break in. But imagine if the bank manager – of their own free will – happily handed the thieves the keys to the vault. That's the best way to describe what is happening right now. Elon Musk wants to rip away Americans' hard-earned benefits and raid the government's coffers to help himself. And the Trump administration just let him walk in and take our most sensitive and private information. This is illegal. It's an issue of national security and economic stability. And it needs to stop now. Musk's access must immediately be revoked, and the American people need fast answers from Secretary Bessent on why he let this happen and what damage has already been done. name: Oregon GOP
subject: Celebrating National Girls & Women in Sports Day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
Honoring the Strength, Dedication, and Achievements of Female Athletes.

| | | | [ ](https://oregon.gop/)
---
| | Friend, Today, on National Girls and Women in Sports Day, we celebrate female athletes whose strength, discipline, and perseverance equip them to achieve not merely in sports, but also in our businesses, our communities, and our country.
---
| | [ ](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/exLpSg3-6EfY/SmRQamR2SEZkSEFnOUQ4SU5RSTdZTHFiYndZcjcrcUoxcUUwcmdjVWo1SkFpTTdGYnlUenFONnhZa2dZMjhsUEFIYzE1TTRmRjUvWkVJUzVMdWI1SGgrVkJJZFE5TE1UWXQzMjNSc3VNSDg9S0/)
---
| | From young girls stepping onto the field for the first time to world-class champions breaking records, their dedication, perseverance, and passion continue to inspire generations. Sports teach valuable lessons – teamwork, leadership, discipline, and resilience. They empower young women to dream big, work hard, and break barriers. Throughout history, female athletes have shown the world what is possible when discipline and determination come together. With President Trump back in the White House, we welcome his fierce determination to protect and celebrate fair competition in women’s sports. Every young female athlete deserves a level playing field, and we are committed to ensuring their hard work and dedication are not thwarted by unfair competition. Join us in celebrating the achievements of female athletes everywhere today! Thank you, Oregon Republican Party
---
---

Now, he’s on the verge of being confirmed to lead the FBI. Horrifying. # BILLS THAT PASSED THE FULL SENATE
---
| [SB738](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoEmlXufohx-fPPcY9rYrFyrtjZJg4mXhrKaY6IdJ1FuyIFrpd3VZ0nxWG7b0uG3Ucm7-u-uGWKa8QnWI_z-bSvOfIPgn_8G5WnBEqt5kU6dOsG_mBHAIx4uI1l4C248_ab1Sn9neXdOH&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Public elementary & secondary schools; student cell phone & smart device possession & use policies. Directs each school board to develop and each public elementary and secondary school to implement age-appropriate and developmentally appropriate policies relating to the possession and use of cell phones by students on school property during regular school hours. The bill requires such policies to (i) restrict, to the fullest extent possible, student cell phone possession and use in the classroom during regular school hours;
[SB740](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoMOR8lgp35JH15YAPixR_LAyQ1Pn-xwbHE8YqmBUR7VDe2xz-1Wt-NHwtNagKB8lNMPRNZ8LbzpN7YTXmECWYig7-pc7nTOmrKzDm6Lqk9LeGo3upvFh-gndaNV6-EFwG69iwqp1F-jR&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Medicine, Board of; continuing education, unconscious bias and cultural competency. Directs the Board of Medicine to require unconscious bias and cultural competency training as part of the continuing education requirements for renewal of licensure. The bill specifies requirements for the training and requires the Board of Medicine to report on the training to the Department of Health and the Virginia Neonatal Perinatal Collaborative.
[SB743](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoL20InOWbW2AnnHr8TAFCarhAHJF5P9N8fn34na9ZFWxGm17XsPOUEqOYrFeUtzmCCSs9ZnqwVtat4Kna32h7LWZ699SkN9qxCFrZ9NIBOcQOr5eWhoCYCH9TvkeQCLd7BV3xvOVw-xt&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Reproductive health care services; prohibitions on extradition for certain crimes. Provides that no demand for extradition of a person charged with a criminal violation of law of another state shall be recognized by the Governor if such alleged violation involves the receipt or provision of or assistance with reproductive health care services, as defined in the bill, within the Commonwealth unless the alleged criminal violation would also constitute a criminal offense under the laws of the Commonwealth. The bill also provides that such limit on extradition shall not apply when the person who is accused of an alleged offense in the demanding state was physically present in the demanding state at the time of the commission of the alleged offense and thereafter fled from such state.
[SB744](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoMOR8lgp35JHqUXkDjCSnI0pOS97HKc2-HVkmY-koNd9PxSE3NjN9iisfBu25RPh3cvW8Ha52PDoknOj2_SR6wFv0git6FDsj2ZkmfPBM9rluORtd3TlEAuy-zfo0U1LS-N4UrOCdEph&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Firearm transfers to another person from a prohibited person. Provides that a person who is prohibited from possessing a firearm because such person is subject to a protective order or has been convicted of an assault and battery of a family or household member may transfer a firearm owned by such prohibited person to any person who is not otherwise prohibited by law from possessing such firearm, provided that such person who is not otherwise prohibited by law from possessing such firearm is 21 years of age or older and does not reside with the person who is subject to the protective order.
Under current law, there is no requirement that such transferee cannot be younger than 21 years of age and cannot reside with such prohibited person.
The bill also provides that such prohibited person who transfers, sells, or surrenders a firearm pursuant to the provisions of the bill shall inform the clerk of the court of the name and address of the transferee, the federally licensed firearms dealer, or the law-enforcement agency in possession of the firearm and shall provide a copy of such form to the transferee.
The bill also provides that a person who is prohibited from possessing a firearm because such person is subject to a protective order or has been convicted of an assault and battery of a family or household member shall be advised that a law-enforcement officer may obtain a search warrant to search for any firearms from such person if such law-enforcement officer has reason to believe that such person has not relinquished all firearms in his possession.
[SB775](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoL20InOWbW2AFN_dWqDBnT3PlPzHdgmqk4DAR-Gtkb-5sIuLimw0yZalYPzkJy7Rp4NIgFE8z5IPnbTmcGShPflMd8P7YgNr14WOhIcw0Y5MjUxdJmQ-ZfW7z2eUTq86bjpfiQHHa6G2&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Elections; election offenses; dissemination of artificial audio or artificial visual media to influence an election; penalty. Prohibits any person from disseminating artificial audio or artificial visual media, as defined in the bill, intended to influence a political campaign that such person knows or should have known is deceptive or misleading.
The bill provides that such prohibition shall not apply if such media includes a conspicuous statement that states \"THIS MEDIA DOES NOT REPRESENT A TRUE RECORDING OF THE CANDIDATE\" either for the duration of a visual media or a verbal reading of such statement at the beginning of audio media.
The bill provides that any person who fails to include such statement shall be subject to a civil penalty not to exceed $50, but if such person disseminates such artificial audio or artificial visual media being disseminated (i) takes place within 90 days before an election, (ii) is made without the consent of the depicted candidate, and (iii) is made with the intent to injure a candidate or influence the result of an election, such person is guilty of a Class 1 misdemeanor. The bill also provides that any (a) depicted individual, (b) candidate for office who has been injured or is likely to be injured by the distribution of artificial audio or artificial visual media, or (c) entity that represents the interests of voters likely to be deceived by such dissemination shall be entitled to institute an action in the circuit court of the locality where venue would be proper for the prosecution of computer crimes for preventative relief, including an application for a permanent or temporary injunction, restraining order, or other order, against the person who has disseminated the artificial audio or artificial visual media. The bill also provides exceptions for certain content, including when such content constitutes satire or parody.
[SB780](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoL20InOWbW2A8VGlBgX8FQYqQEurrixB-oeq1zLtdZz3_DG5uUsm7Ce0Zig5WPE24692soS73WLimLFTz9-ApWl3yGd2r5uwqiNeF7-bDyTL-NTkHteZ0hzdhRKi_m8_HayCQ3O5SjOy&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Health insurance; coverage for contraceptive drugs and devices Requires health insurance carriers to provide coverage, under any health insurance contract, policy, or plan that includes coverage for prescription drugs on an outpatient basis, for contraceptive drugs and contraceptive devices, as defined in the bill, including those available over-the-counter. The bill prohibits a health insurance carrier from imposing upon any person receiving contraceptive benefits pursuant to the provisions of the bill any copayment, coinsurance payment, or fee, except in certain circumstances.
[SB848](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoL20InOWbW2AR1QRxLCUFA2vhIMTlonhl04XRaCHl3ROrVnWCpe9Jkt2jCeLFbukIuKsJz4eVPB53U6dd3SD67Z__YHmkt6McyU6ZftcmpCYLQC2CwbRBiiuD8V9d5X0RJoiEpFnpONA&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Firearms, certain; age requirement for purchase, penalty. Prohibits any person under 21 years of age from purchasing an assault firearm, with exceptions for the purchase of an assault firearm by a law-enforcement officer, correctional officer, jail officer, or member of the Armed Forces of the United States, the Virginia National Guard, or the National Guard of any other state. Accordingly, the bill prohibits a licensed dealer from selling, renting, trading, or transferring from his inventory an assault firearm to any person under 21 years of age. A violation of either prohibition is a Class 6 felony. The bill also expands the definition of assault firearm as the term applies to criminal history record information checks.
[SB880](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoL20InOWbW2Ai5AojUIEsEt4j8qbo1r3lXy18xk7_cpzVFTRmu00nq_RZbmaHBClkPwOLXSN8Si4LHb__rpEeiot4fkQ7iYurJfOSp1o3w3S9FPscCMr0kCyPXyHONUGyJVoEkk8Oacv&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Assault firearms; carrying in public areas prohibited, penalty. Prohibits the carrying of certain semi-automatic center-fire rifles and shotguns on any public street, road, alley, sidewalk, or public right-of-way or in any public park or any other place of whatever nature that is open to the public, with certain exceptions. Under current law, the current prohibition on carrying certain shotguns and semi-automatic center-fire rifles and pistols applies to a narrower range of firearms, only in certain localities, and only when such firearms are loaded.
[SB881](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoL20InOWbW2AK7Tyl6tgeJQgx7suPbRACftVbMoHl0X4w-uvYAgUFRFcLDksBjLzDFralU9_eXe2WxUD2qihRu84-KwflIA2FFjWaJ_PvIXUVp9ca4K4xdIyz3eg1psa3trTveexPrfe&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Plastic firearms or receivers, unserialized firearms, etc.; transfer, etc., prohibited, penalties. Creates a Class 5 felony for any person who knowingly manufactures or assembles, imports, purchases, sells, transfers, or possesses any firearm that, after removal of all parts other than a major component, as defined in the bill, is not detectable as a firearm when subjected to inspection by the types of detection devices, including X-ray machines, commonly used at airports, government buildings, schools, correctional facilities, and other locations for security screening. The bill updates language regarding the types of detection devices that are used at such locations for detecting plastic firearms. Under current law, it is unlawful to manufacture, import, sell, transfer, or possess any plastic firearm and a violation is punishable as a Class 5 felony.
[SB883](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoI-TBHcO2W7VCPpareUabbo-mgCB7DYLNYoHdRmcD1mVnPHoCtx0MbXjojY65H_CPoFkUA5Y0L8-Jf5k80J2TQkVnCm5ZbpWIP64qe2juDrGnZ7lFK2yoEUcmVevB2mxReod8miJkjeW&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Firearms; purchase, etc., assault and battery of family member or intimate partner, penalties. Adds to the existing definition of "family or household member" a person's intimate partner, defined in the bill as an individual who, within the previous 12 months, was in a romantic, dating, or sexual relationship with the person. The bill also provides that any person who knowingly and intentionally purchases, possesses, or transports any firearm following a misdemeanor conviction for an offense that occurred on or after July 1, 2025, for the offense of assault and battery against an intimate partner or an offense substantially similar under the laws of any other state or of the United States is guilty of a Class 1 misdemeanor.
[SB886](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoI-TBHcO2W7V5IXsz1sanY0xmvJu6grJ7aEtss5aVB0p9kMQvJTmPtIe4Oi5gebppPiQV1dzToC2qwM6N2W22jUKXHdBHI7mAUBm3ESv3H8q-RTXJc8KiuRN9dN70mBZPOXMhXrfp09-&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Trigger activator; definition does not include semi-automatic replacement trigger, etc., penalty. Defines \\\"trigger activator\\\" as a conversion kit, tool, accessory, or device designed to alter the rate of fire of a semi-automatic firearm to mimic automatic weapon fire or used to increase the rate of fire to a rate faster than such semi-automatic firearm can achieve when not equipped with a conversion kit, tool, accessory, or device. The bill clarifies that \"trigger activator\" includes a bump stock, trigger crank, hellfire trigger, binary trigger system, burst trigger system, or a copy thereof, but does not include a semi-automatic replacement trigger, designed for use in competitive shooting, that improves performance and functionality over the stock trigger.
[SB891](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoL20InOWbW2AYjVvXUiupeILFU1xpJAFeHtuBipSA2DLZOHLmRnjAZsGxxRUr8vc-jekeyuKtZ2vVGzLF14SPqWCZXLcY8iskHcg94ig_CT87SF1SGhQRmLG5H6v-5hQL2K3NUekC72W&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Firearms; five day waiting period, penalty. Provides that no person shall sell a firearm unless at least five days have elapsed from the time the prospective purchaser completes the written consent form to have a licensed dealer obtain criminal history record information, with exceptions enumerated in relevant law.
[SB927](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoL20InOWbW2ABfeQzzaszJ7lvDHOBM1va1ZaZJf1x5hURpJ2iPtakldPzuhVs_Eh3bIBDdzuwNI738gPdgVWDe-q1pAh1M3fUa8Vg78oq52ICZPJsg_XjYXl-bogNXk3nZ3GCmeGteFq&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Virginia Sports Tourism Fund; definitions, created, report. Creates the Virginia Sports Tourism Fund, to be Administered by the Virginia Tourism Authority, to provide grants to sports tourism activity sponsors, defined in the bill, in order to develop and attract sports tourism activities, also defined in the bill, to the Commonwealth. The bill requires the Virginia Tourism Authority to establish guidelines and criteria for grant awards and to report annually on the Fund and grant program. The bill also requires a work group of stakeholders to be convened to recommend guidelines for grant disbursements from the Fund and report such recommendations to the General Assembly by October 31, 2025.
[SB970](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoMOR8lgp35JHfWLnxOaImGPQj81r-96RN5vB-WqaJlwSQoFr8kfK09OSEK-D2mZn5TU2P4w5ud0f4DfsesQzTeob9m6aNsYYR-VPzFTBuB6cxnyjDIs-6flmHeFSSzrgW2kQYGxxP2Ps&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Cannabis control; establishes framework for creating retail market, penalties. Establishes a framework for the creation of a retail marijuana market in the Commonwealth, to be administered by the Virginia Cannabis Control Authority. The bill allows the Authority to begin issuing all marijuana licenses on September 1, 2025, but provides that no retail sales may occur prior to May 1, 2026.
[SB982](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoL20InOWbW2ACzJ1XhYYAegtvNaSu7P82FizHv5-EIuaknV8Q20Gh25ZCF37OIPYcxJJQiZZmm0BvUHY7xUIJCAv6uQN5cnct8rc7eOafFj7Fiyk7qkeYR_-SW5m-85FQQhoqYh0nAMX&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Casino gaming; eligible host localities. Adds Fairfax County to the list of localities eligible to host a casino in the Commonwealth and provides that any proposed site for a casino gaming establishment considered by Fairfax County shall be (i) located within one-quarter of a mile of an existing station on the Metro Silver Line, (ii) part of a coordinated mixed-use project development consisting of no less than 1.5 million square feet, (iii) within two miles of a regional enclosed mall containing not less than 1.5 million square feet of gross building area, and (iv) outside of the Interstate 495 Beltway.
[SB1002](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoL20InOWbW2A1GY_EgV70ZPKWOyrfD1AUeZQXZ4OiDp39xUa3TJp8K1w5tFxBc-cckBQ5IdmwpTQAC0TEAC4i_rOdgNCfFahGUigIJ8WdC8DqgyeXPu9M7yP_n3rZtPyad50s_TYRjvU&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Campaign finance; prohibited personal use of campaign funds, etc. Prohibits any person from converting contributions to a candidate or his campaign committee for personal use. Current law only prohibits such conversion of contributions with regard to disbursement of surplus funds at the dissolution of a campaign or political committee. The bill provides that a contribution is considered to have been converted to personal use if the contribution, in whole or in part, is used to fulfill any commitment, obligation, or expense that would exist irrespective of the person's seeking, holding, or maintaining public office but allows a contribution to be used for the ordinary and accepted expenses related to campaigning for or holding elective office, including the use of campaign funds to pay for the candidate's dependent care expenses that are incurred as a direct result of campaign activity. The bill provides that any person subject to the personal use ban may request an advisory opinion from the State Board of Elections on such matters. The bill directs the State Board of Elections to adopt emergency regulations similar to those promulgated by the Federal Election Commission to implement the provisions of the bill and to publish an updated summary of Virginia campaign finance law that reflects the State Board of Elections' and Attorney General's guidance on the provisions of such law that prohibit the personal use of campaign funds and any new regulations
[SB1009](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoL20InOWbW2AzRsesedcDiZoizqxA9HvmkArSOkHNcH1JRuXKRYeRGlQfs78A19a9-xoXQvMORS5K4r-Q2_jZxhcOj4ODzwBM-IUUbImkTz8ZgVsofFrc2vB8H98LhApWNMzw-zpszfY&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Elections; conduct of election, ranked choice voting, locally elected offices, report. Allows elections for any local office to be conducted by ranked choice voting. The bill requires the State Board of Elections to provide standards for and to approve vote tabulating software for use with existing voting systems in elections conducted by ranked choice voting and to produce generalized voter education materials on ranked choice voting. The bill permits the State Board to create and modify recount procedures to the extent necessary to accommodate a recount of an election conducted by ranked choice voting. Finally, the bill directs the Department of Elections to review the testing and approval framework for voting equipment in the Commonwealth and submit a report of such review no later than the first day of the 2026 Regular Session of the General Assembly.
[SB1044](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoL20InOWbW2AiSejiL5-A9qgMoA_uOsNL3k2yuZFLyPSGCwjfmbJvJbOTNZ_YE9d6JFEI91awByUMR2VKfWTviWbI09U8XJhroE_epxcU1W9E5rIH6-696Q16BGWEb31JmSJHuiP6PzO&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Elections; general registrar of each locality to report number of provisional ballots cast. Requires the general registrar of each locality to report to the Department of Elections for each precinct in his locality the total number of provisional ballots cast, the number of those provisional ballots determined to be valid by the electoral board, and the results of such valid provisional ballots by voters assigned to such precinct. Results from provisional voting and voting at the precinct on election day must be reported separately. The Department shall establish standards for ascertaining and reporting such information. Such standards must direct that all results be posted promptly and no later than 5:00 p.m. on the tenth day after the election day.
[SB1048](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoGi-YuNvq73zobPS7swle3LlHufMeRbJ8Bdgr9RtRDZzmHnAMfJuXmCphTWLSZLD6MpI0s9UZdsNcixsmSMBFGdsxN5JzqRa0YTjfePtd3HjqTJyWGsH_vk7a599JxUhX_lrYxb4hb_o&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) School board policies; parental notification, safe storage of prescription drugs and firearms, etc. Requires each local school board to develop and implement a policy to require the annual notification of the parent of each student enrolled in the local school division, to be sent by email and, if applicable, SMS text message within 30 calendar days succeeding the first day of each school year, of (i) the importance of securely storing any prescription drug, as defined in relevant law, present in the household and (ii) the parent's legal responsibility to safely store any firearm present in the household. The bill requires each school board to make such parental notification available in multiple languages on its website.
[SB1098](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoEmlXufohx-f5ayctcT2uu3NxBgZyiTv15GoUNLD2aDmoaNs7d3feuR6PXcD2OhAFqYr0t_OOqNWrU0GS2Mz5F_Ujyctva8kUgOPopWjYCywLrctGTFfZ6t0tFmVtMe9e_UgnIzQ0bUS&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Virginia Reproductive and Gender-Affirming Health Care Protection Act. Provides that no demand for extradition of a person charged with a criminal violation of law of another state shall be recognized by the Governor if such alleged violation involves protected health care activity within the Commonwealth unless the alleged criminal violation would also constitute a criminal offense under the laws of the Commonwealth. Protected health care activity is defined in the bill as the provision or receipt, attempted provision or receipt, or assistance or attempted assistance in the provision or receipt of any health care that is lawful in the Commonwealth by a health care provider licensed under the laws of the Commonwealth and physically present in the Commonwealth.
[SB1105](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoKjaYkx4CTpgTabFtd6dZOgYjzCxvVZd3GFfrVM6pEIRVZg5M7CMRcuSggBtSKQOrdn7WlIhKv-YQNlUAE5YgtJTrUeG7YPvtz3GxUnQvKnAgS1Sx9qjI6Ya0uCiXEqT8VDxc3Y2J5Bo&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Contraception; establishes right to obtain, enforcement. Establishes a right to obtain contraceptives and engage in contraception, as defined in the bill. The bill creates a cause of action that may be instituted against anyone who infringes on such right.
[SB1110](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoL20InOWbW2AN1TfqjTsKuhOVvFQMw0o2UJOCIMDV7zLueZyz6JH_ssbAiZgtjcE9dUMCCI30jSJtXD9twKMl4eeAX3i4dLbKg9S_pZ12bd-eTBJwLznOjb4E15-L33_P6sdgQQObWEq&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Weapons; possession prohibited in a hospital that provides mental health or developmental services. Makes it a Class 1 misdemeanor for any person to knowingly and intentionally possess in the building of any hospital that provides mental health services or developmental services in the Commonwealth, including an emergency department or other facility rendering emergency medical care, a (i) firearm, (ii) knife with a blade over three and one-half inches, or (iii) other dangerous weapon, including explosives and stun weapons. The bill also provides that notice of such prohibitions shall be posted conspicuously at each public entrance of any hospital and no person shall be convicted of the offense if such notice is not posted, unless such person had actual notice of the prohibitions. The bill provides that any such firearm, knife, explosive, or weapon shall be subject to seizure by a law-enforcement officer and forfeited to the Commonwealth and specifies exceptions to the prohibition.
[SB1134](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoL20InOWbW2A4AgTCusXdqblpG35Ks6YyVlVI0w9d4FtOmXunvXc7F16o5XoXXtLjgF08Iwn-wIEE5FVabEBKMV_QWNkDNgAHdcbvbgD-sVQwB8ZsyYGMnxAUA6pkxFr_LYNaWiFiY3p&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Firearms; storage in residence where minor or person prohibited from possessing is present, penalty. Requires any person who possesses a firearm in a residence where such person knows that a minor or a person who is prohibited by law from possessing a firearm is present to store such firearm and the ammunition for such firearm in a locked container, compartment, or cabinet that is inaccessible to such minor or prohibited person. The bill provides that a violation is a Class 4 misdemeanor. The bill exempts (i) any person in lawful possession of a firearm who carries such firearm on or about his person and (ii) the storage of antique firearms and provides that the lawful authorization of a minor to access a firearm is not a violation of the bill's provisions. The bill also requires firearm dealers to post a notice stating such firearm storage requirements and the penalty for improperly storing such firearms.
[SB1181](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoL20InOWbW2AaeVVtHw2E2wirILbt3KeeKeKlKFqW3MYXegfGcS5Wi6XYOaAzi2OBjOa-NwZGH9imjWdQJ_DrUvun3d3FxDyIPjZz_fUEFjzcQ3JteqS1JQpcg4ZDrw8gJgQorwemiwE&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Assault firearms/certain ammunition feeding devices; purchase, etc., prohibited, exception, penalty. Creates a Class 1 misdemeanor for any person who imports, sells, manufactures, purchases, possesses, transports, or transfers an assault firearm, as that term is defined in the bill, and prohibits a person who has been convicted of such violation from purchasing, possessing, or transporting a firearm for a period of three years from the date of conviction. The bill provides that an assault firearm does not include any firearm that is an antique firearm, has been rendered permanently inoperable, is manually operated by bolt, pump, lever, or slide action, or was manufactured before July 1, 2025. The bill also prohibits the sale of a large capacity ammunition feeding device, as that term is defined in the bill. The bill provides that any person who willfully and intentionally (i) sells an assault firearm to another person or (ii) purchases an assault firearm from another person is guilty of a Class 1 misdemeanor and that any person who imports, sells, barters, or transfers a large capacity ammunition feeding device is guilty of a Class 1 misdemeanor and exempts members of cadet corps that are recognized by a public institution of higher education while such member is in the performance of lawful military training or participating in an official ceremonial event for the Commonwealth. The bill also makes it a Class 1 misdemeanor for any person younger than 21 years of age to import, sell, manufacture, purchase, possess, transport, or transfer an assault firearm regardless of the date of manufacture of such assault firearm and exempts members of cadet corps that are recognized by a public institution of higher education while such member is in the performance of lawful military training or participating in an official ceremonial event for the Commonwealth.
[SB1182](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoI-TBHcO2W7VlhreYzzimxaualocJV57uFp7dbIKwe9WNE7vQWx8GET5EpAhz-z8qL3hN8nTHo2HlnKwcScgS1GV4vbzw8jSMYS2OmbP9M4ltPcTJ9FgZ7pUJxivysotD8BHyBEbPg9t&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Capitol Sq. or building owned/leased by the Commonwealth, carrying firearm/explosive material, etc. Permits the governing board of a public institution of higher education to adopt a policy prohibiting the carrying of any firearm, ammunition, or components or combination thereof within any building owned or operated by such public institution of higher education. The bill allows such policy to include security measures that are designed to reasonably prevent the unauthorized access of buildings that are open to the public. Finally, the bill exempts certain activities, defined in the bill, operated at public or private institutions of higher education from any policy created by a governing board.
[SB1329](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoL20InOWbW2AFnuR5HHDGHe3HwZLSuTdqf9tLNZ9TSjMAJmI-quLuS3x-q9itoPLkw7EEe4Il3jQxEi2F3fRmpG-DP5NQP36fGpVT_BHLOyIGdZZwK674g0dLh5r8P8DjoDl-6hDBwDO&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Carrying concealed weapons; exception, penalty. Removes the exception to the prohibition on carrying a concealed weapon for any person who may lawfully possess a firearm and is carrying a handgun while in a personal, private motor vehicle or vessel and such handgun is secured in a container or compartment in the vehicle or vessel.

[SB1450](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoL20InOWbW2A4_GI5Fp2DoraumgI5vVb8i_EJhvEC8JmStkaqH9_7bpZuWdX1U0rtGlbGBJw1x5X7MSbGz-a_Sa3e34v5_E6778J3rPFEr6jPwNnFf2SIU-bLQfgtu3oY-QPmiXKUR9G&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Firearm industry members; creates standards of responsible conduct, civil liability. Creates standards of responsible conduct for firearm industry members and requires such members to establish and implement reasonable controls regarding the manufacture, sale, distribution, use, and marketing of the firearm industry member's firearm-related products, as those terms are defined in the bill. Such reasonable controls include reasonable procedures, safeguards, and business practices that are designed to (i) prevent the sale or distribution of a firearm-related product to a straw purchaser, a firearm trafficker, a person prohibited from possessing a firearm under state or federal law, or a person who the firearm industry member has reasonable cause to believe is at substantial risk of using a firearm-related product to harm themselves or unlawfully harm another or of unlawfully possessing or using a firearm-related product; (ii) prevent the loss of a firearm-related product or theft of a firearm-related product from a firearm industry member; (iii) ensure that the firearm industry member complies with all provisions of state and federal law and does not otherwise promote the unlawful manufacture, sale, possession, marketing, or use of a firearm-related product; and (iv) ensure that the firearm industry member does not engage in an act or practice in violation of the Virginia Consumer Protection Act. The bill also provides that a firearm industry member may not knowingly or recklessly create, maintain, or contribute to a public nuisance, as defined in the bill, through the sale, manufacturing, importing, or marketing of a firearm-related product. The bill creates a civil cause of action for the Attorney General or a local county or city attorney to enforce the provisions of the bill or for any person who has been injured as a result of a firearm industry member's violation to seek an injunction and to recover costs and damages.
[SJ247](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fgfDfubDpnY4CFZKNOPRBAFjBpUTaOXlmbQnc1OBiKDajKR_nmcwoKHAViYqMJWj8HP8oeDP8tLLszrBt6cjFfoVhCFFmV-tdvnow3CPdt1uWvN547nMBaadjbqhRGHn0bYoUniZ-GYmhPMRFp6SC_gY1myn49i1I5ifjM6yOHU4jRhYHP5SkaHmUooJ-Dwv&c=ROO6MgWlN4ztbXMWmrau-IO1ExiIRV_Y9BpsAOQNtwKBd1Hg4Hfe1Q==&ch=iSNY-6j946hOg2WzeEXfrIBWudYZb9_pg7sgKTaDTBChWYbANL6c5g==) Constitutional amendment; fundamental right to reproductive freedom (first reference).

| In the Virginia Senate, each bill has three Constitutional reads. Only bills on the third read and are on the "regular calendar" are debated.
Bills that are on the "uncontested calendar," are bills that all Democrat and Republican Senators gave a thumbs up. So, when the bill comes to the Senator floor from the committee, unless a Senator pulls the bill out of the block, the bill is not debated on the floor and is simply voted on in a block.
As a Senator, I always reviewed the bills on third read on the uncontested calendar and many times would pull a bill out of the block, to hear the patron present the bill, to ensure I was in agreement with the members of the committee.
I've only highlighted bills on the third read for your convenience.
