name: David Horowitz
subject: It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially
body:
| | | ...the deep-state
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[Today, I’m asking you to complete this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c06bbef1584a4ebabdd804b30c3edc36&_e=iADG6jcZGnTG0Xg6nTNUCM6KCFwoA5twtQpWKCSOy9zP1gMTC7_i3qniIc4ks7eAq7GhYEXDImG9KcKWFFeggJ2hJmpiNv3q5OS-lZ3eYVbVfePS8Rw5trTYeUeSWJcuKXFWWRC_1TJ7w6FCaFtztHsMQ7SNnkEihSq0ChFzUXaKXF_5_u4lvfKSTS3QLjUCm6xhG893k73O2AFg3TUyvcAVM6G0sA_xtlnH9KD-2ML07-Q6MAxGFmjXdPZYZVUpZZgKP2uQMsOpLG0-hq6yBvhfN2gsT4XHnM_pi3z0gdPDDasZ-9x9H4TLI_m8AslktM6UP3WnL3gNs4A0pggVfCkoqmRI5JzbhL_Xckb0qmhSw9oLNCv9lDHy3uerED7TE5mNjJzVdOGStd2xqi5z5XKcJ-YhFU7B2UZuNRQWcDo%3D)**
---
| | I’d be willing to bet you’ve never heard of Everett Kelly before.He’s not a member of Congress. He’s not a governor.He doesn’t hold elected office of any kind.And that’s the problem.
---
| [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c06bbef1584a4ebabdd804b30c3edc36&_e=iADG6jcZGnTG0Xg6nTNUCM6KCFwoA5twtQpWKCSOy9zP1gMTC7_i3qniIc4ks7eAq7GhYEXDImG9KcKWFFeggJ2hJmpiNv3q5OS-lZ3eYVbVfePS8Rw5trTYeUeSWJcuKXFWWRC_1TJ7w6FCaFtztHsMQ7SNnkEihSq0ChFzUXaKXF_5_u4lvfKSTS3QLjUCm6xhG893k73O2AFg3TUyvcAVM6G0sA_xtlnH9KD-2ML07-Q6MAxGFmjXdPZYZVUpZZgKP2uQMsOpLG0-hq6yBmqsVbKezQ8OEWErk6KhEBdYX2K_eHkyjlvpM0dx2f3ymFCAV9CDdJ-ogzXAK4y8l01EgHhDG7ZR7K17GUTcLodHnJ1GiJno13xg657y2GASnJgNltbQGVK80wy7PsSR8bq_TplvqzAreKip8VTesoM%3D)
---
| | Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees – the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers – who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left......the deep-state. And, before President Trump even takes office, Everett Kelly and the other proponents of “unionized government” are making the rounds in the media attacking President Trump, attacking Elon Musk, attacking Vivek Ramaswamy, and conspiring with the outgoing Biden administration to extend collective bargaining agreements (an attempt to tie President trump’s hands on this issue for the next two years). **[**That is why the results of this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS will be tabulated and delivered to the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c06bbef1584a4ebabdd804b30c3edc36&_e=iADG6jcZGnTG0Xg6nTNUCM6KCFwoA5twtQpWKCSOy9zP1gMTC7_i3qniIc4ks7eAq7GhYEXDImG9KcKWFFeggJ2hJmpiNv3q5OS-lZ3eYVbVfePS8Rw5trTYeUeSWJcuKXFWWRC_1TJ7w6FCaFtztHsMQ7SNnkEihSq0ChFzUXaKXF_5_u4lvfKSTS3QLjUCm6xhG893k73O2AFg3TUyvcAVM6G0sA_xtlnH9KD-2ML07-Q6MAxGFmjXdPZYZVUpZZgKP2uQMsOpLG0-hq6yBrJbXDSuMWKWraqIBPd0EMQ_O42TnElFDHz-vGB3EXCLDmlXtui95qONsHMBPXZJUlGDjNp4DGeUBMN-nHmKgWjHR4qPeabUKWGzfVCAC77YUFUgASE9TzA44eyBDGmnWT8Cf2OyFx0Q4XToiEbKXog%3D)** Your participation is of the utmost importance.
---
* _Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%._
* _Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies?_
* _Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year?_
* _Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average?_
* _What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee?_

---
These are the questions on part one of the **[**NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c06bbef1584a4ebabdd804b30c3edc36&_e=iADG6jcZGnTG0Xg6nTNUCM6KCFwoA5twtQpWKCSOy9zP1gMTC7_i3qniIc4ks7eAq7GhYEXDImG9KcKWFFeggJ2hJmpiNv3q5OS-lZ3eYVbVfePS8Rw5trTYeUeSWJcuKXFWWRC_1TJ7w6FCaFtztHsMQ7SNnkEihSq0ChFzUXaKXF_5_u4lvfKSTS3QLjUCm6xhG893k73O2AFg3TUyvcAVM6G0sA_xtlnH9KD-2ML07-Q6MAxGFmjXdPZYZVUpZZgKP2uQMsOpLG0-hq6yBsYFWu-PWXPoUlmPFbnlVzFOu4qzP27OdqZVDmHq7deKxx75wca7B4h1SIqQDSGSPH_dMVm5UcLy9oi28-l1c01M_OAWBK6CT2fu5z5G6oZOpmpgnpDh3zJpxfbOJCllC3aJK_e96yqZ4JriArdKEew%3D)** And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servant”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration.
---
* _Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government?_
* _Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch?_
* _Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service?_
* _Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats?_

---
You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... _Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. _And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky’s “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. Today, I’m asking you to join the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. **[**Your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS is the key to reaffirming this mandate by demonstrating the consensus that exists to remove the obstructionist deep-state.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c06bbef1584a4ebabdd804b30c3edc36&_e=iADG6jcZGnTG0Xg6nTNUCM6KCFwoA5twtQpWKCSOy9zP1gMTC7_i3qniIc4ks7eAq7GhYEXDImG9KcKWFFeggJ2hJmpiNv3q5OS-lZ3eYVbVfePS8Rw5trTYeUeSWJcuKXFWWRC_1TJ7w6FCaFtztHsMQ7SNnkEihSq0ChFzUXaKXF_5_u4lvfKSTS3QLjUCm6xhG893k73O2AFg3TUyvcAVM6G0sA_xtlnH9KD-2ML07-Q6MAxGFmjXdPZYZVUpZZgKP2uQMsOpLG0-hq6yBr3utC1PA2YZVcQvb0-_Pj7Oi4lImNcWqqtOKL5UzAWBInlXtqMMnQAjxOGrnV53CBisq_oHWM01l4WYAQ6H_-temBh2NnbJjJdyuUeAVAyH_tz-CCp8yLMTqn_xzhkgGbbVoki5O0D-cprIEBIIftA%3D)** Please complete it as soon as possible. There’s no time to lose.The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it _never_ will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk, Vivek Ramaswamy, and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. **[That’s why I’m asking you to complete your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS without delay.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=c06bbef1584a4ebabdd804b30c3edc36&_e=iADG6jcZGnTG0Xg6nTNUCM6KCFwoA5twtQpWKCSOy9zP1gMTC7_i3qniIc4ks7eAq7GhYEXDImG9KcKWFFeggJ2hJmpiNv3q5OS-lZ3eYVbVfePS8Rw5trTYeUeSWJcuKXFWWRC_1TJ7w6FCaFtztHsMQ7SNnkEihSq0ChFzUXaKXF_5_u4lvfKSTS3QLjUCm6xhG893k73O2AFg3TUyvcAVM6G0sA_xtlnH9KD-2ML07-Q6MAxGFmjXdPZYZVUpZZgKP2uQMsOpLG0-hq6yBo09E2QSWaYe_Qtw_yb5A63zk36TjZVj-FtoLJw76AOXMS7O52o4heWrOS7Hi5Sy-O8suwUttnBUv1r_GPgM8g3n-XXNLkc04n5LU4YYt3m1QSQmYGwzUNq-DILDz9G-NJEJXIbvPdT2fCPMn1QUqV0%3D)** And that’s why **I’m also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35** when you do. Team, Too many things Donald Trump has done since being sworn in have been incredibly dangerous, and a direct threat to our American institutions and freedoms. So far, he has:
* Illegally frozen federal funds
* Threatened tariffs that will only raise costs for everyday families
* Empowered Elon Musk — an unelected billionaire sycophant — to unjustly go after our federal agencies paid for with our tax dollars

Nellie is deeply disturbed by all of this and is hard at work with her colleagues to stop the President from undermining the law, finding opportunities to reduce costs for families, and speaking out against any and all corruption she sees from Musk and all of the administration cronies. **[MAGA doesn't like Nellie’s fearlessness, team. clean_body: We must fight back | | Team, Too many things Donald Trump has done since being sworn in have been incredibly dangerous, and a direct threat to our American institutions and freedoms. So far, he has: Illegally frozen federal funds Threatened tariffs that will only raise costs for everyday families Empowered Elon Musk — an unelected billionaire sycophant — to unjustly go after our federal agencies paid for with our tax dollars Nellie is deeply disturbed by all of this and is hard at work with her colleagues to stop the President from undermining the law, finding opportunities to reduce costs for families, and speaking out against any and all corruption she sees from Musk and all of the administration cronies. =** | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Our campaign operation is already scaling and to have the best shot we need to hit every fundraising goal. Thanks for being an important part of this fight. — Nellie Pou HQ | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . | | We’ve all received scam emails asking for our Social Security numbers—usually from a Nigerian prince, not a self-proclaimed _tech genius_ with a direct line to the Orange Overlord himself. But here we are. Elon Musk, MAGA’s favorite unelected co-president, is extremely close to accessing sensitive Treasury payment data—including _your_ Social Security number and personal banking info. Apparently, running Twitter/X into the ground wasn’t enough; now he’s gunning for your private data like a blue verification check mark. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101613885/526512824/222217937?contactdata=DyqqNYesmoPPFisjNPVI2jMLzxA1UaWmhnXrrbXNgEI0305N1sewmkB/qkUSvMiqQpBXWIoCY8HCAxwC3SyFWbRDl2XvJfpWh1yJ6THnGI2Q0VMLhgPA1ux4BgIqdDZZe8bsSqp28W+hV/MqhpSN6kGxyL2T/i+qDhVeKG+5fzA=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjQ2MDI2OS1mZmUzLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8GsMJkylwYycti9Ma2QzMRSVCRjh4KZN812HtF3o6zk=&emci=832a10c8-fbe3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=0b460269-ffe3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=1486204)`[Tell Republicans: Keep Elon’s Greedy Hands Off Our Private Data!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101613886/526512825/222217937?&contactdata=DyqqNYesmoPPFisjNPVI2jMLzxA1UaWmhnXrrbXNgEI0305N1sewmkB/qkUSvMiqQpBXWIoCY8HCAxwC3SyFWbRDl2XvJfpWh1yJ6THnGI2Q0VMLhgPA1ux4BgIqdDZZe8bsSqp28W+hV/MqhpSN6kGxyL2T/i+qDhVeKG+5fzA=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85MzczOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjQ2MDI2OS1mZmUzLWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8GsMJkylwYycti9Ma2QzMRSVCRjh4KZN812HtF3o6zk=)` This isn’t just invasive. It’s a privacy breach the size of Musk’s ego—and that’s saying something. Trump and his MAGA minions’ disdain for our Constitution and thirst for absolute control over Americans’ lives continues running unchecked. Unless we put the brakes on this scheme _now_ , it’s only going to get worse. Sign our petition and call MAGA loyalist Republican Speaker Mike Johnson (202.225.4000) and tell him to stop Musk’s Treasury heist – before your private information becomes his next “innovation.”

name: Blake Gendebien
subject: I'm honored
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
NY-21 is one of the most competitive races in the country right now. The GOP’s majority is incredibly small, and this special election will be one of our first chances to fight back.
Hi Peter, it’s Blake Gendebien.
**I’m honored to be the presumptive Democratic nominee in the upcoming special election in NY-21.**
**[When Elise Stefanik resigns, a special election will be called, and we’ll have less than 90 days to campaign. Will you split a donation between me and Heartland Patriots to become a Founding Donor of my campaign and help us prepare?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85711?refcode=em20250205-8750&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8750%2E614464%2EwhppwS)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85711?refcode=em20250205-8750&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8750%2E614464%2EwhppwS)**
NY-21 is one of the most competitive races in the country right now. The GOP’s majority is incredibly small, and this special election will be one of our first chances to fight back.
**All eyes are on us to see if we have what it takes to win this race.**
As a dairy farmer, I’m used to rolling up my sleeves and working hard to get the job done. But flipping this seat won’t be easy, so I’m counting on your support to hit the ground running and connect with voters across the North Country.
**[Peter, will you split a donation between me and Heartland Patriots today to become a Founding Donor and help us prepare for the special election?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85711?refcode=em20250205-8750&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8750%2E614464%2EwhppwS)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85712?refcode=em20250205-8750&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=8750%2E614464%2EwhppwS) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85712?refcode=em20250205-8750&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=8750%2E614464%2EwhppwS) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85712?refcode=em20250205-8750&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=8750%2E614464%2EwhppwS) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85712?refcode=em20250205-8750&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=8750%2E614464%2EwhppwS) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85712?refcode=em20250205-8750&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=8750%2E614464%2EwhppwS) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85712?refcode=em20250205-8750&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=8750%2E614464%2EwhppwS) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85711?refcode=em20250205-8750&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=8750%2E614464%2EwhppwS)

Blake

name: Dems for Trump?
subject: John Fetterman betrayed us
body:
| |
---
Fetterman cozied up to Trump and voted to confirm Trump’s nominee for Attorney General. | [View in browser](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend2.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTQ1NTMwMDIyMDE5NDY3MjA5LFwiclwiOjE0NTUzMDA5NDgyOTQzODIwNX0iLCJzIjoiYTJiODc0NmEzODQ2YzZjOCJ9)

---
|
---
Friend,

In 2022, I was proud to lead an organization that endorsed John Fetterman for Senate. He presented himself as a pro-working class progressive who would bring a new type of leadership to Washington. But I couldn’t have been more wrong.

The organization I lead, _Path to Progress_ , coordinated an endorsement with his campaign and proudly issued a public endorsement. **Today, we’re rescinding it.**

Yesterday, Fetterman reached a new low by voting to confirm Donald Trump’s far-right nominee for Attorney General—who denies the results of the 2020 election—and by expressing support for Trump’s harebrained plan for the United States to _invade and occupy_ the Gaza Strip.
|
---
| [ ](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend2.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTQ1NTMwMDIyMDI5OTUyOTcxLFwiclwiOjE0NTUzMDA5NDgyOTQzODIwNX0iLCJzIjoiOTQyMTAzZDdjMjdkZDZjYSJ9)
---
|
---
We need to elect real progressives and show these “Democrats” that capitulating to Trump is as unpopular as it is wrong.__
|
---
_**[Path to Progress is the key to building a robust opposition to MAGA within Generation Z. To support our movement as we embark on the next four years of Trump, can we count on you to make a donation of $5 or whatever you can spare?](https://jjajxo.clicks.mlsend2.com/tj/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyODY4MDcsXCJsXCI6MTQ1NTMwMDIyMDMzMDk4NzAwLFwiclwiOjE0NTUzMDA5NDgyOTQzODIwNX0iLCJzIjoiMTk1ZDk5MmJiYzIyZDgxNyJ9)**_

clean_body: | | Fetterman cozied up to Trump and voted to confirm Trump’s nominee for Attorney General. | | | | | Friend, In 2022, I was proud to lead an organization that endorsed John Fetterman for Senate. He presented himself as a pro-working class progressive who would bring a new type of leadership to Washington. But I couldn’t have been more wrong. The organization I lead, Path to Progress , coordinated an endorsement with his campaign and proudly issued a public endorsement. Today, we’re rescinding it. Yesterday, Fetterman reached a new low by voting to confirm Donald Trump’s far-right nominee for Attorney General—who denies the results of the 2020 election—and by expressing support for Trump’s harebrained plan for the United States to invade and occupy the Gaza Strip. | | | We need to elect real progressives and show these “Democrats” that capitulating to Trump is as unpopular as it is wrong. | | | | | | | | | Thank you for your support, Sam Weinberg Executive Director Path to Progress | | | | Path to Progress Action Checks can be sent to : Path to Progress Action PO Box 34004Washington, D.C. name: The Democrats
subject: An unelected billionaire
body:
---
Derek, Americans did not elect Elon Musk in November. But every day, he tries to take charge of more and more of our government — and the rest of us will pay the price. First, Elon Musk was given access to the Treasury Department’s federal payments system, which millions of Americans rely on for Social Security checks, Medicare benefits, federal salaries, grants, and tax refunds. This puts sensitive information about millions of people at risk. Now, Musk is trying to shut down USAID, the government’s lead agency for distributing humanitarian aid and development assistance in countries all over the world. USAID helps fight disease, provide food to those who need it, and promote democracy worldwide. The consequences of shutting the agency down could be disastrous — making all of us less safe. What’s happening right now is unconstitutional and extraordinarily dangerous. **But Republicans have already proven that they won’t check Trump or Musk’s power, so we need to elect as many Democrats as possible who will.** [**That work requires all of us stepping up to help. If you can, make a $3 contribution now to support the DNC’s work to elect Democrats up and down the ballot who will fight back:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250205_2707_fr&refcode2=2721_22930333_kqM0Ks&akid=2721%2E22930333%2EkqM0Ks) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250205_2707_fr&refcode2=2721_22930333_kqM0Ks&akid=2721%2E22930333%2EkqM0Ks)**

Thank you,
The Democrats

clean_body: Derek, Americans did not elect Elon Musk in November. But every day, he tries to take charge of more and more of our government — and the rest of us will pay the price. First, Elon Musk was given access to the Treasury Department’s federal payments system, which millions of Americans rely on for Social Security checks, Medicare benefits, federal salaries, grants, and tax refunds. This puts sensitive information about millions of people at risk. Now, Musk is trying to shut down USAID, the government’s lead agency for distributing humanitarian aid and development assistance in countries all over the world. USAID helps fight disease, provide food to those who need it, and promote democracy worldwide. The consequences of shutting the agency down could be disastrous — making all of us less safe. What’s happening right now is unconstitutional and extraordinarily dangerous. But Republicans have already proven that they won’t check Trump or Musk’s power, so we need to elect as many Democrats as possible who will. name: Rob Bonta
subject: Focused on fighting for Californians
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250205&t=1&akid=1625%2E1088799%2EMBUlMO)
You're receiving this message because you have supported Democrats in the past. **Rob Bonta is fighting for justice and progress for all as California's Attorney General.** If you want to stop receiving emails from us, [click here](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1625%2E1088799%2EMBUlMO).
---
I have an announcement to share today, and I wanted you to hear it from me first. This is a long but important email, so I hope you’ll read it to the end.
I was elected to fight for Californians. Every day, that’s what I do — I fight to make a real difference in people’s lives. Californians elected me to fight to protect their safety, their rights, and their futures.
Over the past four years as Attorney General, that’s meant fighting relentlessly to protect Californians from everything from fentanyl to gun violence. To protect their right to reproductive healthcare, and their freedom to marry.
On top of that, over the last four weeks, the work has included fighting for fire victims — relentlessly going after looters, price gougers, and scam “charities” trying to profit off of people’s pain.
And on top of that, in the last few weeks, the fight for Californians has meant fighting Donald Trump’s efforts to shut down everything from Medicaid to Meals on Wheels to birthright citizenship.
So while I was elected to fight for Californians, not to fight Trump, the last few weeks have made clear that fighting for Californians also often means standing up to the Trump administration’s strategy of trying to flood the zone and overwhelm us with a flurry of illegal attempts to harm our people.
I’ve never taken the responsibility of serving as Attorney General lightly — I’m California's people's attorney and the state’s top cop. It’s always been a big job with a huge impact on the daily life of every Californian, but now it’s more important than ever.
**To be clear, serving as Attorney General of California is, without question, one of the most impactful jobs in the country right now.** I sincerely appreciate the trust of the millions of Californians who elected me to do this important work, and that’s why I’m completely dedicated to doing the job and doing the job well.
Every day we are working intensely to help Californians, and this is no time to take my eye off the ball — the stakes are too high. Now more than ever, Californians deserve and need elected officials who are solely focused on getting the job done, with no distractions or political considerations.
That’s why, while I appreciate all the people and organizations who have urged me to run for Governor, **I am staying in the fight and plan on serving as Attorney General for the next 6 years.** This work is simply too important and there are too many important fights ahead.
**[With all of that said, will you stand with me as I continue to fight for the rights and well-being of every Californian by pitching in $5 to our people-powered campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250205?refcode=em20250205-1625&amount=5&refcode2=1625_1088799_MBUlMO&akid=1625%2E1088799%2EMBUlMO)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250205?refcode=em20250205-1625&amount=5&refcode2=1625_1088799_MBUlMO&akid=1625%2E1088799%2EMBUlMO)**
Thank you for all you do to show your support — it is so deeply appreciated. Let’s keep up the good fight, together.
In solidarity,
Rob
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250205&t=3&refcode2=1625_1088799_MBUlMO&akid=1625%2E1088799%2EMBUlMO)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1625%2E1088799%2EMBUlMO)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1625%2E1088799%2EMBUlMO)

To give by check:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
Email us: [info@robbonta.com](mailto:info@robbonta.com)
PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101616130/526519329/640858531?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_DOGE_250205_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWMxZWE5Zi0wNGU0LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OPswjVNezCH0j6Tn1KegVWgueBalKvBXdqcfVLZcniY=) Trump and DOGE have furloughed THOUSANDS of senior career civil servants and demanded blanket stop-work orders, disrupting life-saving work and putting our country at risk.

**Let me be clear: USAID is a pillar of U.S. national security. It supports the global economy, fights terrorism, and saves lives. If Trump and his unelected copresident succeed in shutting it, it will deeply weaken America’s position in the world.**

This is unconscionable and unlawful. Trump and DOGE have no legal authority to shut down USAID.

name: Sean Feucht
subject: Prayer Of Your People (Live From Camp Elah) OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=8d49901a3d824b6c92843ed07ebea05c&_e=KaprAFfh3teexirKcrCMx3Y6kKM3rGmCoCme6ktahqquLxXDENcHULO4KTDTOQpl4Gor_5nu2OjT66D26AEavjumKi9n0V-jW7TPtHHb7Q_m7MhGHNuvPoQNXbCXU2EYiHyADBBuBQ-uBlTEkAO584IcOgGKJsn4KH5-Yx5OkwndndCFr8ejrxKIvsbyfkjraGJIprHeAL9tp6kJs53XFsYSCvZ3NKNQ6ulekpPxYDFe7X_BbIPPIWlU0hAw-gut10TopdRVquZlcPzFpTXuI-JD-sxErWJCWWGSTA2MMs-9pTKE14wuUmoQcdk2d4cN2I8ehBXqwA27Z-NiYiW3cw%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
I’m excited to announce the release of the second video and the title track from our new album, _Prayer of Your People_! _Prayer of Your People,_ recorded live at Camp Elah, captures the raw, powerful worship that happens in such intimate gatherings. This song reflects our collective desire for praise and worship to rise from Camp Elah, and we’re thrilled to share it with you. Watch the video now and experience the spirit of _Prayer of Your People_ in its truest form!
---

---
| | Till all hear,
---
---

With absolutely no proof, Musk told his 214M followers the dangerous lie
that Wisconsin elections are fraudulent if progressives win. Never mind

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: The far-right is emboldened and out of control
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Just look at what a fellow member of Congress said to me
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1492%2E791427%2Ex8Y2ik)

**Friend, the far-right has been emboldened and out of control in the weeks since Trump took office.**
And I’m not just talking about a few people on the fringe. The entire Republican party has dove head first into Trump and Elon Musk’s ultra-conservative, anti-immigrant, authoritarian rule.
Just look at what a fellow member of Congress said to me:
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-feb25.YmER0g&refcode=em250205-1-90&t=2&akid=1492%2E791427%2Ex8Y2ik)
**_Reprehensible, racist, and un-American.**_ Threatening to deport legal US citizens because you disagree with them is fascism. Full stop. But I expect nothing less from the GOP under Trump and Musk.
And look at what they are doing to our federal government. Musk is slashing crucial agencies and programs without a care in the world or the legal authority to do so. They’re working to hinder the core functions of our government so they can line the pockets of their billionaire friends. It’s like the Koch Brothers’ wildest dreams finally coming true.
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/3094?t=3&akid=1492%2E791427%2Ex8Y2ik)
Or just look at what Elon Musk has done to Twitter. A platform that was once the best place to follow breaking news is now completely taken over by white nationalists and right-wing extremists.
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/3095?t=4&akid=1492%2E791427%2Ex8Y2ik)
Read Musk’s tweets for only a few minutes, and you will find him engaging with open neo-nazis and white nationalists, or spreading racist conspiracy theories about immigrants or his native country of South Africa.
This is the man the GOP has elevated to be their unelected, all-powerful co-president with Donald Trump. And we better believe he is bringing the same racist and unintelligent ideas he espouses on Twitter to his takeover of our government.
**Friend — Our best response to the far-right in this moment is to organize all of our people, all our resources, all of the tools we have at our disposal, to be a thorn in the side of Trump’s administration.**
**[If that sounds like a plan to you, please, make a contribution to our movement today and help us continue to fight back. We are organizing to block Trump’s agenda in every way we can, but we need your help to get it done.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-feb25.YmER0g&refcode=em250205-1-90&t=5&akid=1492%2E791427%2Ex8Y2ik)

clean_body: Just look at what a fellow member of Congress said to me Friend, the far-right has been emboldened and out of control in the weeks since Trump took office. And I’m not just talking about a few people on the fringe. The entire Republican party has dove head first into Trump and Elon Musk’s ultra-conservative, anti-immigrant, authoritarian rule. Just look at what a fellow member of Congress said to me: Reprehensible, racist, and un-American. Threatening to deport legal US citizens because you disagree with them is fascism. Full stop. But I expect nothing less from the GOP under Trump and Musk. And look at what they are doing to our federal government. Musk is slashing crucial agencies and programs without a care in the world or the legal authority to do so. They’re working to hinder the core functions of our government so they can line the pockets of their billionaire friends. It’s like the Koch Brothers’ wildest dreams finally coming true. Or just look at what Elon Musk has done to Twitter. A platform that was once the best place to follow breaking news is now completely taken over by white nationalists and right-wing extremists. Read Musk’s tweets for only a few minutes, and you will find him engaging with open neo-nazis and white nationalists, or spreading racist conspiracy theories about immigrants or his native country of South Africa. This is the man the GOP has elevated to be their unelected, all-powerful co-president with Donald Trump. And we better believe he is bringing the same racist and unintelligent ideas he espouses on Twitter to his takeover of our government. Friend — Our best response to the far-right in this moment is to organize all of our people, all our resources, all of the tools we have at our disposal, to be a thorn in the side of Trump’s administration. name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Senator Alsobrooks Newsletter -- February 5
body:
|
---
Dear friends and neighbors: Once again, this week, we are seeing the President enact his retribution and target the American people. Let's get into it.
**Federal Workforce** This week, the President launched his latest attack on the federal workforce. The target was USAID. USAID funds critical programs worldwide that provide targeted aid to prevent the spread of war and the spread of communicable diseases, in vulnerable countries. It is a program that ultimately helps keep us safe and works to keep our troops out of unnecessary, expensive wars. The so-called Department of Government Efficiency, led by the unelected billionaire Elon Musk, is supposed to be saving us dollars, not costing us. This move will cost the American taxpayers millions, and it has caused fear and uncertainty for the many Americans who are serving overseas in other countries. This federal purge is disgusting and continues to grow more dangerous each day. We know the Trump Administration is looking to fire FBI agents, a move that could affect thousands and threaten our national security. I am a former prosecutor and spent 13 years in the courtroom working alongside the best and brightest, including the FBI. These are in many cases apolitical civil servants who are serving our country. They are trained professionals, who have worked through many administrations and are being targeted systematically.
**" Fork in the Road"** At this particular moment, I know many of you may have a difficult decision to make regarding the "Fork in the Road" email the Trump Administration sent. I urge you to exercise caution and discuss it with your family thoroughly before deciding to resign on or by the Thursday deadline. There are existing questions like what happens to your benefits; is there a guarantee you will get paid past mid-March since government funding is only authorized until then; and more. I will continue to apply pressure to the Administration, the type of pressure that forced the President to act as if he achieved victories that allowed him to cancel immediate plans for tariffs against Mexico and Canada - tariffs that would break the backs of Marylanders who are already struggling against inflation. He heard the pleas, the warnings, and the outrage.
**OMB Director** Project 2025 architect Russell Vought has no place being Director of the Office of Management and Budget. Vought has made it clear he will slash federal funding and continue the witch hunt targeting our federal workers. "We want to put them in trauma" is what Russell Vought has said about our civil servants. It's a disgraceful statement that demonstrates his utter contempt for the doctors who are researching cancer at NIH, for the inspectors keeping our food safe at FDA, and for the officers issuing benefits at the VA. Anyone who wants to cause "trauma" to the American worker has absolutely no place in the federal government, let alone OMB.
**Resources** I want to make sure Marylanders have some information and resources and I have included some links that will assist federal employees with frequently asked questions, and a link to see litigation that's been filed against this Administration. [Civil Service Strong](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14276.5079485.5017356.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.civilservicestrong.org%2f&redir_log=853542924978250): A coalition of multiple organizations, including unions, nonprofit accountability organizations and legal organizations. Contains resources and advice for federal employees, such as what rights civil servants currently have, how to consider the "fork in the road" email, guides to navigating whistleblower protections, and various fact sheets. [Civil Service Strong "Fork in the Road" FAQ](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14276.5079485.5017356.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.civilservicestrong.org%2fresource%2fopm-fork-in-the-road&redir_log=579071861293450) [Partnership for Public Service Federal Employee Resource Hub:](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14276.5079485.5017356.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fourpublicservice.org%2fsupporting-federal-employees-through-change%2f&redir_log=633557644337517) A non-partisan organization that works to build a government that meets fundamental responsibilities to the public, no matter the political makeup of Congress or a presidential administration. This site provides background and context, explains current laws, executive actions and proposals, and highlights additional resources. [Litigation Tracker](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14276.5079485.5017356.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.justsecurity.org%2f107087%2ftracker-legal-challenges-trump-administration-actions%2f&redir_log=645074388843631) All legal actions brought against Trump Administration (Reiss Center on Law and Security at New York University School of Law) **Action** I know you are expecting your leaders in Congress to take action, and I am. I will continue holding this Administration accountable. Here are a few of the things I've done:
• Demanded answers from the Administration - Acting Secretary of Health and Human Services Dorothy A. Fink, M.D. and Acting Director of the Office of Head Start Captain Tala Hooban - on the current status of Head Start, a critical program that provides America's most vulnerable young children what they need to succeed in school. • Issued a dire warning to the Administration - Mr. Ezell, Acting Director of OPM - that reducing staffing through "buyout" programs could force seniors to wait longer to receive assistance and benefits. I continue to express concerns about how a "buyout" will impact the Social Security Administration (SSA) and the 72.5 million people it serves. • Expressed grave concerns to Acting Secretary of Health and Human Services Dorothy A. Fink, M.D about recent actions to disrupt the lifesaving research being conducted and supported by the National Institute of Health (NIH) in Bethesda, Maryland. • Co-sponsored Senator Kaine's S.134 "A bill to place limitations on accepting positions from the competitive service, and for other purposes." ... I know there's a lot of uncertainty right now. I vow that as your Senator, I will be fighting on your behalf, working to minimize negative impacts on Marylanders. We will continue to stand up to this Administration. I have repeatedly said that I am willing to work with Republicans on issues like lowering costs of goods, bringing down the price of prescription drugs, and creating more affordable housing. If and when this Administration decides to prioritize those things, I'll be here ready. Until then, I will continue to push back and use the tools at our disposal to hold this Administration accountable.
[Click here to Unsubscribe.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/EForm.aspx?__cid=SenAlsobrooks&__fid=100022&__crop=14276.5079485.5017356.7190525)

name: Giffords.org
subject: Donald Trump + Elon Musk + Kash Patel = DISASTER
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Donald Trump has teamed up with tech billionaire Elon Musk and Kash Patel, his pick for FBI Director, to weaponize the FBI.
#

Friends -
As many of you know, tech billionaire Elon Musk has made a name for himself as one of President Trump’s most loyal supporters. Musk is **_not**_ an elected official but he has been given free range over key agencies and programs and now has access to millions of Americans’ personal information through Treasury Department records. He’s also leading the charge alongside Donald Trump and Kash Patel to weaponize the FBI against people who don’t agree with the MAGA agenda.
Last week, the Trump Administration purged dozens of FBI and Department of Justice officials who were involved in investigating the events of January 6th. They’re expected to fire thousands more.
Patel, Trump’s pick for FBI Director who has not even been confirmed yet, gave official answers to U.S. Senators stating that he has been talking to Elon Musk about FBI staffing. Not a good sign, team.
We cannot allow the FBI—our nation’s top law enforcement agency—to be weakened and politicized by Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and Kash Patel. We’ve been hard at work to defeat Patel’s nomination, not only because he’s wholly unqualified for the position, but also because he’s proven that he will bow down to Trump’s every command at the expense of our public safety.
[**If you’re with us in the important work to defeat the Trump oligarchy, will you please add your name to our petition rejecting the Trump Administration’s efforts to harm the FBI?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_fbi_pet/?source=em250205-1-b&refcode2=9949.3935704.3Gdv2b&akid=9949%2E3935704%2E3Gdv2b)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_fbi_pet/?source=em250205-1-b&refcode2=9949.3935704.3Gdv2b&akid=9949%2E3935704%2E3Gdv2b)**
Thank you. Our gun safety movement depends on a well-staffed and well-funded FBI.
\- Team GIFFORDS PAC

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=9949%2E3935704%2E3Gdv2b) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: This is deeply personal to me

The significance of this is not lost on me – 157 years later, I’m running to become the first woman and person of color to represent Delaware in the Senate.

You received this message from Lisa Blunt Rochester because you've previously taken action and supported Democrats like Lisa. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101617069/526521599/-1694324749?source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.02.05_B1_Scarf_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_RS_T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzQ0MzlhYy0wN2U0LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3y4xPUpy8JE6N7RsBZ0C1r9hbzblXAfveWkV_2Ivu6k=) Friend – you may have seen me carry this scarf, but this isn’t just any old scarf in my hands. This scarf is imprinted with the document that granted my great-great-great grandfather the right to vote in 1867. The significance of this is not lost on me – 157 years later, I ran to become the first woman and person of color to represent Delaware in the Senate. [**I couldn't have done this without your help and asking if you can rush $25 or more to continue to fight for our democratic institutions, including the right to vote?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101617070/526521600/-1694324749?amount=25&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.02.05_B1_Scarf_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_RS_T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzQ0MzlhYy0wN2U0LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3y4xPUpy8JE6N7RsBZ0C1r9hbzblXAfveWkV_2Ivu6k=) I carry the story of my ancestors with me every day. It means so much to me that my sister Thea made it into a scarf. **The day I was sworn into the House, I carried that scarf.** It was surreal – knowing how far my family, and so many families of color, had come. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State. **I also carried that scarf on the day of the January 6th insurrection.** On such a dark day for our democracy, my scarf served as a reminder that every effort to undermine our democracy has been met with voices of power and reason. **And I carried that scarf when I was sworn into the Senate.** **[If you’re ready to join our movement, will you please chip in $25 to continue to make history? Every donation goes towards creating a more diverse and inclusive Congress and I sincerely hope you’ll get on board.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101617071/526521601/-1694324749?amount=25&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.02.05_B1_Scarf_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_RS_T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzQ0MzlhYy0wN2U0LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3y4xPUpy8JE6N7RsBZ0C1r9hbzblXAfveWkV_2Ivu6k=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**CHIP IN $25 »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101617073/526521603/-1694324749?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode2=EL25&source=LOC_EM_FR_2025.02.05_B1_Scarf_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OP_RS_T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzQ0MzlhYy0wN2U0LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3y4xPUpy8JE6N7RsBZ0C1r9hbzblXAfveWkV_2Ivu6k=)

If you would like to get less email, To unsubscribe, | | = Friend – you may have seen me carry this scarf, but this isn’t just any old scarf in my hands. This scarf is imprinted with the document that granted my great-great-great grandfather the right to vote in 1867. The significance of this is not lost on me – 157 years later, I ran to become the first woman and person of color to represent Delaware in the Senate. = I carry the story of my ancestors with me every day. It means so much to me that my sister Thea made it into a scarf. The day I was sworn into the House, I carried that scarf. It was surreal – knowing how far my family, and so many families of color, had come. All the way from being enslaved, to finally getting the right to vote, to being elected to represent the First State. I also carried that scarf on the day of the January 6th insurrection. On such a dark day for our democracy, my scarf served as a reminder that every effort to undermine our democracy has been met with voices of power and reason. subject: Minnesota, this is embarrassing.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
Kash Patel handed Senator Amy Klobuchar a heavy dose of competence. | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ece2d724974341cd83bcb199337ef10d&_e=WPHBepJJ2s3ud8Sx7wGw3xwM9YXCDbms05m7jVcc0EhCz1S_-phyn-7JXtBZ1EcqdB3nuearWhy7YAPasGLqCeeNYuk151w1Vmk1XrSic5Lk72gXiBi2H5JMGtNM7ZA8xO3kZYyWGYIzPIcw-v8_ElChEz6-85cgXEOjrACKJuQAm5JRj_uon992vMVObkHELby3PoBDAqwx2j8kXl2_LtZwAgbb8MgJxqtbXdWubKHbyZ1uA9z8B_ahe8yRZzWgSBLXW0fL5emM2lYQP43RH1ITtxHmNUSxjfqMvauPRKOhh7oFqgEDtqZcQG6iAhe7OBBJO0ezvdgMYnPfh1UzGQ%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

In his confirmation hearing, Kash Patel handed Senator Amy Klobuchar a heavy dose of competence.

She was only able to attack him with blatant lies and mischaracterizations. Kash Patel has done NOTHING but uphold the Constitution and defend our nation.

Her attacks are completely unfair and unwarranted.

_**America... Minnesota... Can you see it now? Are we ready for a change?**_

**This is embarrassing!**

I may have lost to Amy Klobuchar in 2024, but if we start right now and work together, we can defeat Tina Smith in 2026.

In 2024, no one believed that I had a chance, but we proved them wrong. 1.3 million Minnesotans supported me then. Just think of what we can do in two more years. My People-First Movement is growing stronger every single day.

These women have led Minnesota and America down a radical, woke path for far too long. Their time is running out. It is time for a change.

[**Can I count on you Peter, to chip in $25 before midnight and help grow my People First Movement?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ece2d724974341cd83bcb199337ef10d&_e=WPHBepJJ2s3ud8Sx7wGw3xwM9YXCDbms05m7jVcc0EhCz1S_-phyn-7JXtBZ1EcqdB3nuearWhy7YAPasGLqCeeNYuk151w1Vmk1XrSic5Lk72gXiBi2H5JMGtNM7ZA8xO3kZYyWGYIzPIcw-v8_ElChEz6-85cgXEOjrACKJuQAm5JRj_uon992vMVObkHEEDJYdBMaB8oonwKVX6Rr7aS6kW6iaseYGe6Yv_XgUsGSWnbkeZPJiNyjaRVOx_u8-XlUQ_Vtmsefq7tj-R10d0uG_rChQoauGfsb_I9uXL1nSKDmQUngSocy4Wjl509XfLjp5lCCyBT09Nj4zyyo5w%3D%3D)

| [ **RUSH $25 BEFORE MIDNIGHT >>** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ece2d724974341cd83bcb199337ef10d&_e=WPHBepJJ2s3ud8Sx7wGw3xwM9YXCDbms05m7jVcc0EhCz1S_-phyn-7JXtBZ1EcqdB3nuearWhy7YAPasGLqCeeNYuk151w1Vmk1XrSic5Lk72gXiBi2H5JMGtNM7ZA8xO3kZYyWGYIzPIcw-v8_ElChEz6-85cgXEOjrACKJuQAm5JRj_uon992vMVObkHEbyuO6a-Ssyn_GxrHFel6HRB6hYUogUeFBBRmnHbvll7n1m18JxuuauGbChWG_mnNEc0x-A6LkfYUmqfn_g4woWnjbIr5uPiQ8YPad22UdJeCNgVpmdyf2QwpZBkq9NDYQm6HXGHFY4M3SpXb_uSPQQ%3D%3D)

Thank you,
Royce White

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ece2d724974341cd83bcb199337ef10d&_e=WPHBepJJ2s3ud8Sx7wGw3xwM9YXCDbms05m7jVcc0EhCz1S_-phyn-7JXtBZ1EcqdB3nuearWhy7YAPasGLqCeeNYuk151w1Vmk1XrSic5Lk72gXiBi2H5JMGtNM7ZA8xO3kZYyWGYIzPIcw-v8_ElChEz6-85cgXEOjrACKJuQAm5JRj_uon992vMVObkHEJLbQx3Tg-Hwwm1sfXvS7RtFLPn6zBZvOWzVmAaJvBCBdxWf1ZUAFoc17Iu9ekD2lxJkUvchc2RO9gUwEq6QuQn4-mOLeiwJzMG0oEDFt8OjJFQHt9pvT3uTPTr4bOK-Oximtc5FcdfswIwZx8aPsBQ%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=ece2d724974341cd83bcb199337ef10d&_e=WPHBepJJ2s3ud8Sx7wGw3xwM9YXCDbms05m7jVcc0EhCz1S_-phyn-7JXtBZ1EcqdB3nuearWhy7YAPasGLqCeeNYuk151w1Vmk1XrSic5Lk72gXiBi2H5JMGtNM7ZA8xO3kZYyWGYIzPIcw-v8_ElChEz6-85cgXEOjrACKJuQAm5JRj_uon992vMVObkHEltk_lJaf-uXN3CGFCLNMGjzFPodVqFI7ut3dVUpnW82UqYlvXuJ_QJ8ee6P2kjxa3RHupK1uN4iqk6m--bT3Zdm-ZWNKfWhmvBD1Xf_8ouSuML3Tef9HDP7Z1NYIQDLDIbY4KXIS0dQ6KWojfVZTKA%3D%3D)

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: Do NOT miss this --> 2 SPECIAL ELECTIONS in FL that Dems can WIN!!!!!
body:
We're helping to build a warchest of funds for the two Democrats who run for these open Florida seats - we need your urgent help!
Chip in NOW so we can flip these red seats blue >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111624_2]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111624_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111624_2&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111624_2&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111624_2&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111624_2&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111624_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111624_2&amount=25]
Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard.
They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress.
We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111624_2]
Thanks for taking action,
Team RTP

Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress. We CANNOT let them get away with it! An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Saving the Easter Bunny
body:
Here’s exactly what their strategy is...| | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate...
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Believer, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only about 12 weeks away.And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate......to Jesus.And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created _Saving the Easter Bunny_ , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "_Mouse in the House_ ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' 12-week "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ big-time. **[And today I'm hoping you'll help them kick it into high gear before orders start pouring in by rushing back your best "Prepare the Way" gift.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cc5f32844e41425e854930ddeb756e9e&_e=ydopXXuM0L-C2imQnHZ76F9q8m0vvHqZ4fYmqrYIjG4uGXj2gB4GQQIVPh1Ovtf8AJbD2EfmdWRYPlHjym0b5z2ITtwZWZAKAY-JeiVaogFDs_EejHnTtB1TlENiu_YZHnX_j_gUNdzEj5zSGoNFggH8InOAE8JD9jAK-2QEPVXeLxWZGSvVsbVTdPhx6aWnDJR1gsIZlrjKechJnTmuDw6l4KMC449qKHT1ZjsLYRnz3uWSoGgGTJ2EiSHdTSJAjL8rw6VaU3iFehcZ6S4iMOo3jL2KkAiC820yFYGcF94xdwPb89lV1cHzMB21LtrRBeh7NW7CfzI51H59u6W7ZdmCcMpF9U9olD6yyeYd_qrJG-Nrtcxy7SgDTrF4L-7n)** No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done:
---
>>> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ and a 17-city church tour.
---
Just look at what parents have already said about S _aving the Easter Bunny_ :
---
"It's not easy to explain the true meaning of Easter to adults never mind to children, but Brave Books does it beautifully."
---
— Lisa A.
---
"My kids love the amazing illustrations and so do I!"
---
– Bob A.
---
"My three granddaughters barely sit still but when I'm reading this book and Lord Joshua dies, you can hear a pin drop. That's quickly replaced by squeals of joy after the resurrection. Thank you for bringing the joy of Easter to their little hearts."
---
– Laurin
---
And listen to this...**[**Your "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100 or more, not only helps fund this revival campaign that makes Jesus the reason for the Easter season once more...**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cc5f32844e41425e854930ddeb756e9e&_e=ydopXXuM0L-C2imQnHZ76F9q8m0vvHqZ4fYmqrYIjG4uGXj2gB4GQQIVPh1Ovtf8AJbD2EfmdWRYPlHjym0b5z2ITtwZWZAKAY-JeiVaogFDs_EejHnTtB1TlENiu_YZHnX_j_gUNdzEj5zSGoNFggH8InOAE8JD9jAK-2QEPVXeLxWZGSvVsbVTdPhx6aWnDJR1gsIZlrjKechJnTmuDw6l4KMC449qKHT1ZjsLYRkw5elSqxeAfXVXwwP2k8kqCctSbDedPQ3cKWdrfO1pwTxHA1L_2F3v94S--xOJ371MdBQf2WChVaRZQ4Ghs4u1aE5Ml6ipuAYy5CzACadz8i7eYR7bYjaKNiX_nj4Z2J4npiJJ4RRGr3GeZwujHPJV)** Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you **[contribute $100 or more to the "Prepare the Way" revival](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cc5f32844e41425e854930ddeb756e9e&_e=ydopXXuM0L-C2imQnHZ76F9q8m0vvHqZ4fYmqrYIjG4uGXj2gB4GQQIVPh1Ovtf8AJbD2EfmdWRYPlHjym0b5z2ITtwZWZAKAY-JeiVaogFDs_EejHnTtB1TlENiu_YZHnX_j_gUNdzEj5zSGoNFggH8InOAE8JD9jAK-2QEPVXeLxWZGSvVsbVTdPhx6aWnDJR1gsIZlrjKechJnTmuDw6l4KMC449qKHT1ZjsLYRnfPHgXZmVCteDPBZeqaUJoznPWAcDb1XC9mB3ybMRmRXGnQ7WxII8X61I6QEcq8yG7hkNiHJIgcmf8jMO0yNMYNywGE1ifu2Ahil4MN4Wd2wrN5W4uxxazEAI_Fh5tsM2sCvIo2YToHQJhhlmMfQys)** , Brave Books will send you _Saving the Easter Bunny_ absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep _Saving the Easter Bunny_ for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. **[**What's most important is that you rush back your best "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100, or more right away.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cc5f32844e41425e854930ddeb756e9e&_e=ydopXXuM0L-C2imQnHZ76F9q8m0vvHqZ4fYmqrYIjG4uGXj2gB4GQQIVPh1Ovtf8AJbD2EfmdWRYPlHjym0b5z2ITtwZWZAKAY-JeiVaogFDs_EejHnTtB1TlENiu_YZHnX_j_gUNdzEj5zSGoNFggH8InOAE8JD9jAK-2QEPVXeLxWZGSvVsbVTdPhx6aWnDJR1gsIZlrjKechJnTmuDw6l4KMC449qKHT1ZjsLYRnuJxrJDCZFYcoLgmAigGk4eMZjkv65Xj2e70KgPdyBF4AoqVzaxU7_acJNzf7_8RpMSCDx0X_3DJUs0PHSCJaRzzoOwi6d9SU30j8MPY196smm2fNEAZD-N5vfjkTlzNTiplLAyERaN-GzMTPvXPV_)** Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America.
---
May God bless you this coming Easter season,
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father

| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=cc5f32844e41425e854930ddeb756e9e&_e=ydopXXuM0L-C2imQnHZ76F9q8m0vvHqZ4fYmqrYIjG4uGXj2gB4GQQIVPh1Ovtf8AJbD2EfmdWRYPlHjym0b5z2ITtwZWZAKAY-JeiVaogFDs_EejHnTtB1TlENiu_YZHnX_j_gUNdzEj5zSGoNFggH8InOAE8JD9jAK-2QEPVXeLxWZGSvVsbVTdPhx6aWnDJR1gsIZlrjKechJnTmuDw6l4KMC449qKHT1ZjsLYRlc_V8sLYqiJ1dHm6hbiKDsOnKhkm6yVuMHk2j1GCdbwJsG0HqzbnR7dg8iOlX1g0WjVoqlltpw1PGSLMkJBLs_e2iBwADCF2FTfSkBzC9sgzTnRPoUguKLzZ5NWngh1CePCBUZ-JGs8HUBk-ffoWvm)

clean_body: Here’s exactly what their strategy is...| | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate... | | | | Dear Fellow Believer, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only about 12 weeks away.And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate......to Jesus.And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created Saving the Easter Bunny , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "Mouse in the House ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' 12-week "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of Saving the Easter Bunny big-time. No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done: >> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of Saving the Easter Bunny and a 17-city church tour. Just look at what parents have already said about S aving the Easter Bunny : "It's not easy to explain the true meaning of Easter to adults never mind to children, but Brave Books does it beautifully." — Lisa A. "My kids love the amazing illustrations and so do I!" – Bob A. "My three granddaughters barely sit still but when I'm reading this book and Lord Joshua dies, you can hear a pin drop. That's quickly replaced by squeals of joy after the resurrection. Thank you for bringing the joy of Easter to their little hearts." – Laurin And listen to this... Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you , Brave Books will send you Saving the Easter Bunny absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep Saving the Easter Bunny for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America. subject: Democrats need to shut this all down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Meet Russell Vought — the mastermind of Project 2025 and Trump’s extremist
nominee to head the Budget Office. Vought is INCREDIBLY dangerous and
Bernie is calling him the architect of the Oligarchy. He hasn’t even been
confirmed and he’s already wreaking havoc as the force behind last week’s
illegal freeze on federal funding.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21437?t=1011&akid=7651%2E5885482%2Eopnx_z ][IMG]

His confirmation vote in the Senate is just hours away and we HAVE to stop
him.

Pressure is starting to work. Senate Democrats are finally taking action,
holding up business to slow Vought's nomination as much as possible. But
it isn’t enough, which is why we need EVERYONE to join in and overwhelm
the Senate with opposition in these final hours.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21437?source=email-02052025&t=1012&akid=7651%2E5885482%2Eopnx_z ]Will you send an urgent message to your Senators NOW to oppose Vought
and ALL of Trump’s dangerous nominees? Our action team will hand deliver
it to the Senate!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21437?source=email-02052025&t=1013&akid=7651%2E5885482%2Eopnx_z ]ADD YOUR NAME

Bernie has made it clear – we must take action to stop Trump’s architect
for the Oligarchy. Vought is on a mission to gut lifesaving government
programs like Medicare, Medicaid, and Meals on Wheels in order to slash
the budget and hand massive tax breaks to Elon Musk and other
billionaires. And we know he won’t stop there – he’s tried before to cut
Social Security and will no doubt try again.

This week, the Senate will also vote on Kash Patel for FBI Director, who
has vowed his loyalty to Trump and Trump only and who is ready to
persecute ALL of his political enemies. It’s all part of Trump’s plan to
fill our government with corrupt, dangerous loyalists, yet some Democrats
are giving legitimacy to Trump’s agenda by actually voting FOR his
nominees.

Enough. Democrats must stand firm against all of Trump’s nominees –
showing a unified and strong front is crucial in this moment.

The Senate votes on Vought and Patel are TOMORROW. Our Citizen Action Team
is working around the clock, making calls to the Senate and
hand-delivering our message to Capitol Hill to build the kind of political
pressure that can push Senators on BOTH sides of the aisle to vote ‘No’.
With a tiny majority, just a few Republicans willing to stand up is enough
to sink these nominations – and some are already wavering — so we need to
push them NOW.

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Peter Willis, Meet Russell Vought — the mastermind of Project 2025 and Trump’s extremist nominee to head the Budget Office. Vought is INCREDIBLY dangerous and Bernie is calling him the architect of the Oligarchy. He hasn’t even been confirmed and he’s already wreaking havoc as the force behind last week’s illegal freeze on federal funding. [ ][IMG] His confirmation vote in the Senate is just hours away and we HAVE to stop him. Pressure is starting to work. Senate Democrats are finally taking action, holding up business to slow Vought's nomination as much as possible. But it isn’t enough, which is why we need EVERYONE to join in and overwhelm the Senate with opposition in these final hours. [ ]Will you send an urgent message to your Senators NOW to oppose Vought and ALL of Trump’s dangerous nominees? Our action team will hand deliver it to the Senate! [ ]ADD YOUR NAME Bernie has made it clear – we must take action to stop Trump’s architect for the Oligarchy. Vought is on a mission to gut lifesaving government programs like Medicare, Medicaid, and Meals on Wheels in order to slash the budget and hand massive tax breaks to Elon Musk and other billionaires. And we know he won’t stop there – he’s tried before to cut Social Security and will no doubt try again. This week, the Senate will also vote on Kash Patel for FBI Director, who has vowed his loyalty to Trump and Trump only and who is ready to persecute ALL of his political enemies. It’s all part of Trump’s plan to fill our government with corrupt, dangerous loyalists, yet some Democrats are giving legitimacy to Trump’s agenda by actually voting FOR his nominees. Enough. Democrats must stand firm against all of Trump’s nominees – showing a unified and strong front is crucial in this moment. The Senate votes on Vought and Patel are TOMORROW. Our Citizen Action Team is working around the clock, making calls to the Senate and hand-delivering our message to Capitol Hill to build the kind of political pressure that can push Senators on BOTH sides of the aisle to vote ‘No’. With a tiny majority, just a few Republicans willing to stand up is enough to sink these nominations – and some are already wavering — so we need to push them NOW. [ ]Can you join our efforts to stop Trump, Vought and this group of dangerous nominees by sending a message to your Senators right away? When we organize, we win. [**It would END the influence of Dark Money and prevent Billionaires like Elon Musk from rigging elections for Republicans!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pet-overturn-cu-loc?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.02.05_End-CU-ST_B1_F1_S1_C1_main_N&t=4&akid=22839%2E4449941%2EZL4S-W)

Amy Klobuchar and Chuck Schumer's plan is vitally important.

Here's what it would do:

**FIRST:** It would overturn _Citizens United_ - which has ERODED our democracy for fifteen years.

**SECOND:** It would prevent Super PACs and Dark Money donors from flooding undisclosed funds into our elections.

**FINALLY:** It would stop Billionaires from EVER attempting to buy our elections again!!

This would be groundbreaking.

And it would give Democrats a HUGE opportunity to win the Midterms and take back our Majority in 2026 - fair and square!

[**_If you 're on board with Klobuchar and Schumer's Constitutional Amendment, please join 24,999 other good Democrats in signing our petition to give them the momentum they need!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pet-overturn-cu-loc?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.02.05_End-CU-ST_B1_F1_S1_C1_main_N&t=8&akid=22839%2E4449941%2EZL4S-W)
