name: Working Families Party
subject: Elon Musk has no business running our government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, Elon Musk holds no legal authority in our government — yet Trump has handed him control over the U.S. Treasury’s federal payment system. **That means Musk and his cronies now have unchecked access to our personal financial records, Social Security numbers, and trillions of public dollars.** But that’s not all. Reports just emerged that Musk’s so-called “Department of Government Efficiency” (DOGE) has infiltrated the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services. This means they also now control the systems that handle payments and contracts for our **healthcare programs** — raising _serious_ concerns about the security of Medicare and Medicaid.1 Let’s be clear, Peter: DOGE is _not_ a government agency. It has _no_ congressional approval, _no_ legal standing, and _no_ expertise. Yet, in just days, Musk and his team of unqualified twenty-somethings2 took control of the systems that handle **trillions in payments every year** — including Social Security checks, Medicare reimbursements, and tax refunds. This isn’t just reckless. It’s an invasion of our government. And it’s already punishing working families. [**Will you add your name now to demand that Congress FIRE ELON MUSK and shut down his hostile takeover? Every signature sends a clear message: We won’t stand by while an unelected billionaire gains control over critical government infrastructure, with access to trillions in public funds, personal data, and more. Sign the petition now and help turn up the pressure before it’s too late.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRImmimh3jp2d-3TZzmeeGfu-UTQdsDuya64KpuO8JCNfpJz62tZbS1uRaEs6xz5o92rDg2XhEAJvsJFbdUoEPfHeyhplR8xlGYyiPdqSrTFjGFX-htWBGTsrWIlYXqb50EuYquSL_8AJq17cEVcpT3i4MxVTd1RqfkbZbI5fTQlXjfhXJ7lAT22FALYVykIyM04v3v7Owczm6PGaGaAUMoKaWRUUGDns4cZdQP128je6kE1vPlAyaeYswtv21oYxhxr-aMQNSYI2YnfacrBfYpB5sY6BuBst2AEHOUMALVa2SkjbFhyV1iazA3m88NlPjgCXrVHcM6B_S-B_R_LKfDE/4dr/q3vXcskkRSOPGuleOeO_Tg/h0/h001.oBGX_NwpJkajwDTAkNAOcD3nZmF6BMCsiXKS8s5fGis) **[Sign the petition now »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRImmimh3jp2d-3TZzmeeGfu-UTQdsDuya64KpuO8JCNfpJz62tZbS1uRaEs6xz5o92rDg2XhEAJvsJFbdUoEPfHeyhplR8xlGYyiPdqSrTFjGFX-htWBGTsrWIlYXqb50EuYquSL_8AJq17cEVcpT3ihXIHvyeoyU_OinS-KB3fF0rghduw0kfitV59AJWo1WOI5bCfKLvnKKGr6Ln6zzsTTnatAdzNZ3Ey3zdf9GsxslTOBI2Xm0nS8tcbgFcKrEBEwRFLhmpFDCnkgeID20I130r2dLMIIhq2wtF05q_zA2BHoBJU4xkgd61X7MEzdmyrQVgVgh9izrNq8bQGioRa/4dr/q3vXcskkRSOPGuleOeO_Tg/h1/h001._FRmoHW8p5bV43RSV2Rp8XMgx7dQHU35p3tzHw8Ll5s)** Musk is acting as if his wealth gives him the right to govern our country. **He has _no_ respect for our laws, _no_ experience running federal agencies, and _no_ right to seize control of systems that millions of Americans rely on to survive.** While Trump is firing public servants left and right — gutting the very institutions that protect working people — Musk is raiding federal systems and data like it’s his personal playground. And for what? To funnel _more_ money into billionaire pockets. To help Trump _gut_ Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. To _force_ working people to pay the price while the ultra-rich rake in even _bigger_ tax breaks. Musk and Trump don’t care what they break or who gets hurt, as long as it makes them richer. But if Musk thinks we’ll take this smash-and-grab lying down, he’s in for a rude awakening. **Peter, we _need_ you in this fight. We can’t assume Congress will act on its own — they need to hear from us. They need to know that we won’t stand by while an unelected billionaire seizes control of OUR government.** [**Sign the petition now: Fire Elon Musk. Kick him out of our government. Protect our democracy.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRImmimh3jp2d-3TZzmeeGfu-UTQdsDuya64KpuO8JCNfpJz62tZbS1uRaEs6xz5o92rDg2XhEAJvsJFbdUoEPfHeyhplR8xlGYyiPdqSrTFjGFX-htWBGTsrWIlYXqb50EuYquSL_8AJq17cEVcpT3iDXg9h0TXVt0VZPGTlJlnDyrM_mmjqQ7__cLiajW-EJoFMg3EiZe0fVwED0vLGSCvz0buds2M4XQ0Mx_OsX-fHiCiFvWCBUb3PHqs3hcAn2LwLu2I61qJIFV6E05fypii81K-Tq2Gg8Uu-0KGBkVFf4NtYCEEOfjSSABzg9Ei1qnShDnKC51BspNRH6wHDsZk/4dr/q3vXcskkRSOPGuleOeO_Tg/h2/h001.DAyWEYZGCC3ddyEv7S83wU8byTTJ2vMrV41fuQq-4bM) **[Sign the petition now »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoe1DuqQbjt4KoloTZxD-XRImmimh3jp2d-3TZzmeeGfu-UTQdsDuya64KpuO8JCNfpJz62tZbS1uRaEs6xz5o92rDg2XhEAJvsJFbdUoEPfHeyhplR8xlGYyiPdqSrTFjGFX-htWBGTsrWIlYXqb50EuYquSL_8AJq17cEVcpT3i5hUmvRFzzhp8ARuLAFh3ALtiAJt7hkHS5eXPHTTNcc8twVoa8kpE-VsNd9Weax_HgWohnvSWYUASO2POamY25xChoso-dRaL9lbLC0hJxM4xnzZNQjIXF93Nkx6TNJmBX2KL6ebkf75Kiv0M7P446Ak99yC-JW7-aCO0ENUTEiWdLA12aPQBiETrxLgNNLOr/4dr/q3vXcskkRSOPGuleOeO_Tg/h3/h001.UifsmafWERc32xHoUe5wchnWGIKH6WXc9_WBjniVwQY)** We don’t need to fire teachers. We don’t need to fire air traffic controllers. We don't need to fire DOJ prosecutors and FBI agents for investigating and prosecuting the January 6 Capitol rioters. **Who we need to fire are unelected billionaires like Elon Musk.** In solidarity and resistance, Working Families Party Sources: 1\. clean_body: | | | Peter, Elon Musk holds no legal authority in our government — yet Trump has handed him control over the U.S. Treasury’s federal payment system. That means Musk and his cronies now have unchecked access to our personal financial records, Social Security numbers, and trillions of public dollars. But that’s not all. Reports just emerged that Musk’s so-called “Department of Government Efficiency” (DOGE) has infiltrated the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services. This means they also now control the systems that handle payments and contracts for our healthcare programs — raising serious concerns about the security of Medicare and Medicaid.1 Let’s be clear, Peter: DOGE is not a government agency. It has no congressional approval, no legal standing, and no expertise. Yet, in just days, Musk and his team of unqualified twenty-somethings2 took control of the systems that handle trillions in payments every year — including Social Security checks, Medicare reimbursements, and tax refunds. This isn’t just reckless. It’s an invasion of our government. And it’s already punishing working families. Musk is acting as if his wealth gives him the right to govern our country. He has no respect for our laws, no experience running federal agencies, and no right to seize control of systems that millions of Americans rely on to survive. While Trump is firing public servants left and right — gutting the very institutions that protect working people — Musk is raiding federal systems and data like it’s his personal playground. And for what? To funnel more money into billionaire pockets. To help Trump gut Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. To force working people to pay the price while the ultra-rich rake in even bigger tax breaks. Musk and Trump don’t care what they break or who gets hurt, as long as it makes them richer. But if Musk thinks we’ll take this smash-and-grab lying down, he’s in for a rude awakening. Peter, we need you in this fight. We can’t assume Congress will act on its own — they need to hear from us. They need to know that we won’t stand by while an unelected billionaire seizes control of OUR government. We don’t need to fire teachers. We don’t need to fire air traffic controllers. We don't need to fire DOJ prosecutors and FBI agents for investigating and prosecuting the January 6 Capitol rioters. Who we need to fire are unelected billionaires like Elon Musk. In solidarity and resistance, Working Families Party Sources: 1\. , The Wall Street Journal , 2/5/25. 2\. , Wired , 2/2/25. Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Team Fetterman
subject: ICYMI: John wants to hear from you ➡️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
In order to best represent working folks across PA + the country, John wants to know which issues are top of mind for you right now.
#
Hi Derek, Team Fetterman here with a quick reminder to [**take just two minutes (or less) to fill out our Post-Inauguration Survey before it closes!**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-email-20250205?source=em20250205-9867&akid=9867%2E434096%2EYQUTGF)
In order to best represent working folks across PA + the country, **John wants to know which issues are top of mind for you right now — and which fights you want to see Democrats prioritize in the Senate.**
So far we’ve received *thousands* of responses, and our team will be going through each and every one. Your input is super important as John + Senate Dems navigate the new reality in Washington! 🙏
We’ll send another email following up on the results, but first we want to make sure as many folks as possible have a chance to respond.
[**So Derek, please share your thoughts via our short survey now. It’ll take two minutes (or less) and we really appreciate each + every person who takes the time to respond!**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-email-20250205?source=em20250205-9867&akid=9867%2E434096%2EYQUTGF)
**[Take the survey »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-email-20250205?source=em20250205-9867&akid=9867%2E434096%2EYQUTGF)**
— Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20250205-9867-footer&t=1&refcode2=9867_434096_YQUTGF&akid=9867%2E434096%2EYQUTGF)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

| We’re experiencing a constitutional crisis, Peter.

The richest man in the world, unelected Elon Musk, has seized control of $6 trillion in Treasury payments for Social Security checks, Medicare, and tax refunds and hijacked sensitive data from millions of Americans.

**Let me repeat that:_an unelected billionaire by the name of Elon Musk has seized control of $6 trillion in Treasury payments for Social Security checks, Medicare, and tax refunds and hijacked sensitive data from millions of Americans._**

We’re experiencing an unprecedented constitutional crisis, and Trump and his supporters in Congress are cheering it on. _**Our constitution and our democracy should not be a partisan issue, and Americans do not deserve to carry the burden of Trump and Elon’s disastrous decisions.**_

**I’m calling on my colleagues across the aisle to join me in putting a stop to this direct attack on our democracy.**

[_**I’m using every lever that I have to stop this, but I need your support. # "Bring democracy to the Middle East?" Not as easy as you think...
_By Richie McGinniss_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0a52c77c-f198-4193-b426-b3b36280e968?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Before heading to the anti-Netanyahu protest in front of the White House last night, I dusted off the Keffiyeh that I got in Southern Lebanon in 2010. If I learned anything covering protests over the last eight years, it's that the best way to avoid getting punched in the head for asking the wrong questions is to blend in.
What I wanted to uncover was what exactly the demonstrators thought would be a proper solution to the conflict taking place in the Middle East. They were protesting Trump's meeting with Netanyahu on the other side of multiple rows of nonscalable fencing and hundreds of officers of the law. As it turned out, the picketers were no longer focused on the "two-state solution" that has been the aim of peaceniks for the last half century. Instead, the majority of the protesters I spoke with wanted a _one-state_ solution, under which the Palestinians, Israelis, and anyone else living there would have equal rights.This sounds nice on paper, but while studying Arabic and Middle Eastern history-and while living in Amman, Jordan in the fall of 2010-it became obvious that the only comprehensive truth over there is that absolutely NOTHING is as simple as it seems at first glance.
_(Continues below)_

I am old enough to remember when the term "bring democracy to the Middle East" was a catch phrase used by George Bush and his Neo-Conservative allies to make the invasion of Iraq sound nice and fluffy. The reality, as we have learned, was anything but.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/589851e9-01f5-425d-b2d5-287217c02b31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The first thing that I saw when I showed up to the protest was a giant effigy of Netanyahu with blood on his hands. It would be an understatement to say that this was not a very flattering caricature of Netanyahu, which was to be expected at a demonstration that supported the Palestinian cause. What I did not expect was to see a Palestinian flag displaying a man wearing a Hamas headband directly in front of the White House. Such overt support for Hamas was a new one for me, at least since I visited a Palestinian refugee camp outside Amman, Jordan fifteen years prior.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/447d3505-7037-4f1c-9e71-4979a32f4c63?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Democracy may work in America, but the Middle East has entrenched tribal divisions that ensure voters will cast ballots along sectarian lines. If we can gather anything from the unilateral (second) invasion of Iraq, it's that Americans have a tendency to superimpose their New World idealism onto a place that is mired by thousands of years of war.
As a model for a more palatable solution to the conflict, the protesters cited a return to the inter-faith peace that existed prior to European colonialism. Here's the problem: Ottoman, Arab, and Roman rule over the region was not achieved through the kumbayah mentality that the demonstrators naively pointed to for a way to bring peace to the Middle East. Put simply, the Middle East has always been ruled by whoever carries the biggest stick.
I gave up on this misplaced wishful thinking-along with using my Arabic anywhere other than Uber rides-when I realized how cynically both the Bush and Obama administrations manipulated the emotions of Americans in order to justify the continued funding of a war that could never be won. A war that was supposed to bring democracy to Iraq.
Similar to when gun-control advocates tell me that they want to confiscate every privately owned AR-15 from the hands of American citizens, that toothpaste simply cannot be put back into the tube. If we are to make any progress on the Arab-Israeli conflict, it's high time that the public comes back down to earth and understands the reality of the situation on the dry, water-starved ground of the Levant. A true Democratic system will never function over there. One need only to view the demographic makeup of [insert Middle Eastern country here] to know precisely how its people will vote.
I do not claim to have a solution to the unsolvable problem taking place in Israel and the West Bank. But I do know that if we are to move forward as a country, our politicians should be asking one and only one question before making any deals: how will this benefit the AMERICAN taxpayer? No, that does not include American oil companies, or American defense companies, or international bankers that relish the petro-dollar's multi-decade domination of global commerce. Average Americans are the ones who get sent over there to spill blood in the desert sand, and their well-being should be paramount above multinational interests that have dominated foreign policy for far too long. During times like this, the press should be asking the tough questions rather than endorsing whatever narrative is most politically correct. They should keep in mind that one simple fact: the Middle East is a place that can only be ruled by the sword, and I am sick and tired of our politicians and so-called media professionals pretending otherwise.

If you're looking for a way to help safeguard your savings, I recommend my partners at the top rated precious metals company - Goldco. They've made the process of buying gold and silver super easy, whether you're new to the game or you've been at it for years. I've done my homework and I've even met the folks at Goldco - they're the real deal. Not only do they know their stuff, but they treated me like family. So if you're considering a way to diversify your portfolio, trust me, these are the people you want to talk to. They've got that they will ship right to your doorstep. It's got all the information you need to see if precious metals are right for you. PLUS, if you act fast, you might even qualify for up to a 10% Instant Match in BONUS SILVER and a limited-edition Ronald Reagan Silver Coin, but only while supplies last, and it's first come, first served - so don't sleep on this! Help protect your financial future, the American way. Yours truly, DENNIS QUAID Actor, Singer, Musician I am old enough to remember when the term "bring democracy to the Middle East" was a catch phrase used by George Bush and his Neo-Conservative allies to make the invasion of Iraq sound nice and fluffy. The reality, as we have learned, was anything but. The first thing that I saw when I showed up to the protest was a giant effigy of Netanyahu with blood on his hands. It would be an understatement to say that this was not a very flattering caricature of Netanyahu, which was to be expected at a demonstration that supported the Palestinian cause. What I did not expect was to see a Palestinian flag displaying a man wearing a Hamas headband directly in front of the White House. Such overt support for Hamas was a new one for me, at least since I visited a Palestinian refugee camp outside Amman, Jordan fifteen years prior. Democracy may work in America, but the Middle East has entrenched tribal divisions that ensure voters will cast ballots along sectarian lines. If we can gather anything from the unilateral (second) invasion of Iraq, it's that Americans have a tendency to superimpose their New World idealism onto a place that is mired by thousands of years of war. As a model for a more palatable solution to the conflict, the protesters cited a return to the inter-faith peace that existed prior to European colonialism. Here's the problem: Ottoman, Arab, and Roman rule over the region was not achieved through the kumbayah mentality that the demonstrators naively pointed to for a way to bring peace to the Middle East. Put simply, the Middle East has always been ruled by whoever carries the biggest stick. I gave up on this misplaced wishful thinking-along with using my Arabic anywhere other than Uber rides-when I realized how cynically both the Bush and Obama administrations manipulated the emotions of Americans in order to justify the continued funding of a war that could never be won. A war that was supposed to bring democracy to Iraq. Similar to when gun-control advocates tell me that they want to confiscate every privately owned AR-15 from the hands of American citizens, that toothpaste simply cannot be put back into the tube. If we are to make any progress on the Arab-Israeli conflict, it's high time that the public comes back down to earth and understands the reality of the situation on the dry, water-starved ground of the Levant. A true Democratic system will never function over there. One need only to view the demographic makeup of [insert Middle Eastern country here] to know precisely how its people will vote. I do not claim to have a solution to the unsolvable problem taking place in Israel and the West Bank. But I do know that if we are to move forward as a country, our politicians should be asking one and only one question before making any deals: how will this benefit the AMERICAN taxpayer? No, that does not include American oil companies, or American defense companies, or international bankers that relish the petro-dollar's multi-decade domination of global commerce. Average Americans are the ones who get sent over there to spill blood in the desert sand, and their well-being should be paramount above multinational interests that have dominated foreign policy for far too long. During times like this, the press should be asking the tough questions rather than endorsing whatever narrative is most politically correct. They should keep in mind that one simple fact: the Middle East is a place that can only be ruled by the sword, and I am sick and tired of our politicians and so-called media professionals pretending otherwise. name: VAP Research Team
subject: Supporter poll: The power to seize voting machines?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020525_2&amount=25]
@NorahODonnell: The January 6th committee shows a draft executive order from Dec. 2020 that would direct the Secretary of Defense to seize voting machines immediately. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/NOD_SeizeVotingMachines.png]
The January 6th committee showed evidence in a hearing that President Trump was going to order the Department of Defense to seize voting machines around the country to search for evidence of wrongdoing.
While the order was never given, this highlights the lengths some people were willing to go to justify their fantasies about elections they see as "stolen".
Team : We're looking to hear from voters in your area about your thoughts on this. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Should the President have the power to order the military to seize voting machines without proof of wrongdoing?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020525_2&amount=25]

If Democrats take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

| | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because...

_We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat!_

**Remember:** We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

**Remember:** If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

**Remember:** If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.

name: Birthday Alert via BWC
subject: Honoring Bonnie’s special birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
| Did you see our last message? Bonnie’s 80th birthday is this week! We want to celebrate this lifetime milestone with her biggest supporters.

Bonnie has worked tirelessly to represent her community. **_[Tomorrow evening we’re going to share the big surprise with Bonnie and we want to be sure you’re included! Can you show your appreciation for her work by donating $8 for her 80th birthday here?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101619583/526529288/-1172664996?amount=8&source=EM_NBI_BWC_202502_FR_Birthday_0_3MO_TeamBWC_NA_NA_Birthday2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjBhODhjYy0wZWU0LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j1BCfkZRcYTwnPQPn5wG0Hl63EbsthTgQUjg7xoU7Vs=)_**

**_Begin forwarded message:_**

A very special day is coming up — _**Thursday is Bonnie’s 80th birthday!**_

This is a huge milestone and one that deserves to be celebrated to the fullest. Bonnie has been a leader throughout her life and in her time in Congress. She would love to celebrate with her biggest supporters who she has always been so proud to represent.

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: Women deserve to make their own health decisions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Team — I know the last two weeks have been anything but ordinary. But let me tell you about something that you might have missed: I expanded reproductive freedom. Women deserve to make their own choices about their health care in partnership with trusted medical professionals and loved ones. **That’s why I just signed 16 bills that will ensure women can more easily access critical reproductive health services moving forward.** **[Add your name if you agree: We must continue to defend and expand women’s reproductive rights in Michigan and across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101619624/526529393/1827040294?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250205_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmNlMzE4ZDMtMGVlNC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=65USAcojsCF8kWGlHJZbdBtCcq6dU71H8izBp3-Twg0=&emci=ce0a88cc-0ee4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=fce318d3-0ee4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=1028753)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101619625/526529394/1827040294?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250205_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmNlMzE4ZDMtMGVlNC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=65USAcojsCF8kWGlHJZbdBtCcq6dU71H8izBp3-Twg0=&emci=ce0a88cc-0ee4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=fce318d3-0ee4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=1028753)
---
Here in Michigan, we’re not just _talking_ about expanding reproductive freedom. We’re taking action.
While women previously had to jump through several hoops just to access basic reproductive care, the 16 commonsense bills I signed will make the process a little easier — and more affordable, too.
Over a third of Michigan’s 83 counties currently don’t have an OB/GYN, which makes it harder for women in these areas to access birth control. This legislation addresses this shortage of doctors by recognizing pharmacists as critical members of a woman’s reproductive health team and allowing them to prescribe and distribute contraceptives directly to patients — expanding access regardless of whether someone can see a doctor.
These bills will also make reproductive care more affordable by lowering out-of-pocket costs for women trying to purchase birth control bills, while also cutting the unnecessary red tape that stands between people and their health care.
Women deserve to control if, when, and how they choose to start their families — and in Michigan, we’re ensuring that women have the freedom to make that choice.
**[Let’s keep fighting like hell for our reproductive freedom. Add your name to stand with me>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101619626/526529395/1827040294?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250205_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmNlMzE4ZDMtMGVlNC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=65USAcojsCF8kWGlHJZbdBtCcq6dU71H8izBp3-Twg0=&emci=ce0a88cc-0ee4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=fce318d3-0ee4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=1028753)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101619627/526529396/1827040294?refcode=AU_FLHP_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250205_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmNlMzE4ZDMtMGVlNC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=65USAcojsCF8kWGlHJZbdBtCcq6dU71H8izBp3-Twg0=&emci=ce0a88cc-0ee4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=fce318d3-0ee4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=1028753)

Gretchen

Lansing, MI 48901

name: Wes Moore
subject: Weathering the storm
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101619857/526529970/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Mzk1OTk3ZS0wZmU0LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Z5Bur9MH1RMc8jPaKSa5TTCvooJBzcIE3-pGWmcnyAk=&emci=5b95997e-0fe4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=6395997e-0fe4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=24635485)
Friend, Today, I delivered my 2025 State of the State address. Maryland is being tested like never before. We are facing two storms:
1. A historic fiscal challenge — nearly a decade in the making — that threatens our state’s economy and our people.
2. A new federal administration that has plunged the nation into chaos through actions that have the potential to cut jobs, raise prices, and stifle economic growth.

Now is the time to show that Maryland can meet the moment when tested — **that we confront this crisis with courage.** We have some of the best talent and assets in the country. In this moment, we must marshal the courage to move in partnership and build a state where our economy is growing, where our people are protected, where our children are no longer born into poverty, and where Maryland bears the standard for what abundant opportunity looks like. Because with assets this strong, our success shouldn’t rely on the outcomes of presidential elections or who holds the majority in Congress. With values this principled, we shouldn’t be complacent when the rights and humanity of Marylanders are at risk. With people this determined, we shouldn’t be content with GDP growth half that of the nation. **Marylanders deserve a government that looks every challenge in the face, and still delivers results.** By leaning into these strengths and moving not just fast, but together, Maryland is positioned to lead, no matter the obstacles facing the state. **Maryland’s ability to tackle the crisis in front of us starts with a government that delivers real results.** During our first two years in office, my Administration — alongside partners from all corners of the state — worked to build an economy that grows the middle class and gives all Marylanders a pathway to work, wages, and wealth. Today, Maryland is **safer and more competitive** than when we first took office. The 2025 Legislative Session budget proposal and economic growth agenda builds on our administration’s successes and **positions Maryland to confront crisis with courage and win the decade.** Maryland has always met the moment by facing crisis with courage — and this time will be no different. **I encourage you to follow the courage of our leaders, because together we can prove the skeptics wrong and ensure that the state of the state remains strong.**
Elevate, Wes

By Authority: Wes Moore for Maryland, Mary Tydings, Treasurer
clean_body: Friend, Today, I delivered my 2025 State of the State address. Maryland is being tested like never before. We are facing two storms: 1. A historic fiscal challenge — nearly a decade in the making — that threatens our state’s economy and our people. 2. A new federal administration that has plunged the nation into chaos through actions that have the potential to cut jobs, raise prices, and stifle economic growth. Now is the time to show that Maryland can meet the moment when tested — that we confront this crisis with courage. We have some of the best talent and assets in the country. In this moment, we must marshal the courage to move in partnership and build a state where our economy is growing, where our people are protected, where our children are no longer born into poverty, and where Maryland bears the standard for what abundant opportunity looks like. Because with assets this strong, our success shouldn’t rely on the outcomes of presidential elections or who holds the majority in Congress. With values this principled, we shouldn’t be complacent when the rights and humanity of Marylanders are at risk. With people this determined, we shouldn’t be content with GDP growth half that of the nation. Marylanders deserve a government that looks every challenge in the face, and still delivers results. By leaning into these strengths and moving not just fast, but together, Maryland is positioned to lead, no matter the obstacles facing the state. Maryland’s ability to tackle the crisis in front of us starts with a government that delivers real results. During our first two years in office, my Administration — alongside partners from all corners of the state — worked to build an economy that grows the middle class and gives all Marylanders a pathway to work, wages, and wealth. Today, Maryland is safer and more competitive than when we first took office. The 2025 Legislative Session budget proposal and economic growth agenda builds on our administration’s successes and positions Maryland to confront crisis with courage and win the decade. Maryland has always met the moment by facing crisis with courage — and this time will be no different. I encourage you to follow the courage of our leaders, because together we can prove the skeptics wrong and ensure that the state of the state remains strong. Elevate, Wes

There are Governor’s races, State House, State Senate, City Council, School Board, and more elections taking place every year. This year, Emerge alums are running for office up and down the ballot in _**Florida, New Jersey, Virginia, and Wisconsin**_ ready to bring new energy and vision to public office.

As enraging as the 200+ executive orders signed have been, so far, our team at Emerge is preparing the next generation of Democratic leaders to safeguard our social safety net from extreme Republican policies. State and local elections will affect your communities now more than ever. Your support is critical to expanding our programs, training more women to lead, and achieving even more Democratic victories in 2025 and beyond.

Together, we can bring about transformative change. clean_body: Your support is critical to expanding our programs, training more women to lead, and achieving even more Democratic victories in 2025 and beyond. | = | Peter, Politics doesn’t just happen every 4 years — that’s why Emerge works every year to recruit, train, and empower more New American Majority women to run for office at every level of government. | = There are Governor’s races, State House, State Senate, City Council, School Board, and more elections taking place every year. This year, Emerge alums are running for office up and down the ballot in Florida, New Jersey, Virginia, and Wisconsin ready to bring new energy and vision to public office. As enraging as the 200+ executive orders signed have been, so far, our team at Emerge is preparing the next generation of Democratic leaders to safeguard our social safety net from extreme Republican policies. State and local elections will affect your communities now more than ever. Your support is critical to expanding our programs, training more women to lead, and achieving even more Democratic victories in 2025 and beyond. Together, we can bring about transformative change. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Jamie Lynn Maniscalco Deputy Training Director, Emerge * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 4 Embarcadero Center Suite 1400 San Francisco, CA 94111 United States

name: David Horowitz
subject: These individuals have enormous power and zero accountability
body:
| | | ...the deep-state
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[Today, I’m asking you to complete this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1376d3e02fee4ed791876b8c425d171c&_e=mxT_Zyy7USRF4xtIzWc5KRpzGxRVpHmOxuyR-X6ZysJeUu_LclpP-B0RbpyTAoTXf1aU3owd6kddH1Ue134F3gMWV4A6Bn_-3cEPLoOQFsYJeRu_SPFMeKSgVZibdP8I_WnhjK7VqM25OSCJRpN2GjSuD2LrvK8gzKdtxMRtERti2J9APPrbFevnsnF34ydbNCGk_Sh0RWVapUAGj20VlgLVae4uTcZA5OunqWfWjjC1Gu6iE9yOBxoJxQA_NJrn-9sUkh5RD42c5-D9z158lXp1lCPUbo7q06xNRpfZ8AyLG0s96m0yLPlQe7iNzzDCnSzC-aAiW1ruBZ-UGFKc4sHiIcy1m3tqPu5a4d_HjGDLzV7YkA8F1pXxxEW5wlLJTXq9s8CsFlgZPfUr4yFt1vc5yyGUQnk7mTuTXWEFu4Q%3D)**
---
| | I’d be willing to bet you’ve never heard of Everett Kelly before.He’s not a member of Congress. He’s not a governor.He doesn’t hold elected office of any kind.And that’s the problem.
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1376d3e02fee4ed791876b8c425d171c&_e=mxT_Zyy7USRF4xtIzWc5KRpzGxRVpHmOxuyR-X6ZysJeUu_LclpP-B0RbpyTAoTXf1aU3owd6kddH1Ue134F3gMWV4A6Bn_-3cEPLoOQFsYJeRu_SPFMeKSgVZibdP8I_WnhjK7VqM25OSCJRpN2GjSuD2LrvK8gzKdtxMRtERti2J9APPrbFevnsnF34ydbNCGk_Sh0RWVapUAGj20VlgLVae4uTcZA5OunqWfWjjC1Gu6iE9yOBxoJxQA_NJrn-9sUkh5RD42c5-D9z158lc3ionqflBA0f2-vEs38FUDfznFRUoIYSPQ528CVoU-NVOZfewExQR9bXZDe1ULiUS_ursTnWovqzughIw9kagwT4Mztk8rttL22ZON7nqQZ9owLsjUgzcXZhItLw5epPE5VSeNoRXUH2_V35ddGksg%3D)
---
| | Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees – the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers – who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left......the deep-state. And, before President Trump even takes office, Everett Kelly and the other proponents of “unionized government” are making the rounds in the media attacking President Trump, attacking Elon Musk, attacking Vivek Ramaswamy, and conspiring with the outgoing Biden administration to extend collective bargaining agreements (an attempt to tie President trump’s hands on this issue for the next two years). **[**That is why the results of this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS will be tabulated and delivered to the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1376d3e02fee4ed791876b8c425d171c&_e=mxT_Zyy7USRF4xtIzWc5KRpzGxRVpHmOxuyR-X6ZysJeUu_LclpP-B0RbpyTAoTXf1aU3owd6kddH1Ue134F3gMWV4A6Bn_-3cEPLoOQFsYJeRu_SPFMeKSgVZibdP8I_WnhjK7VqM25OSCJRpN2GjSuD2LrvK8gzKdtxMRtERti2J9APPrbFevnsnF34ydbNCGk_Sh0RWVapUAGj20VlgLVae4uTcZA5OunqWfWjjC1Gu6iE9yOBxoJxQA_NJrn-9sUkh5RD42c5-D9z158lV2dApGs7Kc4cNKyD4sSGt0GKkhTxgLYPT75ObRSqwKC-yKdLxExDL-HQZikkeTLyb5TvOh0Z3huwOIWsfIG6Ig7MlK6ZwDMgn69BgifDT2MrnEdmfZtQ-HVcEN_YIgptTWJhEmzM_83F6I2quHw_bs%3D)** Your participation is of the utmost importance.
---
* _Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%._
* _Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies?_
* _Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year?_
* _Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average?_
* _What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee?_

---
These are the questions on part one of the **[**NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1376d3e02fee4ed791876b8c425d171c&_e=mxT_Zyy7USRF4xtIzWc5KRpzGxRVpHmOxuyR-X6ZysJeUu_LclpP-B0RbpyTAoTXf1aU3owd6kddH1Ue134F3gMWV4A6Bn_-3cEPLoOQFsYJeRu_SPFMeKSgVZibdP8I_WnhjK7VqM25OSCJRpN2GjSuD2LrvK8gzKdtxMRtERti2J9APPrbFevnsnF34ydbNCGk_Sh0RWVapUAGj20VlgLVae4uTcZA5OunqWfWjjC1Gu6iE9yOBxoJxQA_NJrn-9sUkh5RD42c5-D9z158lZKvM2D3yNAClJw1sa4OgSxXMi1hitAXkoZxUsoIFj7MT7mUJf8fnpYlSe5Tfwf23mR533KJ7aOZuTXx7Sjz4tmnzRxCi1FhjjQbkv00Zp3pjQM7gG5t8M92tkw_eWPllglk39dDLKysDGTVqj8Y8GY%3D)** And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servant”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration.
---
* _Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government?_
* _Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch?_
* _Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service?_
* _Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats?_

---
You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... _Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. _And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky’s “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. Today, I’m asking you to join the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. **[**Your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS is the key to reaffirming this mandate by demonstrating the consensus that exists to remove the obstructionist deep-state.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1376d3e02fee4ed791876b8c425d171c&_e=mxT_Zyy7USRF4xtIzWc5KRpzGxRVpHmOxuyR-X6ZysJeUu_LclpP-B0RbpyTAoTXf1aU3owd6kddH1Ue134F3gMWV4A6Bn_-3cEPLoOQFsYJeRu_SPFMeKSgVZibdP8I_WnhjK7VqM25OSCJRpN2GjSuD2LrvK8gzKdtxMRtERti2J9APPrbFevnsnF34ydbNCGk_Sh0RWVapUAGj20VlgLVae4uTcZA5OunqWfWjjC1Gu6iE9yOBxoJxQA_NJrn-9sUkh5RD42c5-D9z158lSJf2gzMYvTqITY7kNCD_kGzxRVsbwoSsb_n313IAJDvPylTou1bfVTkToTKg_A3y6A6y0JQGWp9kC0pQHhg1zuNppYcV8A_QxK34H1xazFQTswfEv4eO2pSHGnjMYMW3VSC1QYm1Nq2_bAlONi-AEA%3D)** Please complete it as soon as possible. There’s no time to lose.The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it _never_ will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk, Vivek Ramaswamy, and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. **[That’s why I’m asking you to complete your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS without delay.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1376d3e02fee4ed791876b8c425d171c&_e=mxT_Zyy7USRF4xtIzWc5KRpzGxRVpHmOxuyR-X6ZysJeUu_LclpP-B0RbpyTAoTXf1aU3owd6kddH1Ue134F3gMWV4A6Bn_-3cEPLoOQFsYJeRu_SPFMeKSgVZibdP8I_WnhjK7VqM25OSCJRpN2GjSuD2LrvK8gzKdtxMRtERti2J9APPrbFevnsnF34ydbNCGk_Sh0RWVapUAGj20VlgLVae4uTcZA5OunqWfWjjC1Gu6iE9yOBxoJxQA_NJrn-9sUkh5RD42c5-D9z158lYb-QyKOh3ClKS7qP-uFA4v-WrpgGXn148J7JXniyNoPNpPETwBe_bmF_VbpmwmmHrysMJtLvbSwa7r5xYj-V7MibxCstSEQA57lT3kora9VL6ZbCSx9FpEeC8XEPVxwX-LdTt27zbY2xgHZfFDWAvQ%3D)** And that’s why **I’m also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35** when you do. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.**That said, if you can send a larger contribution – $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000, or more – it will supercharge this campaign.** I want you to know that the Freedom Center will maximize every dollar you contribute. We’ve had “woke” corporations and financial institutions conspire to “de-bank” and “de-platform” us before:
---
* They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on).
* We had to find a new bank after the local bank we’ve been at for years suddenly closed our accounts.
* The hotel we’ve held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly declined to renew our contract.

---
You see, because of our effectiveness in fighting for conservative principles, they hate us. Like President Trump, we’ve faced countless lies, leaks, and lawfare attempts from the Left. But I refuse to back down.Especially against the wasteful, constitution-subverting unions that make up the federal deep-state. So please hurry. With your support today, I’m confident we can win this fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1376d3e02fee4ed791876b8c425d171c&_e=mxT_Zyy7USRF4xtIzWc5KRpzGxRVpHmOxuyR-X6ZysJeUu_LclpP-B0RbpyTAoTXf1aU3owd6kddH1Ue134F3gMWV4A6Bn_-3cEPLoOQFsYJeRu_SPFMeKSgVZibdP8I_WnhjK7VqM25OSCJRpN2GjSuD2LrvK8gzKdtxMRtERti2J9APPrbFevnsnF34ydbNCGk_Sh0RWVapUAGj20VlgLVae4uTcZA5OunqWfWjjC1Gu6iE9yOBxoJxQA_NJrn-9sUkh5RD42c5-D9z158laCJfv7yEv9uo5Il_he0bcNVp5EUyYthcf1oZEKHMPz794X4TxJH_Q3w-Phw7eVvxq91zj8U4yu3MH_uJqZYt8qYG3sOPJOGAFnW_X_CnjhBaohp__Nw3FEdSLz9wVEg1XOANFC_IP-hohUZtnRWsAY%3D)
---
| | **David Horowitz**
---
P.S. At the start of my email, I mentioned Everett Kelly and the 800,000 members of the American Federation of Government Employees union. According to their website: “** _On average, AFGE members pay between $18 - $22 per pay period for union dues_**.” **[**Your survey and your financial support are of the utmost importance in this fight to overcome the illegal, ill-gotten influence of these government unions.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1376d3e02fee4ed791876b8c425d171c&_e=mxT_Zyy7USRF4xtIzWc5KRpzGxRVpHmOxuyR-X6ZysJeUu_LclpP-B0RbpyTAoTXf1aU3owd6kddH1Ue134F3gMWV4A6Bn_-3cEPLoOQFsYJeRu_SPFMeKSgVZibdP8I_WnhjK7VqM25OSCJRpN2GjSuD2LrvK8gzKdtxMRtERti2J9APPrbFevnsnF34ydbNCGk_Sh0RWVapUAGj20VlgLVae4uTcZA5OunqWfWjjC1Gu6iE9yOBxoJxQA_NJrn-9sUkh5RD42c5-D9z158laj0kvW2rK64lLlUM0YvT6mInO8rw0k_EycDHwfM3JRP3v5jlsfrMsuzjkp83UaH3dDsUGuP6YCH6luWU7q9u2nwDGt9bCuYOPzpvQPK76SVymrB1qK-pJJh9BTyih7-QJzi8bWn5joBtmy8lu-OdCk%3D)**
---
[ **Take the Survey**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1376d3e02fee4ed791876b8c425d171c&_e=mxT_Zyy7USRF4xtIzWc5KRpzGxRVpHmOxuyR-X6ZysJeUu_LclpP-B0RbpyTAoTXf1aU3owd6kddH1Ue134F3gMWV4A6Bn_-3cEPLoOQFsYJeRu_SPFMeKSgVZibdP8I_WnhjK7VqM25OSCJRpN2GjSuD2LrvK8gzKdtxMRtERti2J9APPrbFevnsnF34ydbNCGk_Sh0RWVapUAGj20VlgLVae4uTcZA5OunqWfWjjC1Gu6iE9yOBxoJxQA_NJrn-9sUkh5RD42c5-D9z158lQ9UpH6i0a8tE0rYG3OcsL287fR2Nz-wiQaW_e5qHBU_GlCUsjHJ0ZSNSqUPnA5gLgF0Z_Xk5hdLsNJ1uDCMUe0gCqgLjbXTUt0wUVirbv4h1y8JRskpJRWks_oO-6HS7gmu-SHmCxJWEB4_ObUBre8%3D)

Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky’s “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. Today, I’m asking you to join the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. Please complete it as soon as possible. There’s no time to lose.The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it never will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk, Vivek Ramaswamy, and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. And that’s why I’m also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 when you do. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.That said, if you can send a larger contribution – $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000, or more – it will supercharge this campaign. I want you to know that the Freedom Center will maximize every dollar you contribute. We’ve had “woke” corporations and financial institutions conspire to “de-bank” and “de-platform” us before: They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on). We had to find a new bank after the local bank we’ve been at for years suddenly closed our accounts. The hotel we’ve held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly declined to renew our contract. You see, because of our effectiveness in fighting for conservative principles, they hate us. Like President Trump, we’ve faced countless lies, leaks, and lawfare attempts from the Left. But I refuse to back down.Especially against the wasteful, constitution-subverting unions that make up the federal deep-state. So please hurry. With your support today, I’m confident we can win this fight. Sincerely, | | David Horowitz P.S. At the start of my email, I mentioned Everett Kelly and the 800,000 members of the American Federation of Government Employees union. According to their website: “ On average, AFGE members pay between $18 - $22 per pay period for union dues.” | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | P.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499 | | ---|---

Peter — I will always fight for the Oregon that I know is possible. An Oregon where no one has to live in a tent on a sidewalk. An Oregon where Oregonians seeking help for a mental health concern or substance use issue can find and afford the support they need. An Oregon where every child has a safe place to receive a high-quality public education. An Oregon where everyone has financial stability and pathways to greater opportunity. subject: Be part of the change for Women’s rights
body:
My Ambassadors are out there right now, fighting for you and I
| Friend, Are you ready to take action against radical gender ideology? As you and I navigate this new political landscape, the importance of defending women’s rights has never been more critical.
With President Trump’s victory, you and I now have the chance to reclaim society from leftist values.
The Riley Gaines Center is rallying advocates and allies to join this movement in defense of women’s rights, and I want **_YOU_** to be part of it. Friend, with your support, I know that anything is possible. That includes setting things right and Making Women Female Again. As I travel the country and hear horror stories from concerned parents, one thing is clear. People want to know how they can help. Well, Friend, this is how: [Contribute now to our 2025 fundraising drive.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4813845c62aa4b73b03a38c659135b0f&_e=EIch2pZELGJ0KNB5w1Glh6MvabQFlQjLjNdX2Y_8TwcST1zwRygT0Jwk6fGfXSg0occBOSXJeQC7l8um4HPptAANMFCFPbCBDB0E83icUXi211IVwL87wcgPObHfMtZANhtqbJW70OkXKe-aPbPn02PjjSoA6sgqNR0ovUziyZ2X95f5sJGgqfYG42aWmNAyeAAzVSwHm-xNFYIDWTL8KnltOFD6mqiKB4iWiOsZKz_N_VmcJ0Yc8zup6_RBXnWf_ktBx6facAGFO0ehJX9ZnLy0Yt84aqVDTUpxAFAY3R1CSML7Ca-WcHGtNisV7TmiMBPNi5lekLokKAtub47l1hmTji4HiCQKJ2Ktaxj3O4dnfNB_NtWAJC_meMUodR7WEBwWAWC7zvnQv1ju-SbKsA%3D%3D) Your critical support can empower the Riley Gaines Center’s Ambassadors to take decisive action and make a tangible difference in the lives of female athletes and students. My Ambassadors are out there right now, fighting for you and I. **Don’t worry, we’re young and hungry and ready to fight.**
Together, we can create a ripple effect that impacts every corner of our country.
[Every contribution matters. Whether it’s $25, $50, or more, your donation directly funds our programs and initiatives designed to protect and uplift women.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4813845c62aa4b73b03a38c659135b0f&_e=EIch2pZELGJ0KNB5w1Glh6MvabQFlQjLjNdX2Y_8TwcST1zwRygT0Jwk6fGfXSg0occBOSXJeQC7l8um4HPptAANMFCFPbCBDB0E83icUXi211IVwL87wcgPObHfMtZANhtqbJW70OkXKe-aPbPn02PjjSoA6sgqNR0ovUziyZ2X95f5sJGgqfYG42aWmNAyeAAzVSwHm-xNFYIDWTL8KnltOFD6mqiKB4iWiOsZKz_N_VmcJ0Yc8zup6_RBXnWfDKScJj4dURm3QtrtdfROEsAjkixWjcIJykHfVxbYCWs6FLl4UmHQL_ub7mZb26BAIa1kYn9xskKaJCBoa2fnuHQDmSjIUXzqpggkb5rXSdAuDYGAw5c3I-q4CfJFhv2AZQizy4-N5H-Fg69PN-2bNw%3D%3D) Together, you and I can make waves and advocate for policies that ensure fairness and equality. Let’s harness this momentum and continue the fight for women’s rights! Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center
at the Leadership Institute P.S. - Together, you and I can create a powerful front against the challenges posed by the left’s radical agenda. At the very least, your support will help make sure that the “Women” sign on the bathroom door means something again. [Please consider donating to support our efforts. ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=4813845c62aa4b73b03a38c659135b0f&_e=EIch2pZELGJ0KNB5w1Glh6MvabQFlQjLjNdX2Y_8TwcST1zwRygT0Jwk6fGfXSg0occBOSXJeQC7l8um4HPptAANMFCFPbCBDB0E83icUXi211IVwL87wcgPObHfMtZANhtqbJW70OkXKe-aPbPn02PjjSoA6sgqNR0ovUziyZ2X95f5sJGgqfYG42aWmNAyeAAzVSwHm-xNFYIDWTL8KnltOFD6mqiKB4iWiOsZKz_N_VmcJ0Yc8zup6_RBXnWfIbnUzLkG1ihMm9l6Aqco_WQaj9gDPs5EWwdgh0iXJitvKHbWyXYrsqIQx3dDl4Op_q9JSYswhppvg7i_WJwSZh2hAbcqxXpO-14VQRw-Dj5imhagXRA627bpfgBi8ppJrQ-PEqPDIalq99a_BsFPiQ%3D%3D) Every contribution helps us amplify our message and reach more people.

Peter, we’ll make it simple for you. Here are 3 reasons to support Ritchie Torres:
1. As the first openly LGBTQ+ Afro-Latino man in Congress, and a product of public housing in the Bronx, **Ritchie’s greatest asset that he brings to Washington is the wisdom of _lived experience._**

2. Ritchie is **advocating tirelessly for Social Security & Medicare, affordable housing, and LGBTQ+ rights** and fighting for our communities, at a time when the GOP has put all of the above on the chopping block.

3. Ritchie vowed to never give up on these fights **so that more folks like him can have a seat at the table** — _but he can’t do it alone._

[That’s why we’re reaching out today, Peter: As Trump and Republicans attack everything from Medicaid to Head Start to LGBTQ+ rights, we need all the help we can get. subject: get involved today!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [#] Team,

Our campaign is bringing together folks from all across the state who are fed up with how expensive Jersey is.

As Governor, Josh will be a problem-solver and take on the toughest problems to make life more affordable for Jersey families. But he needs your help to get there.

To find out how you can get involved with the fight to elect Josh, click here! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Tv0LaUOvsEecnNUGM7JwZg2]

JOIN OUR TEAM >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Tv0LaUOvsEecnNUGM7JwZg2]

Together, we can keep fighting to lower taxes, strengthen our communities, and ensure a brighter future for every hardworking family in New Jersey.

With just a few months until the primary, we need to show our grassroots strength and support. Running for Governor takes a team, and we’re so glad to have you on ours!

Get involved today → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Tv0LaUOvsEecnNUGM7JwZg2]

Thank you,

Team Gottheimer
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. clean_body: [#] Team, Our campaign is bringing together folks from all across the state who are fed up with how expensive Jersey is. As Governor, Josh will be a problem-solver and take on the toughest problems to make life more affordable for Jersey families. But he needs your help to get there. To find out how you can get involved with the fight to elect Josh, click here! [] JOIN OUR TEAM >> [] Together, we can keep fighting to lower taxes, strengthen our communities, and ensure a brighter future for every hardworking family in New Jersey. With just a few months until the primary, we need to show our grassroots strength and support. Running for Governor takes a team, and we’re so glad to have you on ours! Get involved today → [] Thank you, Team Gottheimer Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [] , or to unsubscribe click here. [] Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. DONATE [] VOLUNTEER [] Prefer to donate by mail? Make checks payable to Josh Gottheimer for Governor PO Box 201 Hackensack, NJ 07602 [] [] []

body:
If every supporter reading this donated to support state Dems, we’d have the resources to defend and expand Democratic power from right-wing extremists in state legislatures across the map. | | |
---
| |
---|---

| 🫏 If you are a local Democrat, please continue reading.

State Democrats are facing competitive special elections – one of the most important being a tie-breaking race in the Pennsylvania House. If Democrats lose this seat, Republicans _will_ flip control of the House, giving the GOP full control of the PA legislature.

**We’re counting on grassroots supporters to help elect Democrats who will fight the extreme MAGA agenda.** [ A $7 donation is all it takes to fuel our work → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDBs5M1B9a8Y0-8wJfrZEwEArR6iW3CYvP1wZgiXbEoWjVzIwhRFDEyDO2sv_AS5XCcaoQyoTQWIeh5e_a4S_W46a_0ft4jRuO3-_rI_HQpc5Tksk1jLEuPG5Tnv3kKeaX2T3tPrJi-gEWgb-3BPSmMPv4xq1nSID9Ytu5_txb__Kb3n0bNIe9xgXhVn3LCCtb5e19hE0D0guqSkZIKNb-u1gIUZNPGZ_mINVJaKZOU45HsoxZnve-QeR_METs59l5apOG8eqP2Xit3KoYl4U88EY3E8UOflZp13ZRdD_lytBrNzykIz22bnRUD_Ipz1OsXZ1Oe0A6yDH7Qg74ldBqPLLkgMMXHFV9JjoM_TiIoOKFOJIU7IRoBl6OBkl_paIm8PVaDEM8nJ6qhNKo62dr6uGverQmz0RGh5idLfc0qIQ/4dr/kIXcvzuATq2F1Q5zgfV1Qw/h0/h001.bi6BgS7Mew4zRYrHY961p_Lzn-wfFEMBDB9qnccHgro)

If every supporter reading this donated $7 to support state Dems today, we’d have the resources to defend and expand Democratic power from right-wing extremists in state legislatures across the map. 💪

But we know not everyone can pitch in right now, so we’re relying on our most dedicated supporters to make your first donation of the year to the DLCC.

Together, we can power state Democrats to victory in elections that are typically underfunded and overlooked. 🗳️

clean_body: If every supporter reading this donated to support state Dems, we’d have the resources to defend and expand Democratic power from right-wing extremists in state legislatures across the map. | | | | | ---|--- | 🫏 If you are a local Democrat, please continue reading. State Democrats are facing competitive special elections – one of the most important being a tie-breaking race in the Pennsylvania House. If Democrats lose this seat, Republicans will flip control of the House, giving the GOP full control of the PA legislature. We’re counting on grassroots supporters to help elect Democrats who will fight the extreme MAGA agenda. If every supporter reading this donated $7 to support state Dems today, we’d have the resources to defend and expand Democratic power from right-wing extremists in state legislatures across the map. 💪 But we know not everyone can pitch in right now, so we’re relying on our most dedicated supporters to make your first donation of the year to the DLCC. Together, we can power state Democrats to victory in elections that are typically underfunded and overlooked. 🗳️ | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | We hope you can step up today. 🙂 Thank you, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. subject: We’re banning men from women’s sports
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE VICTORY FUND
body:
I'm leading the charge, and now Trump is on board
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=9fc9888468f14436b561e097d83fa2b1&_e=mPUYYvA5tB-zbmSl1f4QLCSJx6MGcKcpd1igGoMPZqsKJiYWJvtZThnXg2Bq_IPEVEt9FZzxRGaW_1NACVtJCjDLQlS9G0YAGeD9xGWZpZNavrPPD2GlHxgifqH3lTxdcK8B70CFOC-sBM0X9iKI3OtLUmTZ_LrK2I_-v8ZjPhllNWbct_QTgjq1dfbogSAlq4suodbYQqPTQ8YnkwPvdbd6jEOQ132gYVt288QKDByR6XO29PtTzkifiVGysRm0D91fvO6UkXWhYPs0xo6JTy0OUTqPFq_TNv1pQOfNX7tTSa3K6F0mghOphDm-SiAuBSe1_ErzIo4ZEaN8uSovLw%3D%3D)

Peter,

_As a Hall-of-Fame College Football Coach, I know all too well about the importance of athletics from the youth level to the pros. That 's why I led the charge to PROTECT WOMEN AND GIRLS' SPORTS from biological men competing and threatening the integrity and safety of women's sports._

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=9fc9888468f14436b561e097d83fa2b1&_e=mPUYYvA5tB-zbmSl1f4QLCSJx6MGcKcpd1igGoMPZqsKJiYWJvtZThnXg2Bq_IPEVEt9FZzxRGaW_1NACVtJCjDLQlS9G0YAGeD9xGWZpZNavrPPD2GlHxgifqH3lTxdcK8B70CFOC-sBM0X9iKI3OtLUmTZ_LrK2I_-v8ZjPhllNWbct_QTgjq1dfbogSAlmwMahLHHH5qm4tsQA_kAHrZMr6xYkOWyjgYQbwZgjwJNrPyCq681VCMgEZ3ncIcz-2fZSXWPbfgp3cYaENu3h2vcVH4HMUZxvCird1yllqRXSZ7R6bn-PG8h468coq6vXV0NFedZaIeb05N3iwruqg%3D%3D)
All Americans are sick and tired of the Radical Left pushing their insane agenda and forcing our daughters and granddaughters to compete against biological men. In fact, 79% of Americans, regardless of political party, agree with our movement.

| [ **PROTECT WOMEN AND GIRLS ' SPORTS** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=9fc9888468f14436b561e097d83fa2b1&_e=mPUYYvA5tB-zbmSl1f4QLCSJx6MGcKcpd1igGoMPZqsKJiYWJvtZThnXg2Bq_IPEVEt9FZzxRGaW_1NACVtJCjDLQlS9G0YAGeD9xGWZpZNavrPPD2GlHxgifqH3lTxdcK8B70CFOC-sBM0X9iKI3OtLUmTZ_LrK2I_-v8ZjPhllNWbct_QTgjq1dfbogSAlqaHimytRlJT8OIB_FcFjZHGFs91aUcPvJNHzoy6-AWoU0RYzJ4QGZ8QAuOkyODvXGnPjAyW-IFQoaCLk3UkxTb12Vi7s4-I_PIN8rJJr-bGKFwbZpnKktTgtuhw0Y-vhVRNcrTJsqZ6JWx2nh2Lhmg%3D%3D)

President Trump is on board, too. He signed an executive order to support the legislation that I introduced - The Protect Women and Girls in Sports Act - and he BANNED biological men from infringing on women's Title IX rights.

Folks, now is the time to stand up and protect women's sports. I'm humbly asking you to join my America-First Team before midnight to join the millions of Americans who are with us.

[**Can you chip in just $15 before midnight to help us Protect Women's and Girls ' Sports?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=9fc9888468f14436b561e097d83fa2b1&_e=mPUYYvA5tB-zbmSl1f4QLCSJx6MGcKcpd1igGoMPZqsKJiYWJvtZThnXg2Bq_IPEVEt9FZzxRGaW_1NACVtJCjDLQlS9G0YAGeD9xGWZpZNavrPPD2GlHxgifqH3lTxdcK8B70CFOC-sBM0X9iKI3OtLUmTZ_LrK2I_-v8ZjPhllNWbct_QTgjq1dfbogSAlPSJRb5zS5j0UUxObS6jB5-vTDYCDRWpDXVoHG1kfUq_Yz9GJ1pxU9p6jyP4mmwUKbo19Ku8ncgKFiOprPMdOUaOmql0LHYPRGrO5UWMxgvX6Xtnbl9oIYDnz-DKe5RlH_4jcMhLs2G0ZjDo6xOACXQ%3D%3D)

Coach Tuberville

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=9fc9888468f14436b561e097d83fa2b1&_e=mPUYYvA5tB-zbmSl1f4QLCSJx6MGcKcpd1igGoMPZqsKJiYWJvtZThnXg2Bq_IPEVEt9FZzxRGaW_1NACVtJCjDLQlS9G0YAGeD9xGWZpZNavrPPD2GlHxgifqH3lTxdcK8B70CFOC-sBM0X9iKI3OtLUmTZ_LrK2I_-v8ZjPhllNWbct_QTgjq1dfbogSAlH3pEA8YzF74T5vHUVhXtzMeS6JLm3mZwNof972WpxH5SMdZSd-1g2SU_zro4oyJIbXAuWL-20Rv-3rohLXE75e8OEz0MbQp8xmyJXk-7Acg_L_NPjqnDrYJ6nbfya0hgvGS6GW9U6D0KC0DHvdhQKg%3D%3D)

name: David Hogg
subject: Time to roll up our sleeves
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Young people are the answer to Donald Trump.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250205-1&t=1&akid=1698%2E587540%2EwWYH2k)
Hey Peter, it’s David Hogg. Are you ready to get back to winning? Because I am.
After Parkland, our country had a Republican trifecta, like we do now. Consultants, pundits, and pollsters told us that we had no chance of creating real change.
**But we didn’t listen,_and that’s why we won._**
**We cannot accept defeat. We cannot accept cynicism. We need to roll up our sleeves and fight back.**
Leaders We Deserve is working to energize and mobilize young voters across the country because that’s the only way we will defeat Trump’s fascism.
**Young people are a critical part of the answer to Donald Trump.** And that’s why the work we’re doing together is so important.
We are changing the face of the Democratic Party and transforming it into the youthful, energetic, and progressive party of the future that we all want to see.
But this work is only possible with grassroots support. We don’t have a long line of billionaires waiting to fund us like the other side does. We have real people who give _$10, $30, $50_ or whatever they can to power this progressive movement.
**[Can we count on your support, Peter? Pitch in $5 right now to help us rebuild the Democratic Party and get back to winning.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250205-1?refcode=em20250205-1698&amount=5&refcode2=1698_587540_wWYH2k&akid=1698%2E587540%2EwWYH2k)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250205-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250205-1698&refcode2=1698_587540_wWYH2k&akid=1698%2E587540%2EwWYH2k)**
Thank you!
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250205-1&t=2&refcode2=1698_587540_wWYH2k&akid=1698%2E587540%2EwWYH2k)**

name: Kimberly Bretches
subject: The George Floyd riots continue to haunt my husband
body:
Life behind bars could be his “reward.” | | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job.
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,This is a photo of me and my husband, **Officer Chance Bretches** , on the day Chance received the Lifesaving Medal With Valor for rescuing a driver from a crashed car that had caught on fire.
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=114f323277e04e868c5e9a7f192e10b4&_e=sYsCJz-F4E4y7JV02kfblxVRnD3QGgSju7f2YvI8lPG1up8KA_dlyD4P9Pj0gRozX37q6Dc6A7x2UCYc1dZcP9Mm9wwZ-jGE_3ggnY0pXo4sMRtPAWv8CzVLlcsvsDdurSkH6WYnhp1kQo90Bt0hXTPEbjpOgrhay9WgSQWpLZ2Y0pckA8lOoFPe-0fcZWwDAytqZmS55pzGqkHlOOKysNzyq68-mk27bYFoIYRFg28B2FZ-3WVxXAkm-VTon0ponk9IHl1XuEz1N5FZaHoaP6yK9d8lcXA-WqrU3J4uuDvIfGb_MUazdug_jwpogMjODDO3a78xL4MeByVDXnk4aaqwbPsLX180drWD8tHMi_UROWLnFgVb9sKdJ6wvqxgP)
---
This photo used to be one of my favorites. I was so proud of my husband that day.Now looking at it makes me cry.Because the same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison **for life** for doing his job.**[That’s why I’m humbly asking you to help me save my husband.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=114f323277e04e868c5e9a7f192e10b4&_e=sYsCJz-F4E4y7JV02kfblxVRnD3QGgSju7f2YvI8lPG1up8KA_dlyD4P9Pj0gRozX37q6Dc6A7x2UCYc1dZcP9Mm9wwZ-jGE_3ggnY0pXo4sMRtPAWv8CzVLlcsvsDdurSkH6WYnhp1kQo90Bt0hXTPEbjpOgrhay9WgSQWpLZ2Y0pckA8lOoFPe-0fcZWwDAytqZmS55pzGqkHlOOKysNzyq68-mk27bYFoIYRFg29-022Ptxg-vJnP5j7vcZVpxxHusS5k1zryXz5vl7bdEFOuJLk0POMlsVbbhNl0rjSl_dk35OdrzLAmtFIhih25wlxx8HzLG1UZBL3llj_SrFqYYbGNFcMtdFUwTTUH3EhmU_vIhKnm2n6LYHaX88dE)****** Friend, it wasn’t that long ago that Chance was a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department.When my husband and his partner were assigned to the Street Narcotics Unit, I was terrified. After all, they’re the ones who deal with violent drug cartels.But Chance was brave. He was willing to put his life in danger to keep our city safe. Little did we know the biggest threat Chance would face wasn’t a dangerous drug dealer......but a radical, Soros-funded prosecutor.You see, Chance was called in to help disperse violent protestors during the violent George Floyd riots in Austin in May 2020. The police department issued Chance a beanbag launcher because they are supposed to be effective without causing serious injury.So, when a rioter hurled rocks at police officers, Chance discharged two bean bags at him.Another protestor stepped in front of the rioter at the exact wrong moment and was struck in the hand. It was a freak accident – but because a cop fired the non-lethal weapon, it instantly becomes a felony to a Soros-backed prosecutor.That radical Soros-funded prosecutor charged my husband with FELONY ASSAULT.My husband did nothing wrong!But now he’s staring at life in prison. If Chance is convicted, I’ll never spend another wedding anniversary with my husband......Our young son and daughter will grow up without their dad.I admit, when Chance was charged, my emotions went from disbelief to anger to despair ... and back again. **I learned that the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros.** That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to make an example out of my husband. They’ll do everything in their power to make cops pay.It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But over 13 years ago, my husband did.And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year police veteran.My husband is a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band.He’s served on mission trips – planted churches, planning Vacation Bible Schools, and sharing the Gospel.And he’s done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record.Chance put his life on the line to protect his community countless times, and life behind bars could be his “reward.”And on top of that, his trial was postponed for **_a fifth time_** and pushed back to start July 7, 2025.Chance has had this charge hanging over his head for the past FIVE years and the trial will finally be his opportunity for justice.But even if my husband’s good name is cleared, there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills.That’s why I’m so thankful for the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund and patriots who back the blue.Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes – like my husband.LELDF helps hire the best attorneys and secure expert witnesses who will testify to the truth – without being influenced by political paybacks.Friend, you’ve read my email this far so I’m going to ask as boldly as I can:**[**Will you help by sending a gift to LELDF to help defend my husband and the other good police officers who have been wrongly accused?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=114f323277e04e868c5e9a7f192e10b4&_e=sYsCJz-F4E4y7JV02kfblxVRnD3QGgSju7f2YvI8lPG1up8KA_dlyD4P9Pj0gRozX37q6Dc6A7x2UCYc1dZcP9Mm9wwZ-jGE_3ggnY0pXo4sMRtPAWv8CzVLlcsvsDdurSkH6WYnhp1kQo90Bt0hXTPEbjpOgrhay9WgSQWpLZ2Y0pckA8lOoFPe-0fcZWwDAytqZmS55pzGqkHlOOKysNzyq68-mk27bYFoIYRFg2_5rspoIHFWAPH0XTU9BVHs36eLNoJiiA2ExIYi4jvLgOzw5o3il21m8GS_cZEGA-aORC-nNJdwkxBAV_BdOPbjOOFVw-THfjZSO86Zm2fQV2QEk_gIb_X7m-tadVM3uV_AWtyO__nIb-qlI_R-RP7N)** Right now, Chance’s legal team is working day and night to prepare for his trial that starts on July 7, 2025. They know a good man’s life is at stake.But the legal bills are piling up.So with that in mind, please know that any contribution is tax-deductible.Please make your gift right away if possible. I can never express how grateful I am to you – in advance – for helping my husband.
---
With hope and thanks,
---
Kimberly Bretches
---
P.S. My husband Chance was called in to help during the violent George Floyd riots in Austin, Texas in 2020. There was a freak accident and Chance faces FELONY ASSAULT charges. Now he could spend the rest of his life behind bars. To make things worse, we’re up against the deep pockets of a George Soros backed prosecutor in court – and we’re quickly running out of time. Chance’s trial was postponed to July 7, 2025, so we need to use these next few critical months to raise enough funds for his best defense.Please don’t let my three children grow up without their father, Friend. **[**Thank you for any help you can send to LELDF today.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=114f323277e04e868c5e9a7f192e10b4&_e=sYsCJz-F4E4y7JV02kfblxVRnD3QGgSju7f2YvI8lPG1up8KA_dlyD4P9Pj0gRozX37q6Dc6A7x2UCYc1dZcP9Mm9wwZ-jGE_3ggnY0pXo4sMRtPAWv8CzVLlcsvsDdurSkH6WYnhp1kQo90Bt0hXTPEbjpOgrhay9WgSQWpLZ2Y0pckA8lOoFPe-0fcZWwDAytqZmS55pzGqkHlOOKysNzyq68-mk27bYFoIYRFg29XP-NgsRKtXjozlAYfqufM3mBZ7aWMc6dWWx34UechzXWNmACMAAMUrQgk1hyymd9qdm7RZ8i3ewIc65M2NX5owknvPy2gmP_j8EYbWeFOs10nmuJDQo7kxdaYQJFiBJe79ixNphaBJckJWsVR-BlS)**
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit.
