clean_body: Life behind bars could be his “reward.” | | | The same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job. | | Dear Friend,This is a photo of me and my husband, Officer Chance Bretches , on the day Chance received the Lifesaving Medal With Valor for rescuing a driver from a crashed car that had caught on fire. This photo used to be one of my favorites. I was so proud of my husband that day.Now looking at it makes me cry.Because the same city that gave Chance this award is trying to put him in prison for life for doing his job.** Friend, it wasn’t that long ago that Chance was a decorated police officer with the Austin, Texas Police Department.When my husband and his partner were assigned to the Street Narcotics Unit, I was terrified. After all, they’re the ones who deal with violent drug cartels.But Chance was brave. He was willing to put his life in danger to keep our city safe. Little did we know the biggest threat Chance would face wasn’t a dangerous drug dealer......but a radical, Soros-funded prosecutor.You see, Chance was called in to help disperse violent protestors during the violent George Floyd riots in Austin in May 2020. The police department issued Chance a beanbag launcher because they are supposed to be effective without causing serious injury.So, when a rioter hurled rocks at police officers, Chance discharged two bean bags at him.Another protestor stepped in front of the rioter at the exact wrong moment and was struck in the hand. It was a freak accident – but because a cop fired the non-lethal weapon, it instantly becomes a felony to a Soros-backed prosecutor.That radical Soros-funded prosecutor charged my husband with FELONY ASSAULT.My husband did nothing wrong!But now he’s staring at life in prison. If Chance is convicted, I’ll never spend another wedding anniversary with my husband......Our young son and daughter will grow up without their dad.I admit, when Chance was charged, my emotions went from disbelief to anger to despair ... and back again. I learned that the prosecutor in this case owes his election to a wad of campaign cash from none other than radical Leftist billionaire George Soros. That was when I realized that the anti-cop crowd is trying to make an example out of my husband. They’ll do everything in their power to make cops pay.It makes me wonder why anyone would ever sign up to join law enforcement these days. But over 13 years ago, my husband did.And he did it because helping innocent people is in his blood. His brother is a firefighter. His dad is a 34-year police veteran.My husband is a youth leader at our church and plays guitar in the worship band.He’s served on mission trips – planted churches, planning Vacation Bible Schools, and sharing the Gospel.And he’s done his job as a police officer with honor and dignity, without a single mark against his record.Chance put his life on the line to protect his community countless times, and life behind bars could be his “reward.”And on top of that, his trial was postponed for a fifth time and pushed back to start July 7, 2025.Chance has had this charge hanging over his head for the past FIVE years and the trial will finally be his opportunity for justice.But even if my husband’s good name is cleared, there is no way we could hope to pay the mountain of legal bills.That’s why I’m so thankful for the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund and patriots who back the blue.Jason Johnson and the LELDF board organize and fund the successful legal defense of good cops wrongly charged for crimes – like my husband.LELDF helps hire the best attorneys and secure expert witnesses who will testify to the truth – without being influenced by political paybacks.Friend, you’ve read my email this far so I’m going to ask as boldly as I can: Right now, Chance’s legal team is working day and night to prepare for his trial that starts on July 7, 2025. They know a good man’s life is at stake.But the legal bills are piling up.So with that in mind, please know that any contribution is tax-deductible.Please make your gift right away if possible. I can never express how grateful I am to you – in advance – for helping my husband. With hope and thanks, Kimberly Bretches P.S. My husband Chance was called in to help during the violent George Floyd riots in Austin, Texas in 2020. There was a freak accident and Chance faces FELONY ASSAULT charges. Now he could spend the rest of his life behind bars. To make things worse, we’re up against the deep pockets of a George Soros backed prosecutor in court – and we’re quickly running out of time. Chance’s trial was postponed to July 7, 2025, so we need to use these next few critical months to raise enough funds for his best defense.Please don’t let my three children grow up without their father, Friend. ** | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: national security shouldn’t be a partisan issue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Protecting America’s national security shouldn’t be a partisan issue, and we can’t afford to let partisan politics infiltrate the crucial work done by our intelligence community every single day.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101621655/526536200/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-02-05_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzgyOWE1MDQtMTdlNC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4KLFMRWePpTlVp6lIeh7eCgqnGWU_bksuOTReMrpFA4=)
---
This move is yet another reminder that Trump has no respect for the men and women who serve our country. His attempts to undermine federal agencies like the CIA is not just reckless — it’s dangerous. These Virginians are not just bureaucrats — they are dedicated professionals working day in and day out to keep America safe, often at great personal sacrifice.

As a former CIA case officer who worked undercover my entire time at the agency, I didn’t care who our president was or the political views of my colleagues. It didn’t matter. We were focused on the mission — keeping the American people safe. Now, I’m watching as the White House attacks the service and integrity of these public servants.

Protecting America’s national security shouldn’t be a partisan issue, and we can’t afford to let partisan politics infiltrate the crucial work done by our intelligence community every single day. But this news goes even beyond that. We’re watching in real time as Donald Trump and his allies unravel the security systems we’ve built over decades to keep us safe. And he’s doing it in a way that degrades the men and women — many of whom live in Virginia — who put their lives on the line to do this work.

Every hour, Donald Trump comes out swinging with more chaos. It’s become hard to keep up with — but all of it is so terrible, and we can’t stay silent. This chaos is what compelled me to first run for Congress. I feel personally called to speak out here because I know how much our national security professionals — at the CIA and elsewhere — put on the line to keep us safe.

Thank you,

Abigail Spanberger

Look, friend, we need the Department of Education. It plays a crucial role in funding public schools and making sure our students are learning at the appropriate pace and standards.
**Now more than ever, it's imperative that we stand up for this critical federal department and do everything in our power to STOP President Trump from dismantling it. That starts with grassroots activists like you speaking up TODAY.**

**Since you're a reliable Democrat in 43614, Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand is counting on you to stand with us. So please, will you add your name to our petition before midnight tonight to help us protect the Department of Education?**

clean_body: | | | Did you see this, friend? ⬇️ | | Yes, you read that correctly. Donald Trump's efforts to completely eliminate the Department of Education have begun. This is a campaign promise he made last fall, and now he is trying to make it a reality — a move that would be absolutely DISASTROUS for our country. Look, friend, we need the Department of Education. It plays a crucial role in funding public schools and making sure our students are learning at the appropriate pace and standards. Now more than ever, it's imperative that we stand up for this critical federal department and do everything in our power to STOP President Trump from dismantling it. That starts with grassroots activists like you speaking up TODAY. Since you're a reliable Democrat in 43614, Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand is counting on you to stand with us. So please, will you add your name to our petition before midnight tonight to help us protect the Department of Education? | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I am truly honored to have won reelection, and I promise to continue the critical work toward bipartisan solutions for New Yorkers as we enter this new term. While we had many victories in New York this election season, our fight to retake control of the Senate is far from over. = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Team Crow
subject: Coloradans will pay the price of Trump’s tariffs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team,

Donald Trump promised to lower prices on the campaign trail. But he just announced tariffs that if enacted will mean hardworking Coloradans will pay more for food, gas, and housing.

Just look at what news outlets in Colorado and nationwide are saying:

“Colorado among states that could be hardest hit by Trump tariffs on Canadian oil”
Colorado Newsline, 01/31/2025

“From Groceries to Cars, Tariffs Could Raise Prices for U.S. Consumers”
The New York Times, 02/02/2025

After widespread backlash, Trump agreed to pause his tariffs on Canada and Mexico for one month — but he certainly won’t stop trying to enact his reckless agenda.

Let’s be clear: tariffs are taxes. And Donald Trump’s tariffs are a plan to tax every single American.

It’s no wonder his tariffs have been criticized — even by conservative organizations like the National Association of Home Builders and the American Farm Bureau. In fact, it’s estimated that Trump’s tariffs will cost U.S. households an extra $830 a year.

Jason is fighting to deliver for Colorado families and stop Trump’s careless and dangerous actions, but he can’t do it alone. Will you support Jason’s work to hold Donald Trump accountable with a contribution today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-feb25]

name: Team Harder
subject: Fwd: Elon Musk’s power grab
body:
Did you see this?

| | Hey Peter, We didn’t want you to miss Josh’s email yesterday. Josh is in the thick of the fight to stop Elon Musk’s illegal power grab of our federal agencies. Josh needs our help to call this out for what it is: Unconstitutional and incredibly dangerous. [_**Please join us by signing our petition to send a clear message to Elon Musk that we will not let him get away with this.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101621882/526536991/692340512?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGE1YjcxMjEtMThlNC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sLBp5QjFm5pP8zpto8D020VUPhfbbjrcwW1ty7QaLD4=&emci=e227adf6-10e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=da5b7121-18e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=6455652) More below from Josh on the steps he’s taking to push back! \- Team Harder **—FORWARDED MESSAGE—** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101621883/526536992/692340512?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGE1YjcxMjEtMThlNC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sLBp5QjFm5pP8zpto8D020VUPhfbbjrcwW1ty7QaLD4=&emci=e227adf6-10e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=da5b7121-18e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=6455652) Peter, I’m writing to talk about something very serious. This weekend Elon Musk took unprecedented and unconstitutional steps to interfere with our federal agencies. Over the past few days Musk has undermined the federal workforce and now has unauthorized access to sensitive taxpayer and personal data. This includes the private information of everyone currently receiving Social Security and Medicare benefits. His actions were so extreme the highest ranking official at the Treasury Department has resigned. **This is not just troubling — it’s a crisis. An unelected billionaire does not have the Constitutional power to undermine our federal government and it’s vital that we fight back.** I’m taking two important actions right now to combat this overreach. The first is immediately protecting public funds and tightening restrictions on who can access sensitive government data. The second is we need to safeguard the federal payment systems that provide benefits for millions of Americans. I am supporting legislation to stop unlawful access to the Department of Treasury’s Bureau of the Fiscal Service, which processes payments for Social Security and Medicare. **This isn’t about politics, this is about an unconstitutional power grab and to be frank, Democrats need to step up and fight back. We can’t allow anyone — especially Elon Musk — to put Americans’ personal information and security at risk.** [_**I’m starting a petition to show how widespread the public outcry is. Please join me in showing we WILL NOT STAND for this unconstitutional power grab.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101621884/526536993/692340512?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGE1YjcxMjEtMThlNC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sLBp5QjFm5pP8zpto8D020VUPhfbbjrcwW1ty7QaLD4=&emci=e227adf6-10e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=da5b7121-18e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=6455652) Thank you for raising your voice, \- Josh
---
* * *
You are receiving this email because Congressman Josh Harder is one of our last lines of defense to protect our democracy against MAGA extremists like Donald Trump and Marjorie Taylor Greene. name: Mark Warner
subject: ⚠️ I’m speaking on the Senate floor to try to stop Russell Vought’s confirmation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
tune in to C-SPAN to watch, Derek

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101621899/526537039/2047032710?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Vought_250205_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGQ5NjczOS0xOGU0LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KePQRvp0mLlmcPcGm5tRPUoH0IYbFnhwQNaqj4t33AU=) Derek, in a few minutes, I’ll be speaking on the Senate floor to prevent the GOP-controlled Senate from voting for Russell Vought’s confirmation.

Turn on C-SPAN if you want to tune in, Derek—my Democratic colleagues and I will be here until tomorrow night revealing why Vought is a dangerous, disastrous pick to run the Office of Management and Budget.

[_**In the meantime, if you can, pitch in to fuel my work in the Senate to hold nominees like Vought accountable >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101621900/526537040/2047032710?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Vought_250205_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGQ5NjczOS0xOGU0LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KePQRvp0mLlmcPcGm5tRPUoH0IYbFnhwQNaqj4t33AU=)

Vought said he wants to “traumatize the federal workforce.” Those are his OWN WORDS. He wants to wake up every day believing that our federal workers are the villains in this story.

**Frankly, I can’t think of anything more traumatic than what our federal workforce has already gone through since Trump took office. Unfortunately, Vought can, and he wrote all about it in Project 2025.**

It couldn’t be more obvious that Vought is a clear and present danger to our country.

But since Republicans would rather pledge blind loyalty to Trump than admit that’s the case, I’m going to the Senate floor to try and show them the truth and stop his confirmation in its tracks.

[_**I pledge to always fight in Washington to make the lives of all Virginians and Americans safer, healthier, and stronger. That means doing everything in my power to stop Vought from being confirmed. Will you chip in to my re-election campaign so I can fight back against the Trump administration every step of the way?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101621901/526537041/2047032710?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Vought_250205_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGQ5NjczOS0xOGU0LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KePQRvp0mLlmcPcGm5tRPUoH0IYbFnhwQNaqj4t33AU=)

Thank you,

Mark Warner
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101621902/526537042/2047032710?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Vought_250205_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGQ5NjczOS0xOGU0LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KePQRvp0mLlmcPcGm5tRPUoH0IYbFnhwQNaqj4t33AU=)****

Turn on C-SPAN if you want to tune in, Derek—my Democratic colleagues and I will be here until tomorrow night revealing why Vought is a dangerous, disastrous pick to run the Office of Management and Budget. = Vought said he wants to “traumatize the federal workforce.” Those are his OWN WORDS. He wants to wake up every day believing that our federal workers are the villains in this story. Frankly, I can’t think of anything more traumatic than what our federal workforce has already gone through since Trump took office. Unfortunately, Vought can, and he wrote all about it in Project 2025. It couldn’t be more obvious that Vought is a clear and present danger to our country. Are you familiar with Project 2025?

**Project 2025 is an extreme plan created by Trump’s MAGA allies** that would dismantle the federal government, undermine democracy, and prioritize their far-right agenda. And its chief architect, Russ Vought, who is currently running OMB into the ground, and many of its contributors are joining the Trump administration every day.
Here’s what’s at stake:
* **Criminalize reproductive health care:** Project 2025 calls for a nationwide abortion ban and limits access to contraception.
* **Defund public programs:** The plan would defund public schools, libraries, and programs millions of Americans depend on.
* **Expand executive power:** Project 2025 also consolidates power in the presidency, weakens checks and balances, and would erode our democratic institutions.
* **Environmental protections:** Project 2025 would slash regulations designed to combat climate change and protect our air and water.
* **Erase LGBTQ+ rights:** The GOP wants to strip away fundamental protections and freedoms for LGBTQ+ Americans.

Now that Republicans have taken over Washington, D.C., we're seeing Trump try to make Project 2025's main goals a reality.
**Our research team is compiling responses and wants to know: ****[Do you support Project 2025? Take our one-click poll and make your voice heard.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101622088/526537810/-2052478929?refcode=LOC_EM_POLL_2025.02.05_PROJECT2025_B1_F1_S1_C1_u1_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI4MDI2NDIzLTE5ZTQtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PMM25Jn-9GCUqxqjMUFWlpYkJXoK_YDAAPwXqX01uDM=&emci=2863fab3-cde3-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=b8026423-19e4-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=23124236)**

name: AOC
subject: "Waste"
disclaimer_text: paid for by Medicaid that is the “waste
body:
They need to find four trillion dollars.
#
Trump has completely given up his power and handed it over to Elon Musk.
I have encountered many billionaires in my career. You all have seen many of those encounters, in hearings, in other forms of questioning, etc.
I can tell you that **this dude is probably one of the most unintelligent billionaires I have ever met** , which you can probably glean from watching on TV.
The danger is not just in the lack of intelligence that Elon has — this guy is one of the most morally vacant, and least knowledgeable about these systems.
We already saw that last week when they were like, “Oh yeah we're gonna freeze everything! That sounds so cool, let's do that!” And then Medicaid portals across the United States got suspended.
So what they're trying to do, under the guise of “waste,” is gut some of the most essential federal programs that we've got.
What they are _not_ going to include in their government waste assessments (take a big guess!) is _defense spending_. I sat on the Oversight Committee y'all. **I have seen defense contractors price gouge and loot the public in such inordinate ways**.
Elon Musk gets his money from defense. The Pentagon has yet to pass an audit, but they want you to think that it's the _viejita_ who's getting her insulin paid for by Medicaid that is the “waste.”
**This is why Elon punches down — because he can't punch across**. He wants you to think that the lady selling churros on the corner is part of a mass conspiracy.
No, dude. **It's the big corporations trying to distract you**.
We do not have to comply with illegal activity — **even if that illegal activity is coming from the President and his billionaire donors**.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250205.8PTjnw&refcode=em20250205-8074-P_FND_RES_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8074%2E2526796%2ERPiedb)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250205.8PTjnw&refcode=em20250205-8074-P_FND_RES_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=8074%2E2526796%2ERPiedb)**
Stay focused. Take a breath. Understand that your everyday small actions matter.
Letting someone know that they're safe with you matters. Showing up matters.
More soon,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250205?refcode=em20250205-8074-P_FND_RES_GND&t=21&refcode2=8074_2526796_RPiedb&akid=8074%2E2526796%2ERPiedb)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250205-8074-P_FND_RES_GND&t=22&akid=8074%2E2526796%2ERPiedb)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=8074%2E2526796%2ERPiedb) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=8074%2E2526796%2ERPiedb) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=8074%2E2526796%2ERPiedb)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Elon Musk said I hate America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140600?t=1002&akid=36399%2E1203867%2EYBV-Yi ]Tweet by Ian Miles Cheong: Ilhan Omar is very upset about how Trump is
dismantling USAID, which she claims makes him a “dictator.” Quote tweet
from Elon Musk: She’s a major grifter and hates America

Peter — Elon Musk called me a
“grifter who hates America” earlier this week.

He needs to look in the mirror.

Because frankly, there is no bigger grifter and nobody doing more to harm
America today than Elon Musk.

He’s the richest man in the world and he’s using his wealth and access to
the President to dismantle the parts of the government he doesn’t like,
while collecting the private data of the American people.

He’s never been elected by anyone, and he’s trying to take control of the
Treasury department! Trillions of dollars in medicare payments, social
security, and more.

Not to mention the billions of dollars he and his companies get in
Department of Defense contracts each year.

So yes, I will keep saying that Trump is acting like a dictator and
enriching himself and his oligarch friends at Americans’ expense, no
matter how many times they come after me for it.

I’ve never let the right-wing attacks stop me, and I don’t plan on doing
so now. But I can’t take them on alone. Nobody can. It’s going to take a
movement. So I need to know if you’re with me.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250205-io?refcode=em20250205-36399&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36399_1203867_YBV-Yi&akid=36399%2E1203867%2EYBV-Yi ]Peter, can
you please chip in $5 or any amount to my campaign and
Justice Democrats to help us fight back against Trump, Musk, and the
oligarchy trying to take over our government? The amount of the donation
today isn’t as important as the donation itself, I’m just grateful to know
you’re in this fight alongside me.

name: JocelynBenson.com
subject: I'm ready for this work
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I'm running for Governor to truly make government work for everyone.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=81%2E181023%2E_dwi6E)
Team — Growing up, my parents taught me that everyone deserves to get a fair shot in life.
They were public school teachers working in special education, and they would take me to work with them because they didn’t have childcare. I’d sit in the back of the classroom and watch them do all they could to ensure their students were cared for.
Through watching them work, my parents instilled in me the importance of serving others. **I started to believe that if you don’t like something, you must fight to change it.**
I’ve carried the lessons they taught me every step of my life — from my time as a voting rights lawyer, to leading Wayne State Law School, to serving as Secretary of State. I’ve never given up the fight to give everyone a fair chance.
I’m running for Governor of Michigan to continue that work and make sure that every Michigan family has that fair shot.
[**If you’re with me, will you pitch in a donation of any amount today?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250205_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=81%2E181023%2E_dwi6E)
I’ve investigated radical extremist groups, taught civil rights and voting rights law, and I ran for Secretary of State to make sure government is efficient and transparent, that every voice is heard, and that every legitimate vote is counted.
Some people didn’t like that very much — but I’ve never backed down from a tough fight. I’ve spent my life standing up to powerful interests, and I’ll keep standing up to any bullies or billionaires who try to deceive us, divide us, take away our rights, or deprive us of our opportunities.
**Now, I’m fighting to make Michigan the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, stay, and call home.** We need transparent leadership, safe schools and neighborhoods, and good education and childcare. Every Michigander should be able to pay their bills, put food on the table, and take care of their families.
[**That’s what I’m ready to fight for as Michigan’s next Governor. Will you join me by making a donation today?**](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12025.B7hgkZ&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250205_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=81%2E181023%2E_dwi6E)

name: Katie Porter
subject: Republicans are quietly trying to change our tax code to the detriment of working people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39421%2E3422442%2ExLO9UT)
Derek,
Republicans in Washington want to change our tax code to further benefit billionaires and punish working people, and one of their proposed changes is gutting the Earned Income Tax Credit (EITC).
This tax credit, which currently helps nearly 17 million working families with children make ends meet, isn’t a giveaway. **It’s a core, longstanding part of our tax code that allows workers—both those who have kids and those who don’t—to keep a bit more of the money they earn.**
Along with changes to the EITC, Republicans have proposed eliminating the “head of household” filing status for single working parents.
**The result could be that a single parent earning $25,000 annually would have $2,000 less in their bank account each year.**
Tax policy is wonky, but it’s not hard to imagine what having $2,000 less per year means for that single mom or dad.
As a single mom of three, **I know kids don’t need less food or medicine because they have one parent instead of two.** Yet, Republicans propose to remove even this modest boost for working parents. Our tax policy should uplift all families, not punish children because they don’t live in a two-parent household.
The lack of empathy that Republicans are showing for working Americans is astounding. The EITC was created in 1975 and has enjoyed bipartisan support until now. This longstanding policy has helped lift children out of poverty and helped families stay on top of their bills amidst rising prices.
At a time when more and more families struggle to make ends meet, Republicans want to make things even harder.
Instead of spending more federal dollars on tax cuts for billionaires, Congress should focus on keeping its promises to voters: lower costs, invest in the middle class, and put more money back in the pockets of the everyday workers who power our economy.
Thank you for reading,
Katie Porter
Truth to Power (Katie’s PAC) is working to elect Democrats in 2026 who will stand up to Trump and Republicans when they threaten working people.
**[Will you make a $5 donation today to support Truth to Power?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250205-1?refcode=em20250205-39421&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39421_3422442_xLO9UT&akid=39421%2E3422442%2ExLO9UT)**
